Dr. Scott Jensen will Tell the Truth | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us1.campaign-archive.com/?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=98996074d9&e=33b11688c1)

| | Peter,

Dr. Scott Jensen blew the whistle on the dangers of COVID lockdowns, keeping kids out of school, closing businesses, and Tim Walz's systematic failure to protect our most vulnerable in nursing homes. He's been featured on [Fox News and numerous national shows](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=33141cc5a4&e=33b11688c1) for being a TRUTH TELLER. Despite being named Minnesota's [Family Physician of the Year](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=27b4aea275&e=33b11688c1) in 2016, the political and medical establishment tried to silence him by going after his medical license. Dr. Scott Jensen stood strong and [the effort failed miserably](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=3a32081492&e=33b11688c1).

As Governor, Dr. Scott Jensen won't back down, won't be intimidated, and won't stop seeking a more honest and transparent government. Minnesota has been harmed greatly by the failed policies of Tim Walz.

Dr. Jensen was a voice for his patients. He's ready to be a strong voice for YOU. Will you stand with Dr. Jensen and [give $5, $25, or more?](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=99043c6592&e=33b11688c1) We need you.

name: Tom Fitton
subject: School CRT Agenda Targets Babies?
body:
FBI Spying Again?

[INSIDE JW]

SCHOOL CRT PROGRAM TARGETS BABIES?

[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57073&L=26268&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vd2F0Y2g/dj00b1ZJSURKVWNScyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMTEwNjAyNDgwMA==]
If you want a close look at the madness of critical race theory,
look at what’s going on in Montgomery County Public Schools (MCPS),
Maryland’s largest school system. Little of this is connected to
reality, and it’s no wonder parents everywhere are objecting.

We received two sets
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57073&L=26202&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL3RhZ3MvbW9udGdvbWVyeS1jby1zZXB0LW9jdC0yMDIxLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMTEwNjAyNDgwMA==]
of
records related to the teaching of critical race theory, including a
training course with information about a book titled “Antiracist
Baby” that introduces the youngest readers to “the concept and
power of antiracism,” and says it’s the “perfect gift” for
“ages baby to age 3.”

The documents also include information from a course titled,
“Digital Literacy 3” at Thomas Pyle Middle School. The course’s
curriculum includes activities where the children discuss the
identification of their gender, religion, and sexual orientation. The
course also includes the children using “propaganda” to lead
social justice movements.

We received the documents in response to our Maryland Public
Information Act
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57073&L=24939&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubWFyeWxhbmRhdHRvcm5leWdlbmVyYWwuZ292L1BhZ2VzL09wZW5Hb3YvcGlhLmFzcHg/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTExMDYwMjQ4MDA=]
request
for:

All records related to the development and implementation of a
“Psychoeducational Lesson” related to a purported “dual
pandemic” of Covid- 19/systemic racism in use by the Montgomery
County Public Schools. Such records shall include, but not be limited
to, email communications between MCPS officials responsible for
formulating and implementing the lesson, including but not limited to
those communications of Dr. Cheree Price, in addition to all other
policy documents regarding its development.
In a September 29, 2020, email
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57073&L=26203&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL21vbnRnb21lcnktY28tc2Nob29scy1wc3ljaG9lZHVjYXRpb24tb2N0b2Jlci0yMDIxLXBnLTM4Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMTEwNjAyNDgwMA==]
from
MCPS intern Benjamin Mourad
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57073&L=26204&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubGlua2VkaW4uY29tL2luL2JlbmphbWluLW0tOWI4MjkzMTQwLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMTEwNjAyNDgwMA==]
in the “Student
Well Being and Achievement” office of the Office of Student Support
& Engagement, to Elizabeth Rathbone, Coordinator of Student Health and
Wellness, Mourad provides a list of trainings offered in the summer of
2020 to MCPS staff. This training includes:

* REQ: Restorative Justice Training on Restorative Circles,
Mindfulness & Other Restorative Practices
* School-based Critical Staff Member Training
* Counselors as Equity Literate Leaders
* Implementing Culturally Responsive PBIS (Positive Behavioral
Interventions and Supports)

In an August 26, 2020, email
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57073&L=26205&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL21vbnRnb21lcnktY28tc2Nob29scy1wc3ljaG9lZHVjYXRpb24tb2N0b2Jlci0yMDIxLXBncy02LTcvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjExMTA2MDI0ODAw]
titled
“COVID-19 Update” to MCPS principals, MCPS Associate
Superintendent for the Office of Shared Accountability Janet S.
Wilson
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57073&L=26206&F=T&]
advises the principals that “Non-custodial
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57073&L=26269&F=T&drurl=aHR0cDovL3d3dy5tZGp1c3RpY2Uub3JnL2ZpbGVzL0FjY2Vzc3RvQ2hpbGRSZWNvcmRzZmx5ZXIucGRmP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjExMTA2MDI0ODAw]
parents”
who request Zoom login information [for access to school and potential
Zoom events, like Back-to School Night] should not be granted
connection information:

Additionally, parents should not login to Zoom classrooms and observe
class when the child is not with them. If teachers note a parent
logging in separately from their student, they should notify their
principal who can seek support from OGC (Office of General Counsel) or
Compliance as needed.

***

To support students at the start of the year, all schools will be
required to implement a student psychoeducational lesson during one of
the school’s mandatory Social-Emotional Learning (SEL) block before
September 18, 2020. This lesson will provide students crisis facts
about the dual pandemic (COVID-19 and systemic racism) that is
occurring around the country and here in Montgomery County.
Wilson then presents the principals with a “website for staff
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57073&L=26270&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubW9udGdvbWVyeXNjaG9vbHNtZC5vcmcvc3R1ZGVudHMvcHJvZmVzc2lvbmFsLWxlYXJuaW5nLmFzcHgjX2JsYW5rP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjExMTA2MDI0ODAw],
students and families that highlights ongoing professional learning
opportunities for the virtual opening of schools. For staff training
opportunities are focused around these key areas:

* Technology
* Curriculum, Instruction and Assessment
* Pedagogy
* Social-Emotional Well-Being and Coaching for Engagement/Success
* Accessibility Tools for Instruction and Home
* Equity
* Health and Safety
* Onboarding, Induction, Mentoring, Communication and Collaboration

She further notes: “The professional learning opportunities are
grounded in equity and social-emotional learning to ensure that
equitable environments are established in the virtual and traditional
learning spaces. Professional learning opportunities will be updated
throughout the year, so please check back frequently.”

In an instructional video
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57073&L=26209&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9kcml2ZS5nb29nbGUuY29tL2ZpbGUvZC8xMWlBaHh1cjZPbjdaR0Iwem9CVUxGTHp0LUt0NnNGcGQvdmlldz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMTEwNjAyNDgwMA==]
for
teachers on “Teacher Tips for SEL (Social and Emotional Learning)
on Covid19/Social Justice
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57073&L=26210&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL21vbnRnb21lcnktY28tc2Nob29scy1wc3ljaG9lZHVjYXRpb24tb2N0b2Jlci0yMDIxLXBncy0xMy0xOS9dLOKAnT91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMTEwNjAyNDgwMA==
in which the presenter first instructs teachers how to set up Zoom
classes for students and how to adjust a feature in the Zoom chat
setting to “alleviate the possibility of students saving and sharing
the chat for later.” At the 6:30 mark, the presenter, in a slide
titled “Covid-19 and social justice surrounding racism,” directs
teachers to use a “scripted response”:

We are currently living through a dual pandemic with COVID-19 and the
Systemic and Structural racism occurring worldwide. A pandemic is an
outbreak of a disease that occurs over a wide geographic area and
affects an exceptionally high proportion of the population. As you can
see from this slide [featuring a Black Lives Matter protest poster],
both are affecting lives of people in our community and around the
world. Part of what we will discuss today will surround facts about
COVID-19 and the Social Justice Movement in our country.
In an October 8, 2020, email
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57073&L=26211&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL21vbnRnb21lcnktY28tc2Nob29scy1wc3ljaG9lZHVjYXRpb24tb2N0b2Jlci0yMDIxLXBncy00MS00My8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTExMDYwMjQ4MDA=]
to
MCPS principals and others about “psychoeducational lessons and
curriculum updates,” Wilson reveals that there is a “Social
Justice Book club for Grades 4-8.”

In a September 11, 2020, email
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57073&L=26212&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL21vbnRnb21lcnktY28tc2Nob29scy1wc3ljaG9lZHVjYXRpb24tb2N0b2Jlci0yMDIxLXBncy00OC00OS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTExMDYwMjQ4MDA=]
titled,
“Psychoeducational Lesson Drop In support,” MCPS Director of
Psychological Services, Dr. Christina Conolly tells MCPS faculty:

We have had a lot of staff members who have questions about the
implementation of the social justice slides on the lesson. Please be
available to coach and/or co-teach with a staff member that may not be
at a place on their anti-racism journey to effectively teach that
section of the lesson.
A PowerPoint presentation titled “Family Guidance to the
Psychoeducational Lesson
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57073&L=26213&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL21vbnRnb21lcnktY28tc2Nob29scy1wc3ljaG9lZHVjYXRpb24tb2N0b2Jlci0yMDIxLXBncy01OC0xMTQvXSzigJ0/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTExMDYwMjQ4MDA=
includes the following slides for parents:

* “Secondary Slide: Dual Pandemic” includes a depiction of
Black Lives Matter protesters along with police officers in
Germantown, Maryland kneeling at a George Floyd protest, as well as
the headlines, “What It’s Like to be Asian During the Coronavirus
Pandemic” and “Why the Coronavirus Looks Different to Black
America.”
* “Elementary Slide: Some Facts about Racism and Social
Justice” contains a link to a video titled “Antiracist Baby,”
based on a book written by Ibram X. Kendi.
* “Teacher’s Notes,” advises teachers that the “Antiracist
Baby” book introduces the youngest readers to “the concept and
power of antiracism,” and says it’s the “perfect gift” for
“ages baby to age 3
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57073&L=26218&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL21vbnRnb21lcnktY28tc2Nob29scy1wc3ljaG9lZHVjYXRpb24tb2N0b2Jlci0yMDIxLXBnLTkyL10u4oCdP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjExMTA2MDI0ODAw
* A slide titled “Secondary: A Brief Anti-Racism Glossary,”
notes “Systems of Oppression identifies inequity by calling
attention to the historical and organized patterns of mistreatment. In
the United States systems of oppression (like systemic racism) are
woven into the very foundation of American culture, society, and laws.
(Social Identities and Systems of Oppression, 2019)]
* “Secondary: Common Initial Crisis Reactions,” lists symptoms
that secondary school children may experience because of crisis
include emotional, cognitive, physical and interpersonal/behavioral
symptoms. The category of physical reactions includes “decreased
libido” and “hyperarousal.”
* “Can Students opt-out [of the psychoeducational lesson]?”
includes the bullet point, “Students cannot opt-out of the
lessons,” but parents may request “an alternative method” for
their children “due to mental health concerns.”

In a PowerPoint presentation titled the “3rd through 5th Grade
Psychoeducational Lesson
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57073&L=26222&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL21vbnRnb21lcnktY28tc2Nob29scy1wc3ljaG9lZHVjYXRpb24tb2N0b2Jlci0yMDIxLXBncy0xMTUtMTQwL13igJ0/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTExMDYwMjQ4MDA=
a slide labeled “COVID-19 and Social Justice” includes the claim
that, “People in African American and Latinx communities have
been _more likely to get sick from_ COVID-19 because of how racism
and unfairness impacts their lives.” [Emphasis in original]

In a presentation titled “High School Psychoeducational Lesson
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57073&L=26223&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL21vbnRnb21lcnktY28tc2Nob29scy1wc3ljaG9lZHVjYXRpb24tb2N0b2Jlci0yMDIxLXBncy0xNjUtMTkxL10s4oCdP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjExMTA2MDI0ODAw
a link is provided to the “Educator and Caregiver Learning Guide
from Disrupt Texts
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57073&L=26224&F=T&drurl=aHR0cDovL2ltYWdlcy5yYW5kb21ob3VzZS5jb20vdGVhY2hlcnNfZ3VpZGVzLzk3ODA1OTMxMTA0MTYucGRmXeKAnT91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMTEwNjAyNDgwMA==
for the book titled “Antiracist Baby.” In the book the authors
note, “To White caregivers ... Racism is a problem that was invented
by White people, and it is the work of White people to dismantle
it.” The authors add that it is the responsibility of White
caregivers to “study Whiteness,” and advise that, “Indigenous,
Black and People of Color are not ‘minorities’ but ‘People of
the Global Majority’ (PGM).”

In a September 15, 2020, email exchange
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57073&L=26225&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL21vbnRnb21lcnktY28tc2Nob29scy1wc3ljaG9lZHVjYXRpb24tb2N0b2Jlci0yMDIxLXBncy05LTEwLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMTEwNjAyNDgwMA==]
with
the subject line “Message about SEL (Social and Emotional Learning)
and Psychoeducational lesson,” Wilson and other officials discuss
parents wanting their children to opt-out of Black Lives Matter
lessons.

Wilson writes: “I want to put on your radar that this [opting out]
may be related to the anti-racist curriculum initiatives.”

MCPS Area Associate Superintendent Cheryl Dyson
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57073&L=26226&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubGlua2VkaW4uY29tL2luL2NoZXJ5bC1keXNvbi0zNDkzOTcxNzQvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjExMTA2MDI0ODAw],
replies:
“Agree, Janet and Diane. I’ve heard directly from principals and
directors. Some principals have parents who want their child to
opt-out from the Black Lives Matter lesson.”

Area Assoc. Superintendent Diane Morris then responds: “Yes, I think
so.”

The next reply, from MCPS Chief of Engagement, Innovation, and
Operations Derek Turner, is entirely redacted, as is a “high
importance” reply by MCPS Admin. Services Manager Felicia Yorro.

The new records include a draft activity assignment titled “Personal
Identity Character Sketch
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57073&L=26227&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL21vbnRnb21lcnktY291bnR5LWNydC1zZXB0ZW1iZXItMjAyMS1wZy0xL13igJ0/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTExMDYwMjQ4MDA=
in which students were told to “focus on the intersectionality of
your culture and another way that you identify yourself (your race,
ethnicity, gender identity, sexual orientation, class or another
identity factor not listed here).” The assignment was adapted from
the book “Courageous Conversations.”

A slide titled, “Five Approaches to Social Justice Activism”
includes the section “Food, Festivals & Fun
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57073&L=26229&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL21vbnRnb21lcnktY291bnR5LWNydC1zZXB0ZW1iZXItMjAyMS1wZy0yL1064oCdP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjExMTA2MDI0ODAw

Activism at this stage is based on cultural events and “celebrating
diversity,” usually through cross-cultural programs and activities.
Events tend to focus on surface-level cultural awareness, and often
actually contribute to the stereotypes they are meant to challenge.
People at the Food, Folks, and Fun stage might host an International
Fair, a Multicultural Night, or a Diversity Fashion Show. Although
these events have the potential to bring people together across
difference, they do not have the potential to address injustices such
as racism, sexism, classism, or homophobia.
The handout further notes that, “charitable giving” to such
organizations as Amnesty International is a route people often choose
“that will ease their own conscience, but don’t want to associate
in any deeper way with a particular cause.” The handout also
discusses volunteerism and is critical of “savior syndrome,” which
it defines as when, “wealthy kids are sent into poor neighborhoods
to do service-learning, but never discuss how their relative
wealth _is connected with_ the relative poverty of the people
inhabiting those neighborhoods.” [Emphasis in original]

A draft presentation created by Montgomery County Public Schools
Secondary Literacy Instruction is titled “Digital Literacy 3,
Quarter 2: When Justice Isn’t Served
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57073&L=26230&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL21vbnRnb21lcnktY291bnR5LWNydC1zZXB0ZW1iZXItMjAyMS1wZ3MtOS0yNy9d4oCdP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjExMTA2MDI0ODAw
and features a “No Justice No Peace” logo, and features the
following slides:

* “Scenarios of Injustice” describes a group activity where the
students, “Work together with your group to determine how you would
address your scenario of injustice,” and “Everyone must prepare to
present your ideas to the class.”
* This activity includes a section where students are provided with
a “Scenario of Injustice” to discuss and write down ideas about.
In this scenario, students are told that they witnessed two men –
one black and one white – fighting in a parking lot. Police arrive
and separate the men -forcing the black man to the ground, handcuffing
and putting him in the police car. The police question the white man
who, “shakes hands with the policemen and walks away.”

The “Digital Literacy 3, Quarter 1” presentation features several
“Graphic Organizers
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57073&L=26233&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL21vbnRnb21lcnktY291bnR5LWNydC1zZXB0ZW1iZXItMjAyMS1wZ3MtMjgtNDgvXTrigJ0/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTExMDYwMjQ4MDA=

* Under the heading “Common Task, Gender Roles Reflection Graphic
Organizer,” is a draft slide titled, “Reflecting on Gender Roles
in My Life,” in which students are asked to “Describe when and how
you first recognized your gender as part of your identity. It could
have been in a positive, negative or neutral way.” It further asks
the children to “Briefly describe how you felt about being a member
of your gender group(s) in different aspects and stages of your
life.”
* Under the heading “Race Reflection Graphic Organizer” is a
draft slide titled, “Reflecting on Race In My Life” that asks
students to, “Describe when and how you first recognized race. It
could have been in a positive, negative or neutral way.” Students
are further asked about the race of their family members: “Are your
parents the same race? Are your brothers and sisters? What about your
extended family-uncles, aunts, etc?”
* The “Religion Reflection Graphic Organizer” features a draft
slide titled, “Reflecting on Religion in My Life,” and asks
students to “Describe when and how you first recognized your
religion. It could have been in a positive, negative or neutral
way.” It further asks “Did you feel threatened, minoritized or
privileged in this moment? Why?” and “Where do you go to
worship?” and “Did your belief become stronger as you became
older?”
* The “Sexual Orientation Reflection Graphic Organizer” slide
titled “Reflecting on Sexual Orientation in My Life” asks the
children to “Describe when and how you first recognized your sexual
orientation.”

A presentation titled “Social Justice Movement: Making a Difference
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57073&L=26238&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL21vbnRnb21lcnktY291bnR5LWNydC1zZXB0ZW1iZXItMjAyMS1wZ3MtNDktNjMvXeKAnT91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMTEwNjAyNDgwMA==
includes:

* A set of slides that prompt students to “Create a timeline for
your chosen social justice movement ...” In this activity, the
students are taught that a “catalyst” is “something that quickly
causes change or action: such as “art, music, speeches, events,
laws, movies, court cases, pop culture, propaganda, and
literature.”

A presentation titled: “Researching Important Leaders and
Organizations
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57073&L=26240&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL21vbnRnb21lcnktY291bnR5LWNydC1zZXB0ZW1iZXItMjAyMS1wZ3MtNjQtNzYvXeKAnT91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMTEwNjAyNDgwMA==
includes:

* A slide titled “Social Justice Leaders
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57073&L=26241&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL21vbnRnb21lcnktY291bnR5LWNydC1zZXB0ZW1iZXItMjAyMS1wZy02Ny0yL13igJ0/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTExMDYwMjQ4MDA=
that includes a picture of a Black Lives Matter protester with an
upraised fist and long-time Communist Party USA member Angela
Davis.

This material details how extremist race politics and CRT are being
used to target children for political ends. Politics should
immediately be removed from the curriculum of Montgomery County
Schools. These CRT-laden teachings have no place in any American
classroom.

JUDICIAL WATCH TELLS COURT FBI MAY HAVE VIOLATED LAW IN 1/6 PROBES

The FBI and Justice Department are playing games with the truth
regarding their actions on January 6, in particular their collecting
personal, private information about American citizens.

In the latest move, we filed a response
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57073&L=26201&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZG9qLWJhbmstZGF0YS1tb3Rpb24tMDEyMTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjExMTA2MDI0ODAw]
to Justice’s effort to block our request for records of
communication between the FBI and several financial institutions about
the reported transfer of financial transaction records of people in
DC, Maryland and Virginia on January 5 and January 6, 2021.

This comes in our lawsuit
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57073&L=25315&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvYmFuay1kYXRhLWphbi02Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMTEwNjAyNDgwMA==]
against
the FBI (_Judicial Watch v. U.S. Department of Justice_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57073&L=25276&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZG9qLWphbi0yMDIxLWJhbmstcmVxdWVzdHMtY29tcGxhaW50LTAxMjE2Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMTEwNjAyNDgwMA==]
(No.
1:21-cv-01216)) for:

All records of communication between the FBI and any financial
institution, including but not limited to Bank of America, Citibank,
Chase Manhattan Bank, Discover, and/or American Express, in which the
FBI sought transaction data for those financial institutions’ debit
and credit card account holders who made purchases in Washington, DC,
Maryland and/or Virginia on January 5, 2021 and/or January 6, 2021.
In its motion for summary judgment, the Justice Department, despite
previously admitting to the existence of these records, refused
to “confirm or deny the existence of records” about this
surveillance of American citizens.

We argue in response that the Justice Department should not be allowed
to shield “improper activity:”

In this case, the FBI appears to have conducted an improper, broad
sweep of financial records, not just those of persons it had reason to
believe were involved in the events of January 6, but many more
Americans. Detailed media reports not only indicate that the FBI
sought financial records, but also set forth in detail the specific
criteria and scope of the records obtained.
Bank of America reportedly
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57073&L=25272&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZm94bmV3cy5jb20vb3Bpbmlvbi90dWNrZXItY2FybHNvbi1iYW5rLW9mLWFtZXJpY2EtY3VzdG9tZXItZGF0YS1mZWRzLWNhcGl0b2wtcmlvdD91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMTEwNjAyNDgwMA==]
“actively
but secretly engaged in the hunt for extremists in cooperation with
the government” and, following the events of January 6, gave the FBI
financial records of their customers who fit the following profile:

* Customers confirmed as transacting, either through bank account
debit card or credit card purchases in Washington, D.C. between 1/5
and 1/6.
* Purchases made for Hotel/Airbnb RSVPs in DC, VA, and MD after
1/6.
* Any purchase of weapons or at a weapons-related merchant between
1/7 and their upcoming suspected stay in D.C. area around
Inauguration Day.
* Airline related purchases since 1/6.

Our suit shows how the FBI is corruptly trying to hide that it used
the January 6 incident as an excuse to conduct unlawful surveillance
of the American people’s bank transactions.

Until next week,

clean_body: FBI Spying Again? [INSIDE JW] SCHOOL CRT PROGRAM TARGETS BABIES? [==] If you want a close look at the madness of critical race theory, look at what’s going on in Montgomery County Public Schools (MCPS), Maryland’s largest school system. Little of this is connected to reality, and it’s no wonder parents everywhere are objecting. We received two sets [==] of records related to the teaching of critical race theory, including a training course with information about a book titled “Antiracist Baby” that introduces the youngest readers to “the concept and power of antiracism,” and says it’s the “perfect gift” for “ages baby to age 3.” The documents also include information from a course titled, “Digital Literacy 3” at Thomas Pyle Middle School. The course’s curriculum includes activities where the children discuss the identification of their gender, religion, and sexual orientation. The course also includes the children using “propaganda” to lead social justice movements. We received the documents in response to our Maryland Public Information Act [=] request for: All records related to the development and implementation of a “Psychoeducational Lesson” related to a purported “dual pandemic” of Covid- 19/systemic racism in use by the Montgomery County Public Schools. Such records shall include, but not be limited to, email communications between MCPS officials responsible for formulating and implementing the lesson, including but not limited to those communications of Dr. Cheree Price, in addition to all other policy documents regarding its development. In a September 29, 2020, email [==] from MCPS intern Benjamin Mourad [==] in the “Student Well Being and Achievement” office of the Office of Student Support & Engagement, to Elizabeth Rathbone, Coordinator of Student Health and Wellness, Mourad provides a list of trainings offered in the summer of 2020 to MCPS staff. This training includes: REQ: Restorative Justice Training on Restorative Circles, Mindfulness & Other Restorative Practices School-based Critical Staff Member Training Counselors as Equity Literate Leaders Implementing Culturally Responsive PBIS (Positive Behavioral Interventions and Supports) In an August 26, 2020, email [] titled “COVID-19 Update” to MCPS principals, MCPS Associate Superintendent for the Office of Shared Accountability Janet S. Wilson [==] advises the principals that “Non-custodial [] parents” who request Zoom login information [for access to school and potential Zoom events, like Back-to School Night] should not be granted connection information: Additionally, parents should not login to Zoom classrooms and observe class when the child is not with them. If teachers note a parent logging in separately from their student, they should notify their principal who can seek support from OGC (Office of General Counsel) or Compliance as needed. * To support students at the start of the year, all schools will be required to implement a student psychoeducational lesson during one of the school’s mandatory Social-Emotional Learning (SEL) block before September 18, 2020. This lesson will provide students crisis facts about the dual pandemic (COVID-19 and systemic racism) that is occurring around the country and here in Montgomery County. Wilson then presents the principals with a “website for staff [], students and families that highlights ongoing professional learning opportunities for the virtual opening of schools. For staff training opportunities are focused around these key areas: Technology Curriculum, Instruction and Assessment Pedagogy Social-Emotional Well-Being and Coaching for Engagement/Success Accessibility Tools for Instruction and Home Equity Health and Safety Onboarding, Induction, Mentoring, Communication and Collaboration She further notes: “The professional learning opportunities are grounded in equity and social-emotional learning to ensure that equitable environments are established in the virtual and traditional learning spaces. Professional learning opportunities will be updated throughout the year, so please check back frequently.” In an instructional video [==] for teachers on “Teacher Tips for SEL (Social and Emotional Learning) on Covid19/Social Justice [== in which the presenter first instructs teachers how to set up Zoom classes for students and how to adjust a feature in the Zoom chat setting to “alleviate the possibility of students saving and sharing the chat for later.” At the 6:30 mark, the presenter, in a slide titled “Covid-19 and social justice surrounding racism,” directs teachers to use a “scripted response”: We are currently living through a dual pandemic with COVID-19 and the Systemic and Structural racism occurring worldwide. A pandemic is an outbreak of a disease that occurs over a wide geographic area and affects an exceptionally high proportion of the population. As you can see from this slide [featuring a Black Lives Matter protest poster], both are affecting lives of people in our community and around the world. Part of what we will discuss today will surround facts about COVID-19 and the Social Justice Movement in our country. In an October 8, 2020, email [=] to MCPS principals and others about “psychoeducational lessons and curriculum updates,” Wilson reveals that there is a “Social Justice Book club for Grades 4-8.” In a September 11, 2020, email [=] titled, “Psychoeducational Lesson Drop In support,” MCPS Director of Psychological Services, Dr. Christina Conolly tells MCPS faculty: We have had a lot of staff members who have questions about the implementation of the social justice slides on the lesson. Please be available to coach and/or co-teach with a staff member that may not be at a place on their anti-racism journey to effectively teach that section of the lesson. A PowerPoint presentation titled “Family Guidance to the Psychoeducational Lesson [= includes the following slides for parents: “Secondary Slide: Dual Pandemic” includes a depiction of Black Lives Matter protesters along with police officers in Germantown, Maryland kneeling at a George Floyd protest, as well as the headlines, “What It’s Like to be Asian During the Coronavirus Pandemic” and “Why the Coronavirus Looks Different to Black America.” “Elementary Slide: Some Facts about Racism and Social Justice” contains a link to a video titled “Antiracist Baby,” based on a book written by Ibram X. Kendi. “Teacher’s Notes,” advises teachers that the “Antiracist Baby” book introduces the youngest readers to “the concept and power of antiracism,” and says it’s the “perfect gift” for “ages baby to age 3 [ A slide titled “Secondary: A Brief Anti-Racism Glossary,” notes “Systems of Oppression identifies inequity by calling attention to the historical and organized patterns of mistreatment. In the United States systems of oppression (like systemic racism) are woven into the very foundation of American culture, society, and laws. (Social Identities and Systems of Oppression, 2019)] “Secondary: Common Initial Crisis Reactions,” lists symptoms that secondary school children may experience because of crisis include emotional, cognitive, physical and interpersonal/behavioral symptoms. The category of physical reactions includes “decreased libido” and “hyperarousal.” “Can Students opt-out [of the psychoeducational lesson]?” includes the bullet point, “Students cannot opt-out of the lessons,” but parents may request “an alternative method” for their children “due to mental health concerns.” In a PowerPoint presentation titled the “3rd through 5th Grade Psychoeducational Lesson [= a slide labeled “COVID-19 and Social Justice” includes the claim that, “People in African American and Latinx communities have been more likely to get sick from COVID-19 because of how racism and unfairness impacts their lives.” [Emphasis in original] In a presentation titled “High School Psychoeducational Lesson [ a link is provided to the “Educator and Caregiver Learning Guide from Disrupt Texts [== for the book titled “Antiracist Baby.” In the book the authors note, “To White caregivers ... Racism is a problem that was invented by White people, and it is the work of White people to dismantle it.” The authors add that it is the responsibility of White caregivers to “study Whiteness,” and advise that, “Indigenous, Black and People of Color are not ‘minorities’ but ‘People of the Global Majority’ (PGM).” In a September 15, 2020, email exchange [==] with the subject line “Message about SEL (Social and Emotional Learning) and Psychoeducational lesson,” Wilson and other officials discuss parents wanting their children to opt-out of Black Lives Matter lessons. Wilson writes: “I want to put on your radar that this [opting out] may be related to the anti-racist curriculum initiatives.” MCPS Area Associate Superintendent Cheryl Dyson [], replies: “Agree, Janet and Diane. I’ve heard directly from principals and directors. Some principals have parents who want their child to

name: Rand Paul
subject: Fauci’s word salad isn’t gonna save him
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for Senate |
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58702778:6I9LwB2sN:m:1:3253819041:F7078D1E56CF67E5A34BE2835BF2353D:r) | |
---
Peter, Dr. Fauci needs to resign or be fired NOW.

**FIRST:** I grilled him over the summer regarding his support of the Wuhan lab and their dangerous, threat-to-humanity gain of function research.

**THEN:** He lied to my face. He denied funneling money to Wuhan and said he never funded gain of function - even when thousands of documents proved otherwise.

**NOW:** He's trying to change the definition of "gain of function" to cover his own ass. And I'm not letting him get away with it.

**Let me be clear: no amount of smarmy word salad will get Fauci out of the fact that he lied before Congress and should be fired NOW.**

**[I AGREE: FIRE FAUCI >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58702778:6I9LwB2sN:m:1:3253819041:F7078D1E56CF67E5A34BE2835BF2353D:r) **

The fact of the matter is that Fauci has lost the support of the people.

The only one who doesn't realize it... _is Dr. Fauci. _

He spent our taxpayer dollars on gruesome, animal torture.

He spent our taxpayer dollars paying labs in Wuhan to create artificial super-viruses.

With every suspicious activity he's approved of, it's truly a miracle that the world isn't facing something much more fatal COVID-19.

If we don't fire this guy now, we might not be so lucky the next time.

We have to get this guy out, now. I'm doing what I can as a Senator but I need to prove to the bureaucracy and the Biden administration that we've truly had enough.

Please, join me to FIRE FAUCI by chipping in now:
[**FIRE FAUCI: $25**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58702778:6I9LwB2sN:m:1:3253819041:F7078D1E56CF67E5A34BE2835BF2353D:r)
[**FIRE FAUCI: $50**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58702778:6I9LwB2sN:m:1:3253819041:F7078D1E56CF67E5A34BE2835BF2353D:r)
[**FIRE FAUCI: $75**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58702778:6I9LwB2sN:m:1:3253819041:F7078D1E56CF67E5A34BE2835BF2353D:r)
[**FIRE FAUCI: $100**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58702778:6I9LwB2sN:m:1:3253819041:F7078D1E56CF67E5A34BE2835BF2353D:r)
We need real consequences for men like Fauci who recklessly abuse their power.

**[Together, we can make sure that happens.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58702778:6I9LwB2sN:m:1:3253819041:F7078D1E56CF67E5A34BE2835BF2353D:r)**

In Liberty,
Rand Paul

body:
|

| | | Patriot,

You may have seen me in the news this past week, or even on Sean Hannity's show.

And now, as the first black woman elected Lieutenant Governor in Virginia, I'm thrilled to start working alongside strong, conservative leaders putting our country FIRST again.

The Left has put American citizens on the back burner for far too long.

Almost every single Conservative we asked said they would join in a heartbeat... But I just checked our re cords -- why haven't you responded? Would you join Trump's site? Please choose one of the following options in the next 25 minutes: President Trump promised some incredible things for his new site: \-- NO blacklists \-- NO shadow-banning \-- NO Conservative censorship This site is built BY freedom-loving Patriots FOR freedom-loving Patriots. But taking on the Silicon Valley Liberals is a MONUMENTAL task. President Trump needs to know who really has his back, and who no longer supports him... Thanks in advance for your response. \-- Sarah Republican Headquarters (Team Scalise) Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC. 320 First Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 Contributions to TEAM SCALISE, or any participating committee, are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. | | Folks -- I was so proud to vote for President Joe Biden’s Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act yesterday! This once-in-a-generation investment will create good-paying, union jobs and put Virginians to work fixing our roads and bridges, building clean water infrastructure, making high-speed broadband available to everyone, and creating a renewable energy economy to take on the climate crisis. But we are just getting started. Our next big challenge is passing the Build Back Better Act, which just cleared the first procedural hurdle late last night. It is the most sweeping, comprehensive piece of legislation since President Franklin Delano Roosevelt’s New Deal, and your support won us the majorities to make this happen. **[If we want to continue passing groundbreaking legislation, we need to hold our House majority. My seat is a top target for national Republicans -- will you rush a $25 donation today to help me keep VA-02 blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38355678/315085599/1017468089?refcode=EM_BS_LUR_211106_FR_Infrastructure_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDA3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOWFkN2RhMy0wNTNmLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7DcOxgSWc1eB4_03zBaWDLRIvtEbsVkNf30gF7ajRbU=)** | | | [Donate »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38355679/315085608/1017468089?refcode=EM_BS_LUR_211106_FR_Infrastructure_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDA3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOWFkN2RhMy0wNTNmLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7DcOxgSWc1eB4_03zBaWDLRIvtEbsVkNf30gF7ajRbU=)

clean_body: | = | | Folks -- I was so proud to vote for President Joe Biden’s Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act yesterday! This once-in-a-generation investment will create good-paying, union jobs and put Virginians to work fixing our roads and bridges, building clean water infrastructure, making high-speed broadband available to everyone, and creating a renewable energy economy to take on the climate crisis. But we are just getting started. Our next big challenge is passing the Build Back Better Act, which just cleared the first procedural hurdle late last night. It is the most sweeping, comprehensive piece of legislation since President Franklin Delano Roosevelt’s New Deal, and your support won us the majorities to make this happen. = | | | = Today let’s take a moment to celebrate this win and what it means for the American people. But tomorrow, let’s get back to work defending our Democratic House majority and all the hard-fought progress we’ve won. Thank you all! Peter,

There are a lot of takeaways from Tuesday’s election results, but they all mean the same thing.

If we don’t get our act together now, Republicans will run away with elections up and down the ballot next November -- including right here in Maryland.

name: Ben Shapiro
subject: 9 Leftists Arrested for Attacking Free Speech
body:
Peter, Insidious leftist ideology has taken hold of our educational system. It's never been more important that we expose it, because the Left has lit an ideological fire, and that fire is now consuming the minds of young Americans, burning itself through the most aspects of American culture and politics. That's why it's of utmost importance that I hear back from you today. I'm no stranger to the authoritarian attitudes on campus; I famously felt the brunt of it when conservative students invited me to speak on the University of California, Berkeley campus. [**HELP US FIGHT THE RADICAL LEFT**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58705361:J3d47B2NP:m:1:3298722022:6BFF651D7C49F6E8E12962E9D505D85A:r) Radical leftist groups like Antifa vowed to riot and cause harm to others. The fear of violence from leftist agitators was so great that:
* It cost $600,000 in security expenses and required hundreds of policemen to ensure that agitators didn't disrupt or try to cause violence at my speech.
* The University shut down six buildings on campus during my speech and erected concrete barricades (YES, a wall) to secure the Berkeley campus.
* For the first time in 20 years, the City of Berkeley voted to allow the use of pepper spray against violent protesters.
* In the end, police arrested nine leftists for trying to sneak banned weapons into our event--with the likely intent to do harm.

It's no longer just about the Left trying to suppress your conservative views on campus. It's about using the threat of violence to silence the conservative values you and I share. Meanwhile, schools roll out the red carpet for leftists like Angela Davis, Bill Ayers, Barack Obama, Bill Clinton, and Bernie Sanders. At Berkeley, taxpayer-funded school administrators tried to derail my event from even taking place. They told me that they didn't have a lecture hall available, which was a lie. School administrators even cut the venue in half by not allowing students to sit in the balcony--a dirty tactic to minimize attendance. _**The good news is the radical Left 's attempts to silence me completely backfired.**_**** More than 600 students showed up, and we were able to host an engaging and civil event. Then, OVER 10 MILLION PEOPLE watched my speech online (that's more viewers than any of the major evening newscasts). This victory for the Conservative Movement would have never happened if it weren't for the **Young America 's Foundation** **(YAF)**. When Berkeley tried to illegally block me from coming to campus, YAF sued the university --**and won.** But the radicals who rioted and tried to incite violence at Berkeley are relentless. Their stranglehold on America's universities has not yet been broken. **Young America 's Foundation** has been an incredible partner in making sure I am able to share our conservative values with students on campuses across the country. In fact, I speak on campuses **_exclusively_** through YAF because I know YAF has the experience and leadership necessary to run the nation's leading campus lecture program. Today YAF needs your help. **[Will you contribute $35 today to ensure that YAF can continue to present speakers, including Dr. Arthur Laffer, Katie Pavlich, Senator Ted Cruz, and many others to high school and college students? Without you, the mission to pass along our conservative values to future generations will stall out.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58705361:J3d47B2NP:m:1:3298722022:6BFF651D7C49F6E8E12962E9D505D85A:r)** Let me tell you a little bit more about what YAF does to advance conservative ideas. Speaking to an audience of Young America's Foundation students, Vice President Mike Pence noted, "Since its founding in 1960, YAF has been a bulwark of American greatness." YAF valiantly defends the values we share by educating impressionable young people who have been ideologically poisoned by leftist propaganda for decades, by the very teachers and professors they're told to trust. YAF's team is the best at what they do. They are _**#1: the LARGEST and MOST effective conservative youth outreach organization in America**._ Here's why:
* YAF introduces young audiences to the biggest names in the Conservative Movement through their leading campus lecture program. YAF speakers are the most inspiring conservative voices in America, including **Arthur Laffer, Katie Pavlich,** YAF's Ronald Reagan Presidential Scholar and Vice President **Mike Pence, Dinesh D 'Souza, Lila Rose, Steve Forbes, **Lt. Col.**Allen West** , Speaker**Newt Gingrich, Michael Knowles, Dana Loesch, James O 'Keefe, **NFL star and Congressman **Burgess Owens, Star Parker,** Fox News's**Jesse Watters,** and many others.
* YAF teaches **_millions of students_ **across the nation YOUR conservative values through breakthrough conferences, training seminars, and campus activism initiatives and activities. (In fact, YAF is the only Conservative Movement organization that has a full suite of conservative educational programs for high school students!)
* And YAF preserves and protects President Reagan's ranch in Santa Barbara, California and Boyhood Home in Dixon, Illinois. They saved these national treasures so young people can learn about Ronald Reagan's lasting accomplishments.

_No other organization reaches conservative students with foundational American ideas on a bigger scale than Young America 's Foundation._ _That 's why I prefer YAF to be my sole sponsor for campus events._ They fight for the right to ensure alternative voices are heard on college campuses. They stop campuses from being turned into Leftist echo chambers. I am glad I have YAF on my side and the side of the students. But YAF can't do this alone. As the Left continues to stoop to desperate new lows to silence conservatives, it's become more important than ever that our values are shared with the next generation of thought leaders. We both know that the Left doesn't want a fair discussion of ideas. But that's why YAF needs your help today. At any moment, a scheduled event could get shut down by campus radicals or administrators, and the YAF team must be ready to engage them on a moment's notice. [**Will you contribute $35 or more today so that YAF 's rapid response team will always be ready to leap into action the next time leftists decide to shut down free speech and deprive students of the chance to hear your conservative ideas?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58705361:J3d47B2NP:m:1:3298722022:6BFF651D7C49F6E8E12962E9D505D85A:r) Friend, a donation of $35 or whatever you choose does more than you know. The impact amplifying conservative voices will have on the future of our country can't be overstated. I cannot encourage you enough to consider giving to YAF today. Partnering with YAF today is our opportunity to win a generation that values freedom. I can't think of a better investment. Ronald Reagan stated, "There is no better way to establish hope for the future than to enlighten young minds." I look forward to hearing back from you. -Ben Ben Shapiro [**Will you support Young America 's Foundation with a contribution of $35, $50, $100, or even $1000 today, to save this generation by presenting conservative ideas to students across the country?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58705361:J3d47B2NP:m:1:3298722022:6BFF651D7C49F6E8E12962E9D505D85A:r) [**DONATE**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58705361:J3d47B2NP:m:1:3298722022:6BFF651D7C49F6E8E12962E9D505D85A:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58705361:J3d47B2NP:m:1:3298722022:6BFF651D7C49F6E8E12962E9D505D85A:r) | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58705362:J3d47B2NP:m:1:3298722022:6BFF651D7C49F6E8E12962E9D505D85A:r) | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58705363:J3d47B2NP:m:1:3298722022:6BFF651D7C49F6E8E12962E9D505D85A:r) | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58705364:J3d47B2NP:m:1:3298722022:6BFF651D7C49F6E8E12962E9D505D85A:r)
---|---|---
**[www.yaf.org](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58705365:J3d47B2NP:m:1:3298722022:6BFF651D7C49F6E8E12962E9D505D85A:r)**

11480 Commerce Park Dr, 6th Floor
Reston, VA 20191-1556

**[Privacy Policy](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58705366:J3d47B2NP:m:1:3298722022:6BFF651D7C49F6E8E12962E9D505D85A:r) **

Hey Peter,
It’s a new month, and that means a new issue survey from Team Martin!
Our 95 County Tour is still going strong, which means Dr. Martin is getting out into communities, listening to Tennesseans, and learning what matters most to the people he’s running to be a voice for. **But we wanted to make sure you have the opportunity wherever you are to make your voice heard, which is why these surveys are so important.**
Last month, our supporters’ top three issues were:

name: Derek Kilmer
subject: The largest long-lasting investment in our country's infrastructure in a generation:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
It's finally here, Peter: the bipartisan infrastructure bill is headed to President Biden's desk!

It took a long time to get this bill over the finish line. While this bill isn't perfect, it's an amazing start. It's a bill that will put people to work. It's a bill that recognizes that we can't compete in a 21st-century economy with 19th and 20th-century infrastructure. The Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act is the largest long-lasting investment in our country's infrastructure in a generation. With billions of dollars in funding, it will help communities across the country build back better and will lay the foundation for economic growth over the long haul.

This bill is BIG, team. Here are some of the highlights included in the package we passed in the House:
* The largest federal investment in public transportation EVER, with $1.79 billion for Washington state;
* Key funding for climate resilience;
* Funding to rebuild crumbling roads and bridges;
* High-speed internet access for EVERY American, with Washington state promised at least $100 million;
* $39 million to help us fight wildfires across Washington;
* $1 billion for culvert repair and recovery to help protect and recover salmon populations in Washington.

And so much more! I was proud to vote for this bill **because when there 's an opportunity to help the folks I represent you can always count on me to work to get it done. **

But that doesn't mean our work here is complete. Too many folks are struggling to make ends meet and struggling with the cost of health care, child care, prescription drugs, and more. We still need to do so much more to reduce costs for working families, protect our environment, and combat climate change.

As we continue to move forward on this, I won't stop pushing for legislation that meets the moment -- because that's what the American people deserve.

As always, it's an honor to represent you,

Derek

**Derek Kilmer is leading the efforts to reform our democracy and break through the partisan gridlock so that Congress works for the people. Chip in today to support his grassroots campaign.**

clean_body: It's finally here, Peter: the bipartisan infrastructure bill is headed to President Biden's desk! It took a long time to get this bill over the finish line. While this bill isn't perfect, it's an amazing start. It's a bill that will put people to work. It's a bill that recognizes that we can't compete in a 21st-century economy with 19th and 20th-century infrastructure. The Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act is the largest long-lasting investment in our country's infrastructure in a generation. With billions of dollars in funding, it will help communities across the country build back better and will lay the foundation for economic growth over the long haul. This bill is BIG, team. Here are some of the highlights included in the package we passed in the House: The largest federal investment in public transportation EVER, with $1.79 billion for Washington state; Key funding for climate resilience; Funding to rebuild crumbling roads and bridges; High-speed internet access for EVERY American, with Washington state promised at least $100 million; $39 million to help us fight wildfires across Washington; $1 billion for culvert repair and recovery to help protect and recover salmon populations in Washington. And so much more! I was proud to vote for this bill because when there 's an opportunity to help the folks I represent you can always count on me to work to get it done. But that doesn't mean our work here is complete. Too many folks are struggling to make ends meet and struggling with the cost of health care, child care, prescription drugs, and more. We still need to do so much more to reduce costs for working families, protect our environment, and combat climate change. As we continue to move forward on this, I won't stop pushing for legislation that meets the moment -- because that's what the American people deserve. As always, it's an honor to represent you, Derek Derek Kilmer is leading the efforts to reform our democracy and break through the partisan gridlock so that Congress works for the people. Chip in today to support his grassroots campaign. = | = ---|--- Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer People for Derek Kilmer PO Box 1381 Tacoma WA 98402 United States Peter, thank you so much for being a supporter of Derek Kilmer and Democrats up and down the ballot. Our digital program helps us reach folks with the latest updates. But, if you'd rather not hear from our team, please =.

name: Ben Shapiro
subject: 9 Leftists Arrested for Attacking Free Speech
body:
Peter, Insidious leftist ideology has taken hold of our educational system. It's never been more important that we expose it, because the Left has lit an ideological fire, and that fire is now consuming the minds of young Americans, burning itself through the most aspects of American culture and politics. That's why it's of utmost importance that I hear back from you today. I'm no stranger to the authoritarian attitudes on campus; I famously felt the brunt of it when conservative students invited me to speak on the University of California, Berkeley campus. [**HELP US FIGHT THE RADICAL LEFT**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58703871:6RkB3B2sN:m:1:3253819041:BF6EE57A45207CA5CCFBE0269D8B3158:r) Radical leftist groups like Antifa vowed to riot and cause harm to others. The fear of violence from leftist agitators was so great that:
* It cost $600,000 in security expenses and required hundreds of policemen to ensure that agitators didn't disrupt or try to cause violence at my speech.
* The University shut down six buildings on campus during my speech and erected concrete barricades (YES, a wall) to secure the Berkeley campus.
* For the first time in 20 years, the City of Berkeley voted to allow the use of pepper spray against violent protesters.
* In the end, police arrested nine leftists for trying to sneak banned weapons into our event--with the likely intent to do harm.

It's no longer just about the Left trying to suppress your conservative views on campus. It's about using the threat of violence to silence the conservative values you and I share. Meanwhile, schools roll out the red carpet for leftists like Angela Davis, Bill Ayers, Barack Obama, Bill Clinton, and Bernie Sanders. At Berkeley, taxpayer-funded school administrators tried to derail my event from even taking place. They told me that they didn't have a lecture hall available, which was a lie. School administrators even cut the venue in half by not allowing students to sit in the balcony--a dirty tactic to minimize attendance. _**The good news is the radical Left 's attempts to silence me completely backfired.**_**** More than 600 students showed up, and we were able to host an engaging and civil event. Then, OVER 10 MILLION PEOPLE watched my speech online (that's more viewers than any of the major evening newscasts). This victory for the Conservative Movement would have never happened if it weren't for the **Young America 's Foundation** **(YAF)**. When Berkeley tried to illegally block me from coming to campus, YAF sued the university --**and won.** But the radicals who rioted and tried to incite violence at Berkeley are relentless. Their stranglehold on America's universities has not yet been broken. **Young America 's Foundation** has been an incredible partner in making sure I am able to share our conservative values with students on campuses across the country. In fact, I speak on campuses **_exclusively_** through YAF because I know YAF has the experience and leadership necessary to run the nation's leading campus lecture program. Today YAF needs your help. **[Will you contribute $35 today to ensure that YAF can continue to present speakers, including Dr. Arthur Laffer, Katie Pavlich, Senator Ted Cruz, and many others to high school and college students? Without you, the mission to pass along our conservative values to future generations will stall out.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58703871:6RkB3B2sN:m:1:3253819041:BF6EE57A45207CA5CCFBE0269D8B3158:r)** Let me tell you a little bit more about what YAF does to advance conservative ideas. Speaking to an audience of Young America's Foundation students, Vice President Mike Pence noted, "Since its founding in 1960, YAF has been a bulwark of American greatness." YAF valiantly defends the values we share by educating impressionable young people who have been ideologically poisoned by leftist propaganda for decades, by the very teachers and professors they're told to trust. YAF's team is the best at what they do. They are _**#1: the LARGEST and MOST effective conservative youth outreach organization in America**._ Here's why:
* YAF introduces young audiences to the biggest names in the Conservative Movement through their leading campus lecture program. YAF speakers are the most inspiring conservative voices in America, including **Arthur Laffer, Katie Pavlich,** YAF's Ronald Reagan Presidential Scholar and Vice President **Mike Pence, Dinesh D 'Souza, Lila Rose, Steve Forbes, **Lt. Col.**Allen West** , Speaker**Newt Gingrich, Michael Knowles, Dana Loesch, James O 'Keefe, **NFL star and Congressman **Burgess Owens, Star Parker,** Fox News's**Jesse Watters,** and many others.
* YAF teaches **_millions of students_ **across the nation YOUR conservative values through breakthrough conferences, training seminars, and campus activism initiatives and activities. (In fact, YAF is the only Conservative Movement organization that has a full suite of conservative educational programs for high school students!)
* And YAF preserves and protects President Reagan's ranch in Santa Barbara, California and Boyhood Home in Dixon, Illinois. They saved these national treasures so young people can learn about Ronald Reagan's lasting accomplishments.

_No other organization reaches conservative students with foundational American ideas on a bigger scale than Young America 's Foundation._ _That 's why I prefer YAF to be my sole sponsor for campus events._ They fight for the right to ensure alternative voices are heard on college campuses. They stop campuses from being turned into Leftist echo chambers. I am glad I have YAF on my side and the side of the students. But YAF can't do this alone. As the Left continues to stoop to desperate new lows to silence conservatives, it's become more important than ever that our values are shared with the next generation of thought leaders. We both know that the Left doesn't want a fair discussion of ideas. But that's why YAF needs your help today. At any moment, a scheduled event could get shut down by campus radicals or administrators, and the YAF team must be ready to engage them on a moment's notice. [**Will you contribute $35 or more today so that YAF 's rapid response team will always be ready to leap into action the next time leftists decide to shut down free speech and deprive students of the chance to hear your conservative ideas?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58703871:6RkB3B2sN:m:1:3253819041:BF6EE57A45207CA5CCFBE0269D8B3158:r) Friend, a donation of $35 or whatever you choose does more than you know. The impact amplifying conservative voices will have on the future of our country can't be overstated. I cannot encourage you enough to consider giving to YAF today. Partnering with YAF today is our opportunity to win a generation that values freedom. I can't think of a better investment. Ronald Reagan stated, "There is no better way to establish hope for the future than to enlighten young minds." I look forward to hearing back from you. -Ben Ben Shapiro [**Will you support Young America 's Foundation with a contribution of $35, $50, $100, or even $1000 today, to save this generation by presenting conservative ideas to students across the country?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58703871:6RkB3B2sN:m:1:3253819041:BF6EE57A45207CA5CCFBE0269D8B3158:r) [**DONATE**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58703871:6RkB3B2sN:m:1:3253819041:BF6EE57A45207CA5CCFBE0269D8B3158:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58703871:6RkB3B2sN:m:1:3253819041:BF6EE57A45207CA5CCFBE0269D8B3158:r) | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58703872:6RkB3B2sN:m:1:3253819041:BF6EE57A45207CA5CCFBE0269D8B3158:r) | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58703873:6RkB3B2sN:m:1:3253819041:BF6EE57A45207CA5CCFBE0269D8B3158:r) | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58703874:6RkB3B2sN:m:1:3253819041:BF6EE57A45207CA5CCFBE0269D8B3158:r)
---|---|---

11480 Commerce Park Dr, 6th Floor
Reston, VA 20191-1556

**[Privacy Policy](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58703876:6RkB3B2sN:m:1:3253819041:BF6EE57A45207CA5CCFBE0269D8B3158:r) **

[**I was able to extend your deadline to respond for just 10 more minutes. Can you take a moment to answer?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58705799:6Cm4JB2JN:m:1:3298722022:FFDDA4802F28FB690D5F44CE0A2669F9:r)

Subject: quick question for you_
Hey there,
My name is Sarah. I'm reaching out on behalf of Republican HQ with one quick research question.
According to our records you are one of our most reliable Conservative supporters so I have to ask, will you pledge to join President Donald J. Trump's brand new social media site? Almost every single Conservative we asked said they would join in a heartbeat... _But I just checked our re cords -- why haven't you responded? Would you join Trump's site?_
**Please choose one of the following options in the next 25 minutes:**
**[Yes. I Stand With Trump ->](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58705799:6Cm4JB2JN:m:1:3298722022:FFDDA4802F28FB690D5F44CE0A2669F9:r)**
**[No. I Don 't Support Trump ->](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58705799:6Cm4JB2JN:m:1:3298722022:FFDDA4802F28FB690D5F44CE0A2669F9:r)**
President Trump promised some incredible things for his new site:
\-- NO blacklists
\-- NO shadow-banning
\-- NO Conservative censorship
**This site is built BY freedom-loving Patriots FOR freedom-loving Patriots.**
But taking on the Silicon Valley Liberals is a MONUMENTAL task. President Trump needs to know who really has his back, and who no longer supports him...
[**So would you join? I would really appreciate it if you answered right away.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58705799:6Cm4JB2JN:m:1:3298722022:FFDDA4802F28FB690D5F44CE0A2669F9:r)
Thanks in advance for your response.

name: Nikki Fried
subject: Three years ago today, we made history
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
Dear Friends,

Three years ago today, I was on the ballot for the first time, and people underestimated me. No one thought that a Jewish Democratic woman from Miami was going to become Florida’s Commissioner of Agriculture.

We proved them wrong, and I became the only Democrat to win statewide in Florida since 2012. Next year, we’re going to do it again.

We won in 2018 by traveling to every corner of Florida--not just the big Democratic counties or classic battlegrounds.

We’ve been to the reddest and bluest parts of Florida already in this campaign, but I need your help to build our movement. Can you chip in today to help us win next year? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-nov-21?refcode=1106anniversary]

Since we made our first big wave in 2018, I’ve been fighting for you every day.

While we’ve fought back against the worst policies Florida Republicans have to offer, we’ve also accomplished so much. During the pandemic, we delivered 74 million meals to students and families. We’ve legalized hemp. We’ve protected farmworkers from COVID. We’ve protected our water and our environment.

Three year ago today, we made history in Florida. Next year, we’re going to do it again by electing our state’s first woman governor ever and first Democratic governor since 1999.

I hope you’re with us, because we’re going to continue delivering real change for Floridians when I’m governor. Help us build this historic campaign by making a donation today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-nov-21?refcode=1106anniversary]

Thanks for fighting with me.

Nikki

Political advertisement paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
Nikki Fried for Governor
6619 S Dixie Hwy
No. 148
Miami, FL 33143
United States

name: Eric Gash
subject: My mother
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Gash for Congress
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38365229/315113471/-851526706?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDg3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NTdkNjI1My0xNDNmLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yVo2Q8n7iyoWxQDz5C4C7TpZFNgIyHYAkOYROhPaKVU=)
**[Friend, this is a long email about my mom. I hope you'll take a moment to read the entire message, then consider donating $3 to support my campaign to improve the lives of working mothers in Western North Carolina and across this country.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38365230/315113472/1573898945?refcode=em-11621-nopen-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDg3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NTdkNjI1My0xNDNmLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yVo2Q8n7iyoWxQDz5C4C7TpZFNgIyHYAkOYROhPaKVU=)**

Things were tough growing up.

My dad was an alcoholic with an abusive streak.

At the age of 12, I considered taking my own life.

But I had the two beings who kept me safe: God and my mother.

My mom is a pillar of strength, and raised me with _mountain values._ She taught us resilience, and the importance of maintaining the heart of a servant.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38365231/315113473/1573898945?refcode=em-11621-nopen-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDg3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NTdkNjI1My0xNDNmLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yVo2Q8n7iyoWxQDz5C4C7TpZFNgIyHYAkOYROhPaKVU=)
_Me, my mom, and my brother Sam._
Mom's lessons are why I became a pastor to help folks struggling to get by. She's also why I became a teacher, football coach, and school principal to mentor kids who grew up like my brother and me.

**I've seen firsthand how working families are being left behind by extremists who would rather divide us than fight for education, economic relief, and health care access. Count my opponent Madison Cawthorn among the worst culprits.**

**[We can defeat Cawthorn, friend, but only with help from thousands of grassroots donors across the country. I'm humbly asking you to chip in $3 before midnight to flip NC-11 from red to blue.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38365232/315113474/1573898945?refcode=em-11621-nopen-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDg3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NTdkNjI1My0xNDNmLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yVo2Q8n7iyoWxQDz5C4C7TpZFNgIyHYAkOYROhPaKVU=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $10 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38365233/315113475/1573898945?refcode=em-11621-nopen-a&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDg3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NTdkNjI1My0xNDNmLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yVo2Q8n7iyoWxQDz5C4C7TpZFNgIyHYAkOYROhPaKVU=)

clean_body: | = = Things were tough growing up. My dad was an alcoholic with an abusive streak. At the age of 12, I considered taking my own life. But I had the two beings who kept me safe: God and my mother. My mom is a pillar of strength, and raised me with mountain values. She taught us resilience, and the importance of maintaining the heart of a servant. = Me, my mom, and my brother Sam. Mom's lessons are why I became a pastor to help folks struggling to get by. She's also why I became a teacher, football coach, and school principal to mentor kids who grew up like my brother and me. I've seen firsthand how working families are being left behind by extremists who would rather divide us than fight for education, economic relief, and health care access. Count my opponent Madison Cawthorn among the worst culprits. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = I'll be honest: I never considered myself an activist. Hi folks, Sean Patrick Maloney here, chairman of the Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee.

We are one year out from Election Day, and the GOP has their sights set on flipping Tom Malinowski’s seat in the 2022 election.

**That’s why I’m asking you to join me in supporting Tom’s re-election campaign. His seat is one of the most vulnerable in the country, and the GOP is already pulling out all the stops to ensure he doesn’t win in 2022.**

name: Marco Rubio
subject: Solidify your name in history
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
, I want you to be a part of history.
|
---
| | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58706019:JPxAPB2N-:m:1:3299561967:B4AC0482EBA5712D1AC21640FC9C98D1:r "Graphic")
---
| | | [JOIN THE TEAM](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58706019:JPxAPB2N-:m:1:3299561967:B4AC0482EBA5712D1AC21640FC9C98D1:r "JOIN THE TEAM")
---
, I want you to be a part of history.

The race in Florida is swiftly becoming everything CNN and Fox News predicted it would be: expensive, competitive, cutting edge, gritty, and confrontational.

My opponent, backed by the biggest Liberals in the country, is feverishly attacking Conservatives in Florida in an effort to flip one of the most conservative strongholds in the country. She managed the sham impeachment of President Trump, she consistently votes against conservative values, and has aligned herself with the likes of those who equate the GOP to the Taliban. Needless to say, my opponent is NOT on your side.

This is difficult for me to write because I truly don't understand how there is more support for a Trump Impeachment Manager than for a strong Conservative leader.

We are on the brink of losing Trump's home state to someone who votes with AOC's Socialist Squad 94% of the time. I hope you understand how deeply concerning that is.
_**This race will be historic. We are going to make history down here in Florida and I really want you to be a part of it.**_
Today I'm asking you to sign up for a monthly donation of $14...lock in your place in history. I need to know I can count on you every single month to compete with the Democrats. The process is simple and you can cancel at any time through our fundraising platform.

---
| | | [YES, MARCO, I'M IN FOR $14 A MONTH >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58706020:JPxAPB2N-:m:1:3299561967:B4AC0482EBA5712D1AC21640FC9C98D1:r "YES, MARCO, I'M IN FOR $14 A MONTH
>>")
---

Yes, donating one, two, even three times helps us tremendously. These donations help fund emergency advertisements, open field offices, and contact Floridians directly \-- this is vital to our effort. Here's where my strategy team is running into problems: we can't plan or budget for the future because we don't know when donations will come in. It takes about a month to launch a field office, but it takes even longer when we don't know if we'll have the money for it.

This is why it's so critical that I have you locked in every month.

Here is a secure link my team created for you. I hope to see your name on the donor list and I appreciate your time:
**[http://secure.winred.com/marco-rubio-for-senate/be-part-of-history/link-for-](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58706019:JPxAPB2N-:m:1:3299561967:B4AC0482EBA5712D1AC21640FC9C98D1:r "http://secure.winred.com/marco-rubio-for-senate/be-part-of-history/link-for-")**
God bless,
Marco

---

* * *

| _Personal note from Marco Rubio:_

, thank you for standing with me and having my back every step of the way. But I need you to stand with me once again.

Fox News said my race could be the most expensive ever, CNN said my race was even MORE likely to flip blue, and now my opponent has outraised me. I need each and every patriot who receives this to join me in the fight to take back the Senate.

If you stand with me, **[please click here to donate now](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58706021:JPxAPB2N-:m:1:3299561967:B4AC0482EBA5712D1AC21640FC9C98D1:r "please click here to donate now")**.

Thank you for everything you do,

Marco Rubio
