clean_body: , I want you to be a part of history. | | | | | "Graphic" | | | "JOIN THE TEAM" , I want you to be a part of history. The race in Florida is swiftly becoming everything CNN and Fox News predicted it would be: expensive, competitive, cutting edge, gritty, and confrontational. My opponent, backed by the biggest Liberals in the country, is feverishly attacking Conservatives in Florida in an effort to flip one of the most conservative strongholds in the country. She managed the sham impeachment of President Trump, she consistently votes against conservative values, and has aligned herself with the likes of those who equate the GOP to the Taliban. Needless to say, my opponent is NOT on your side. This is difficult for me to write because I truly don't understand how there is more support for a Trump Impeachment Manager than for a strong Conservative leader. We are on the brink of losing Trump's home state to someone who votes with AOC's Socialist Squad 94% of the time. I hope you understand how deeply concerning that is. This race will be historic. We are going to make history down here in Florida and I really want you to be a part of it. Today I'm asking you to sign up for a monthly donation of $14...lock in your place in history. I need to know I can count on you every single month to compete with the Democrats. The process is simple and you can cancel at any time through our fundraising platform. | | | "YES, MARCO, I'M IN FOR $14 A MONTH >" Yes, donating one, two, even three times helps us tremendously. These donations help fund emergency advertisements, open field offices, and contact Floridians directly \-- this is vital to our effort. Here's where my strategy team is running into problems: we can't plan or budget for the future because we don't know when donations will come in. It takes about a month to launch a field office, but it takes even longer when we don't know if we'll have the money for it. This is why it's so critical that I have you locked in every month. Here is a secure link my team created for you. I hope to see your name on the donor list and I appreciate your time: "-" God bless, Marco | | | | "MarcoRubioFooter" | Personal note from Marco Rubio: , thank you for standing with me and having my back every step of the way. I need each and every patriot who receives this to join me in the fight to take back the Senate. If you stand with me, "please click here to donate now"**. name: Mark Warner
subject: Huge news on infrastructure
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
This is one of the most significant investments in the American people in our history.

|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38365901/315117294/1995090618?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OWZiNmRlZi0xODNmLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=w9c-XeTwoSRF_KSSZcdODPzSF55FeUkqk1AgeYu_YS0=&emci=cedef924-143f-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=79fb6def-183f-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=4568237)

| | Derek,

After a tough week here in Virginia, I want to share some great news from Capitol Hill: We are on the verge of enacting one of the most significant investments in the American people in our history. The House just voted on a once-in-a-generation investment in our nation’s infrastructure that I helped negotiate over the past few months. That bill now heads to President Biden’s desk. [**Remember Derek, while it took a lot of hard work to get here, none of this would be possible without our Democratic majority. Make a $5 contribution right now to protect Democrats in battleground states and keep up our progress.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38365902/315117295/1846801484?refcode=mw_em_211101_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OWZiNmRlZi0xODNmLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=w9c-XeTwoSRF_KSSZcdODPzSF55FeUkqk1AgeYu_YS0=) This new investment in our infrastructure will help us fix roads and bridges, expand broadband, and improve ports and airports -- and it will put Virginians to work in the process. Friends --

We are ecstatic! Late last night, House Democrats passed President Biden’s infrastructure plan.

This historic bill is a once-in-a-generation investment to overhaul our nation’s infrastructure. Here is what it will do for our country:
* It means better roads and bridges for our country, many of which are currently in poor condition.
* More investments in public transit, making it easier to get around our country.
* Getting rid of lead pipes that are making our children sick.
* High-speed internet access for every American.
* A big step to address the climate crisis.
* And 700,000 more jobs a year to make this all happen.

This bill is one of the most significant investments in our country’s infrastructure. It’s a true testament of what we can do when we elect more Democrats to Congress and protect our majority.

That’s why we need to make sure that Brad Pfaff wins this race, protects this seat, and saves the Democratic House majority. But we can’t do that without you.

https://www.everyaction.com/ [https://www.everyaction.com/]
Dear Peter,
I'm Holly McCormack and today I'm announcing my candidacy against Marjorie Taylor Greene for Georgia's 14th Congressional District. We are kicking off our campaign today by reaching out to you because we need your support. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc]
I am a mother, small businesswoman, and a community activist. I have lived in this District most of my life and the issues our residents are facing are not addressed with conspiracy theories.
Rush a donation today:
$5.00 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc] $50.00 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc] $10.00 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc] $75.00 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc] $25.00 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc] $100.00 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc] https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=vvydox3IxDY [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=vvydox3IxDY]Northwest Georgia is currently represented by someone who parachuted into the District just before the election because she thought it would be an easy win. She likes to make noise and fuel hate while ignoring the needs of those who actually live in our District. That is not who we are ! We need someone from our community who knows our struggles and who can stand up for us to get things done in Congress.
We need a leader who has values and empathy for everyone in her District, not just those with the loudest voices. Let's cut through the noise and get to work.
Check out our Website [http://www.hollyforcongress.org/] , Twitter [https://twitter.com/Holly_4Congress] , and Facebook [https://www.facebook.com/HollyForCongress/] . We have a tough road ahead of us but with your help we can fire Marjorie. Donate $50 today and help me take Northwest Georgia back. I couldn’t do it without you. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc]
In solidarity,
Holly McCormack
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc] Join the #MackPack [http://www.hollyforcongress.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/HollyForCongress/ [https://www.facebook.com/HollyForCongress/] https://twitter.com/Holly_4Congress [https://twitter.com/Holly_4Congress] https://www.instagram.com/hollyforcongress/ [https://www.instagram.com/hollyforcongress/] https://www.hollyforcongress.org [https://www.hollyforcongress.org]

Ringgold, GA 30736

name: Tim Ryan
subject: re: Ohio’s open Senate seat
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
| | |
---
Hello, In a minute, I’ll ask you to split a critical donation between Maggie Hassan's and my campaign to flip Ohio’s open Senate seat blue. **But first, let me explain why this race — and your donation — are so important today.** Protecting our Democratic Senate majority is not enough. If we want to stop Mitch McConnell from abusing the filibuster, we must expand our Senate majority. And flipping Ohio’s open Senate seat is our best chance to do just that. **A new poll shows this race in a dead heat. And Senator Sherrod Brown has endorsed our campaign because he knows we can win. Now all we need is you.** **[Whether or not we can flip this seat depends on you. We need the resources right now — not next year — to build the team it’ll take to win. Will you split a donation of $10 or more to help us flip Ohio blue and expand the Democratic Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38367067/315124764/847177310?refcode=e20211105_tr-lme&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZWVhNWMwMi0xZDNmLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=D96phGz1EiMWUiGFODYrGM7wJEQ3tBXb0eriSWakiLM=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [Contribute $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38367068/315124765/847177310?refcode=e20211105_tr-lme-el&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZWVhNWMwMi0xZDNmLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=D96phGz1EiMWUiGFODYrGM7wJEQ3tBXb0eriSWakiLM=)

[Contribute $50](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38367070/315124767/847177310?refcode=e20211105_tr-lme-el&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=50&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZWVhNWMwMi0xZDNmLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=D96phGz1EiMWUiGFODYrGM7wJEQ3tBXb0eriSWakiLM=)
[Another amount](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38367071/315124768/847177310?refcode=e20211105_tr-lme-el&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZWVhNWMwMi0xZDNmLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=D96phGz1EiMWUiGFODYrGM7wJEQ3tBXb0eriSWakiLM=)
Donald Trump has made this race his top target. That’s why he attacked me during his first rally since losing the election. **It’s clear we’ve got the GOP running scared.**
All of my GOP opponents are wealthy businesspeople with endless supplies of cash to fund their campaigns. Billionaire tech giant Peter Thiel has propped up JD Vance with a $10 million super PAC. And Josh Mandel is a dangerous Trump-wannabe with his own share of Twitter rants.
Me? I’ve been on picket lines and in union halls my whole life. I’m still paying off my family’s student loans and mortgage. I’m fighting like hell to cut workers in on the deal — not prop up my wealthy friends and right-wing special interests.
**Folks, I believe we can win this race. CNN ranks us as one of the most likely seats to flip. But this is on track to be one of the most competitive and expensive races of 2022. So, I’m turning to you:**
**[We’ll need a surge of grassroots support to take on the GOP and come out on top. Please, split a donation today to help us win this critical race. Anything you can chip in makes a difference.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38367072/315124769/847177310?refcode=e20211105_tr-lme&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZWVhNWMwMi0xZDNmLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=D96phGz1EiMWUiGFODYrGM7wJEQ3tBXb0eriSWakiLM=)**

name: Jim Jordan
subject: Note for you Peter: Regarding my re-election campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
RINOs and special interests in Ohio's state capital are attempting to draw me out of a congressional district! Don't want to receive our emails? [Unsubscribe here.]({{unsubscribeUrl}})

| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58706330:6B-HMB2ZN:m:1:3298722022:6B97508E85BC2BF6C5BC3D9F80D0ED8D:r)
---

Peter,

They tried it when I stood up to former Speaker John Boehner, and now they're trying it again.

RINOs and special interests in Ohio's state capital are attempting to draw me out of a congressional district!

The gerrymandered map was just released this week, and it draws my home into a district halfway across the state...**a district that currently favors Democrats by 19 percentage points.**

**[I'm emailing today because I need your help to fight back against this political hit job.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58706330:6B-HMB2ZN:m:1:3298722022:6B97508E85BC2BF6C5BC3D9F80D0ED8D:r)** The political bosses in Ohio are trying to keep me out of Congress because they know I won't go along with the status quo, and as long as I'm in office - I'll continue to be a thorn in the side of anyone OF EITHER PARTY who try to trample on our individual liberties.

**[I'm personally asking you to make a contribution to my re-election campaign today to help me return to Congress. ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58706330:6B-HMB2ZN:m:1:3298722022:6B97508E85BC2BF6C5BC3D9F80D0ED8D:r)**

[** HELP ME RETURN TO CONGRESS
CHIP IN TODAY->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58706330:6B-HMB2ZN:m:1:3298722022:6B97508E85BC2BF6C5BC3D9F80D0ED8D:r)
**[Your donation,](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58706330:6B-HMB2ZN:m:1:3298722022:6B97508E85BC2BF6C5BC3D9F80D0ED8D:r)** whether it be large or small, will help ensure I'm able to continue holding the Washington swamp accountable both today and over the coming years.

My message to special interest insiders and political operatives alike is this: GAME ON! I will never be silenced for doing my job.

I'm not done fighting on your behalf. There is still so much work to be done to hold Democrats and Republicans in Washington accountable for reckless spending and the ongoing efforts to transform our nation into a socialist republic.

Let me be clear: I'm a target of the swamp because I will always stand up for our individual liberties; I'll never back down.

No matter what congressional map they enact, I am running for re-election to Congress. President Biden and Nancy Pelosi have demonstrated that we really are just one election away from losing everything our founding fathers built.

**[I need your help now more than ever. I'm not done fighting for you. Please send whatever you can to my campaign today to help me continue my fight on your behalf.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58706330:6B-HMB2ZN:m:1:3298722022:6B97508E85BC2BF6C5BC3D9F80D0ED8D:r)**

Every day, Biden and Pelosi are working to undermine the foundations of our society by:
* Forcing critical race theory into our schools.
* Pushing Americans out of work with vaccine mandates, supply shortages, high gas prices and inflation induced job cuts.
* Inviting illegal immigrants into the country and then PAYING THEM TO STAY.

That doesn't change the fact that my path to re-election just got a lot tougher. I know I can win, but I also know that **[I need your help now more than I ever have before.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58706330:6B-HMB2ZN:m:1:3298722022:6B97508E85BC2BF6C5BC3D9F80D0ED8D:r)**

You know how high the stakes are for the future of our country. And we both see the great momentum we are building with victories in Virginia and throughout the country.

I'm asking you to show your support for stopping the Biden/Pelosi agenda and helping take back the House for the people!

For Liberty,
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58706330:6B-HMB2ZN:m:1:3298722022:6B97508E85BC2BF6C5BC3D9F80D0ED8D:r)
Jim

**[I wanted to share a story about my step-father and how he shaped my values. I hope you’ll take a moment to read the entire email, then consider a $3 donation to support my campaign for working families across Montana and the country.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38367094/315124957/102973118?refcode=em-11621-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjg3MDY2Ni0xZDNmLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kb5zBoTHcuOvzRySfz2hTwFVWxfalF5k5w_J3R5FkP8=)**

_My stepdad (left) constructing an MSU building back in 1986._
I'm running for Congress for working parents like mine.

When I was just an infant, I lost my father in a lumber mill accident because his company cut corners on safety.

Later on, I watched my step-dad commute from Bozeman to Great Falls to find a good job to support our family.

Times were tough, and through it all, my mom and step-dad taught us the importance of Montana values -- hard work and caring for one another.

**But the reality is that the struggles we faced decades ago are still the norm for too many in Montana.**

Our economy is booming, but growth is uneven. Working families lack high-wage jobs that can pay the bills. Grocery prices and home values are going up, and too many Montanans are unsure they can afford to stay.

Montanans deserve a representative who understands these issues. We can't expect change if we elect politicians like Ryan Zinke who only show up when it’s convenient and at the behest of corporate donors and special interests. I’m running for Congress to make sure that no one has to go through what my family did.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Douglas=20Carswell?=
subject: Virginia Victory for School Freedom – update from the Mississippi Center for Public Policy
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/progressupdate-8130988?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
|
Dear Friend,

In Virginia this week, conservatives won state-wide elections for the first time in twelve years. Why? A big part of the reason was school choice.

The conservative candidates in the contest came out strongly in favor of school choice, which proved to be pretty popular. Having been behind in the polls for months, once the conservatives made school choice the centerpiece of their campaign, they stormed ahead.

Here in Mississippi conservatives have been banging on about school choice for as long as anyone can remember. The reality is that we still have surprisingly little to show for it.

Besides a handful of Charter Schools in Mississippi, what has really changed? **Many families in our state have more choice over where they buy their groceries that they do over the public education that their children get.**
---
|
---
| Charter Schools are wonderful. They are a brilliant way of giving lots of kids opportunities that previously only rich people had. **Charter schools have an extraordinary record elevating education standards and ensuring young Americans from every background get a great start in life.**

**The trouble is there just aren’t enough of them.**

Rather than put all of the school choice eggs into the Charter School basket, conservatives need to find additional ways of giving parents power. That means advocating for a comprehensive school freedom program, including open enrolment.

Rather than picking fights with teachers, we need to make it clear that we want a better deal for teachers – if not necessarily for their union bosses.

**Since 1992, the amount of funding spent per pupil in our state grew by 54%. Teacher pay, however, rose a mere 2%. We want reform so that more of the money goes into the classroom, not on the kind of fat cat administration salaries that we have seen.**

Virginia shows that this kind of conservatism is popular. Here at the Mississippi Center for Public Policy we are producing specific proposals to show how it can be done.

---
| |
---

Warm Regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO

**Ps. The Mississippi Justice Institute just sued the Biden administration over their vaccine mandates! [Click here to read about why we are taking legal action against DC!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=f19dbdf450&e=5703353baa)**

body:
| | [_**I'm about to ask you for $15 to become Maryland’s next Governor. But first, please allow me to explain what’s at stake. >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38367719/315129462/-711004501?refcode=20211106_em_fr_b1_moore_30_rs&amount=15&amounts=25,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NTY0MzJmZC0yMjNmLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9ReU1qA3wkkKEvDCdlvrNPXHiN4KsJVvV3aASoCBepc=) I’ve held many titles throughout my life. Soldier. Small Business Owner. Nonprofit CEO. And hopefully, soon -- Governor. [**But first and foremost, I’m “Dad” to these two beautiful kids.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38367721/315129466/-711004501?refcode=20211106_em_fr_b1_moore_30_rs&amount=15&amounts=25,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NTY0MzJmZC0yMjNmLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9ReU1qA3wkkKEvDCdlvrNPXHiN4KsJVvV3aASoCBepc=) | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38367723/315129467/-711004501?refcode=20211106_em_fr_b1_moore_30_rs&amount=15&amounts=25,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NTY0MzJmZC0yMjNmLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9ReU1qA3wkkKEvDCdlvrNPXHiN4KsJVvV3aASoCBepc=)
---

My greatest mission is for my kids to grow up in a world that is better, more just, and filled with more opportunity than mine was.

If you’re a parent, I have no doubt you feel exactly the same way.

And frankly, I refuse to sit by and do nothing knowing that here in Maryland, we have some of the country’s best schools -- and also the most underfunded.

I refuse to settle for a system that too often defines our kids’ future by their zip code, their economic class, or their skin color.

I believe every kid should have the opportunity to succeed, no matter what circumstances they’re born into.

[**That’s exactly why I’m running for Governor to expand economic opportunity across Maryland.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38367727/315129468/-711004501?refcode=20211106_em_fr_b1_moore_30_rs&amount=15&amounts=25,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NTY0MzJmZC0yMjNmLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9ReU1qA3wkkKEvDCdlvrNPXHiN4KsJVvV3aASoCBepc=)

[_**I’m running for my family, and yours. I’m fighting for your family as though it were my own. But I can’t do it alone. I set an ambitious goal to raise 354 gifts before midnight. It would mean so much if I could count on your $15 >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38367728/315129470/-711004501?refcode=20211106_em_fr_b1_moore_30_rs&amount=15&amounts=25,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NTY0MzJmZC0yMjNmLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9ReU1qA3wkkKEvDCdlvrNPXHiN4KsJVvV3aASoCBepc=)

I don’t like asking for money, but this isn’t about me.

It’s about doing everything in my power to win this race and create a better future for our kids.

That means I need to plug every budget gap, fund every corner of this campaign, and give our vision the chance it deserves to succeed.

I hope I can count on your $15 before midnight tonight:

clean_body: | | = I’ve held many titles throughout my life. Soldier. Small Business Owner. Nonprofit CEO. And hopefully, soon -- Governor. = | = My greatest mission is for my kids to grow up in a world that is better, more just, and filled with more opportunity than mine was. If you’re a parent, I have no doubt you feel exactly the same way. And frankly, I refuse to sit by and do nothing knowing that here in Maryland, we have some of the country’s best schools -- and also the most underfunded. I refuse to settle for a system that too often defines our kids’ future by their zip code, their economic class, or their skin color. I believe every kid should have the opportunity to succeed, no matter what circumstances they’re born into. = = I don’t like asking for money, but this isn’t about me. It’s about doing everything in my power to win this race and create a better future for our kids. That means I need to plug every budget gap, fund every corner of this campaign, and give our vision the chance it deserves to succeed. I hope I can count on your $15 before midnight tonight: | = = = = = Thank you for allowing me the opportunity to share my story and earn your support. body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38367884/315129722/721416609?refcode=header&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NzY0MzJmZC0yMjNmLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Bva8yB1pMxhgT39exMxerFA4UQDra8Io1_mcFBCYyfo=)
Team, When I first began serving Colorado, I was called the “accidental senator.” But after putting my head down, doing the work, and securing wins for the people of Colorado, winning re-election was no accident. But it was only possible because of you. This team pitched in to build the infrastructure required to win. You might be surprised to hear this, but a large portion of our budget comes from grassroots contributions to emails just like this one. **And, I’m the only Democratic Senator running for re-election that’s refusing to accept a single cent of corporate PAC and federal lobbyist money because I believe fighting to undo the influence of money in politics means leading by example.** From day one, this team has been fueled by hard-working folks chipping in what they could for a movement we all believe in. There will never be a question of who I work for — that answer will always be you. But to win this race and keep Colorado blue, our campaign has to reach and mobilize voters across the state while battling attacks from Mitch McConnell and dark money groups. It’s expensive work with the National GOP raking in millions and wealthy self-funded opponents launching attack ads against me, we can’t rest for a moment. **So will you pitch in just $10 today? From day one, this team has been fueled by hard-working folks chipping in what they could for a movement we all believe in. There will never be a question of who I work for — that answer will always be you. But to win this race and keep Colorado blue, our campaign has to reach and mobilize voters across the state while battling attacks from Mitch McConnell and dark money groups. It’s expensive work with the National GOP raking in millions and wealthy self-funded opponents launching attack ads against me, we can’t rest for a moment. So will you pitch in just $10 today? Any amount will make a difference. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: ** | | | = ** | **= | | = ** | **= | | = ** | **= Thanks to the hard work of this team, we’re on track to cut child poverty nearly in half, have restored Bears Ears National Monument, and secured billions for Colorado’s infrastructure. I look forward to building on this progress but can only do that if we work together to fend off Republican attacks and win re-election next year. Thanks for all your help. I couldn’t do this without you. — Michael Bennet for Colorado PO Box 3078 Denver, CO 80201 United States | mailto:info@michaelbennet.com | Paid for by Bennet for Colorado ** By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

name: Max Steiner
subject: Something you might not know about me
body:
It's really important to me that we connect with everyone, especially those who may be written off by the political establishment. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38368708/315133673/390307162?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZTkxNTIxNS0yNTNmLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MkU7KZcuvpNhDv9Dc-wlGQkSG1c2B7l6BnifhPANub8=)
Friend,

The Department of State trains Foreign Service Officers in a foreign language before they're assigned overseas. I spent six months studying Spanish before working in Honduras on agricultural issues for two years. And I spent another two years in Tijuana, Mexico processing visas for Mexican tourists, students, and workers.

It took me five years of practice to get as close to fluent as possible, and I'll be the first to admit I still don't know all the specialized terminology -- especially as it relates to elections. That said, I was pretty thrilled to host a campaign event entirely in Spanish with a group of Spanish speakers earlier this month!

Friend, it's important to reiterate that I'm not running a conventional campaign. It's really important to me that we connect with everyone, especially those who may be written off by the political establishment.

**LaMalfa has ignored this community, that’s why I’ve made it a point to give people the time of day -- especially if they speak a different language. That's what this campaign is all about, and I hope you see the value of investing in an approach that doesn't take voters for granted.**

**[With that in mind, will you chip in $3 today so I can keep traveling the district and meeting with voters? The more people I'm able to meet, the more voters we are able to engage. Doing this takes time and resources, and we're coming up $6,877 short of our weekly goal.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38368709/315133674/-209993060?refcode=em-11621-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZTkxNTIxNS0yNTNmLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MkU7KZcuvpNhDv9Dc-wlGQkSG1c2B7l6BnifhPANub8=)**

Thanks in advance,

Max Steiner
Veteran (and Spanish-speaker) Congress

| **[Contribute »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38368710/315133675/-209993060?refcode=em-11621-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZTkxNTIxNS0yNTNmLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MkU7KZcuvpNhDv9Dc-wlGQkSG1c2B7l6BnifhPANub8=)**

name: Mark Takano
subject: I was publicly outed as gay by my Republican opponent
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P
body:
In the face of such discriminatory attacks, I didn’t give up.

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38368861/315134596/-2042826227?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZjg2NGYyZi0yNzNmLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=U44fExfCypUUzSFdIuboyOdwIgaAp-5uEWmvGFjV8Mw=)
---
Peter,

I want to be vulnerable with you for a moment and share my personal painful story about my coming out experience.

**In 1994, my Republican opponent outed me as gay with bigoted and homophobic ads to our district. I hadn’t even come out publicly yet!**

For members of the LGBTQ+ community, coming out is an extremely personal and sensitive moment. So, you can imagine my horror and heartbreak upon finding out I had been outed so publicly in such a hateful way. I was crushed.

**I ended up losing that extremely competitive race and it wasn’t until 18 years later that I finally won my race for Congress in 2012.**

Peter, I’m so glad that in the face of such discriminatory attacks, I didn’t give up.

Now, I can fight for LGBTQ+ equality and dignity in our nation’s capital and stand up for other marginalized Americans.

But sadly, since 2012, Republican bigotry and vitriol has not slowed down. Trump’s MAGA Republicans have spread hatred and divisiveness around the world while Republican state legislatures are passing anti-LGBTQ+ legislation as fast as they can. [**Peter, in 1994 when I was attacked for my identity, I lost my race because I didn’t have good people like you by my side. But now I do -- and I’m hoping that I can count on you to chip in $3 to help me fight back against hateful Republicans and stop their anti-LGBTQ+ agenda. Will you help me raise $10,000 before midnight? »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38368863/315134598/232128462?amount=3&refcode=MTFC_20211106_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZjg2NGYyZi0yNzNmLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=U44fExfCypUUzSFdIuboyOdwIgaAp-5uEWmvGFjV8Mw=) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $3 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38368869/315134605/232128462?amount=3&amounts=3,7,10&express_lane=true&refcode=MTFC_20211106_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZjg2NGYyZi0yNzNmLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=U44fExfCypUUzSFdIuboyOdwIgaAp-5uEWmvGFjV8Mw=)

clean_body: In the face of such discriminatory attacks, I didn’t give up. | = Peter, I want to be vulnerable with you for a moment and share my personal painful story about my coming out experience. In 1994, my Republican opponent outed me as gay with bigoted and homophobic ads to our district. I hadn’t even come out publicly yet! For members of the LGBTQ+ community, coming out is an extremely personal and sensitive moment. So, you can imagine my horror and heartbreak upon finding out I had been outed so publicly in such a hateful way. I was crushed. I ended up losing that extremely competitive race and it wasn’t until 18 years later that I finally won my race for Congress in 2012. Peter, I’m so glad that in the face of such discriminatory attacks, I didn’t give up. Now, I can fight for LGBTQ+ equality and dignity in our nation’s capital and stand up for other marginalized Americans. But sadly, since 2012, Republican bigotry and vitriol has not slowed down. Trump’s MAGA Republicans have spread hatred and divisiveness around the world while Republican state legislatures are passing anti-LGBTQ+ legislation as fast as they can. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = Thank you so much -- I’m so glad to have your support. Sincerely, Mark Takano | | Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P.O. Box 5214, Riverside, CA 92517 www.marktakano.com Mark Takano represents the good people of California's Inland Empire in Congress, fighting for the region's progressive priorities. Let’s be crystal clear: Franklin just voted _against_ fixing our roads and bridges, _against_ giving us better broadband internet, _against_ improving rail travel and public transit, _against_ mitigating climate change, and _against_ creating jobs.

name: National Republican Polling
subject: Don’t let them “cancel” American history
body:
I have a special gift for you—a set of unique notecards featuring pictures of the “Liberty Walk” statues found on the Hill
_Sponsored message_
This sponsored message from National Republican Polling is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zehhlqfj2fabq2c7811oh5lqcdbvmku12s8aks80_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c9i69o74c5h2bs) Friend of Liberty, I have a special gift for you—a set of unique notecards featuring pictures of the “Liberty Walk” statues found on the Hillsdale College campus. These beautiful cards include _George Washington_ and _Thomas Jefferson_ ... _Abraham Lincoln_ and _Frederick Douglass_ ... _Winston Churchill_ , _Margaret Thatcher_ , and _Ronald Reagan_. _All of these statues stand proudly on Hillsdale’s Michigan campus_ —one of the only institutions of higher learning that refuses EVERY PENNY of government funding, even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. You can view the cards at this secure link: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/get-your-liberty-walk-notecards](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zsj3t5a2uab5jd9aj5ee1tv5kqg68nesj6un3ebg_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c9i69o74c5h2bs)** Let the cards serve as a reminder to you of the vigilance and commitment needed to defend liberty—especially right now, a critical time for our country. **Sadly, several recent polls and events around the country show that increasing numbers of young Americans are being drawn to socialism and other ideas destructive of liberty.** And the unrest in communities nationwide, where statues of our Founding Fathers are being vandalized or torn down, is another symptom of this underlying disease. What explains this development? As an educator and president of Hillsdale, I’ve been thinking about this for a long time. Here’s one primary reason... For decades, the “progressive” leftist academics who became dominant in most of America’s colleges and universities after the 1960s have been teaching a **biased** and **distorted** view of American history. _The New York Times’_ recent “1619 Project” is a prime example. According to the “1619 Project,” the key to understanding America is not freedom, but slavery—and the Project’s main goal is to inject this false teaching into the curricula of America’s K–12 schools. Imagine young minds in classrooms all over American learning this. Does it make you as concerned as it does me? And given this trend in American education, is it any wonder that our young people feel less of a patriotic attachment to our nation and are increasingly attracted—out of ignorance—to failed ideas such as socialism, ideas that are destructive of liberty? Another sign of the “progressive” Left’s influence is the continuing attempt to erase our American heritage by destroying monuments, renaming schools and streets, and censoring works of literature in the name of “political correctness.” The Left knows that it cannot remake society according to its ever-evolving idea of “progress” until it has “canceled” patriotism and hallowed out the idea that we should be grateful for our blessings to the great men and women of the past—many of whom are depicted on the cards I’d like to send you. **This is why we are engaging the Left on the battlefield of education ... and why your generous support is needed right away.** After all, those on the Left are extremely well-funded, thanks to liberal billionaires like George Soros and his ilk. **With the support of citizens like you—citizens who understand the importance of education to liberty—we are ramping up its outreach efforts on behalf of liberty, especially to our nation’s youth.** It is even more urgent that we do so in the face of efforts such as _The New York Times_ ’ “1619 Project” that undermine patriotism and lead to an increased pull toward socialism. Hillsdale is the only educational institution in America that is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens of all ages, from coast to coast, about America’s great heritage of liberty. **Your generous support today will...**
* **Expand** the circulation of _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s digest of liberty, to reach millions more Americans (you can also receive a free subscription of I _mprimis_ ...for life).
* **Send** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to schools across America, and to members of our armed forces, who have sworn to defend the Constitution.
* **Increase** the number of citizens (especially younger Americans) enrolling in Hillsdale’s free online courses such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope.”
* **Launch** and support more and more Hillsdale-affiliated classical K-12 charter schools nationwide, returning excellence to American K-12 education and impacting thousands of our youngest citizens.

One other thing you should be aware of... As I mentioned, to maintain our independence, we do all of this liberty-defending work while refusing EVERY PENNY of government funding—even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. NOT. ONE. PENNY. So, your support is even more crucial to ensuring that future generations of Americans will be educated in American civics and prepared to defend freedom. **With a gift of $17.76 or more today to support educational outreach efforts that reach and teach millions, Hillsdale will send you a special notecard set featuring the statues on our “Liberty Walk.” The cards are a thank you for your support.** Supplies are limited, so please make your best tax-deductible gift right away. **You can view the cards and give your best tax-deductible gift of $17.76, $25, $50, $100, or even $250 or more by following the secure link below:** **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/get-your-liberty-walk-notecards](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zico71fhmt99ecvdsh919ajdth3v4te0be0angqg_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c9i69o74c5h2bs)** After receiving your notecards, I hope you’ll send one to a young person you know, encouraging them to learn more about the Constitution and American history. You can even recommend that they take advantage of Hillsdale’s many free educational resources. The Left is going all out, as illustrated by _The New York Times’_ “1619 Project.” It is urgent that we engage forcefully on the battlefield of education ... which is why your support is needed today. **Because as always, our only sure defense is an educated citizenry prepared to defend liberty—no matter the cost.** Warm regards, Bill Gray Associate Vice President, National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College

---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for National Republican Polling, [please use this preferences page](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/prefs/9z2z0r8j6nej6g80pneqc1087l03kcrlh1jial1gti8).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zmdie1sanv6ni461aq65bnrqh0l44idnnmros8lg_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c9i69o74c5h238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: Heinrich HQ
subject: One of the biggest drivers of the climate crisis
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
body:
Sign the petition >> [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38368984/315135054/-272948131?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_PET_GEN_AC_20211106_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYzg4MTEzMy0yOTNmLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zVA_j2faEIJ0i3UoDh-mfY3_Swv6MdQ_rRkGIQiqCws=&emci=274b553e-273f-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=ec881133-293f-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=252045)
---
Folks, methane emissions are one of the biggest drivers of the climate crisis — that’s why it’s such a big deal that world leaders at the COP26 climate summit just pledged to drastically reduce methane emissions by 2030. The EPA also announced that the United States is doing its part to cut methane emissions from oil and gas operations. This is on top of Martin’s work in the Senate a few months back to reverse Trump-era attacks on methane regulations. **We’ve made incredible strides in tackling climate change. But continuing our work to cut methane emissions and enact stronger environmental protections is crucial to preserving our planet for future generations, so we can’t stop here.** [**So, will you sign our petition to call for strong policies to keep up our work to reduce methane emissions and hold the fossil fuel industry accountable? name: Jim Jordan
subject: Regarding my re-election campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
RINOs and special interests in Ohio's state capital are attempting to draw me out of a congressional district! Don't want to receive our emails? [Unsubscribe here.]({{unsubscribeUrl}})

| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58706438:6vUPZB2NG:m:1:3253819041:2291DAB612F2D6B4AB46F0A4C65BDD54:r)
---

Peter,

They tried it when I stood up to former Speaker John Boehner, and now they're trying it again.

RINOs and special interests in Ohio's state capital are attempting to draw me out of a congressional district!

The gerrymandered map was just released this week, and it draws my home into a district halfway across the state...**a district that currently favors Democrats by 19 percentage points.**

**[I'm emailing today because I need your help to fight back against this political hit job.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58706438:6vUPZB2NG:m:1:3253819041:2291DAB612F2D6B4AB46F0A4C65BDD54:r)** The political bosses in Ohio are trying to keep me out of Congress because they know I won't go along with the status quo, and as long as I'm in office - I'll continue to be a thorn in the side of anyone OF EITHER PARTY who try to trample on our individual liberties.

**[I'm personally asking you to make a contribution to my re-election campaign today to help me return to Congress. ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58706438:6vUPZB2NG:m:1:3253819041:2291DAB612F2D6B4AB46F0A4C65BDD54:r)**

[** HELP ME RETURN TO CONGRESS
CHIP IN TODAY->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58706438:6vUPZB2NG:m:1:3253819041:2291DAB612F2D6B4AB46F0A4C65BDD54:r)
**[Your donation,](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58706438:6vUPZB2NG:m:1:3253819041:2291DAB612F2D6B4AB46F0A4C65BDD54:r)** whether it be large or small, will help ensure I'm able to continue holding the Washington swamp accountable both today and over the coming years.

My message to special interest insiders and political operatives alike is this: GAME ON! I will never be silenced for doing my job.

I'm not done fighting on your behalf. There is still so much work to be done to hold Democrats and Republicans in Washington accountable for reckless spending and the ongoing efforts to transform our nation into a socialist republic.

Let me be clear: I'm a target of the swamp because I will always stand up for our individual liberties; I'll never back down.

No matter what congressional map they enact, I am running for re-election to Congress. President Biden and Nancy Pelosi have demonstrated that we really are just one election away from losing everything our founding fathers built.

**[I need your help now more than ever. I'm not done fighting for you. Please send whatever you can to my campaign today to help me continue my fight on your behalf.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58706438:6vUPZB2NG:m:1:3253819041:2291DAB612F2D6B4AB46F0A4C65BDD54:r)**

[** HELP ME RETURN TO CONGRESS
CHIP IN TODAY->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58706438:6vUPZB2NG:m:1:3253819041:2291DAB612F2D6B4AB46F0A4C65BDD54:r)
Every day, Biden and Pelosi are working to undermine the foundations of our society by:
* Forcing critical race theory into our schools.
* Pushing Americans out of work with vaccine mandates, supply shortages, high gas prices and inflation induced job cuts.
* Inviting illegal immigrants into the country and then PAYING THEM TO STAY.

That doesn't change the fact that my path to re-election just got a lot tougher. I know I can win, but I also know that **[I need your help now more than I ever have before.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58706438:6vUPZB2NG:m:1:3253819041:2291DAB612F2D6B4AB46F0A4C65BDD54:r)**

You know how high the stakes are for the future of our country. And we both see the great momentum we are building with victories in Virginia and throughout the country.

I'm asking you to show your support for stopping the Biden/Pelosi agenda and helping take back the House for the people!

For Liberty,
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58706438:6vUPZB2NG:m:1:3253819041:2291DAB612F2D6B4AB46F0A4C65BDD54:r)
Jim

[** HELP ME RETURN TO CONGRESS
CHIP IN TODAY->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58706438:6vUPZB2NG:m:1:3253819041:2291DAB612F2D6B4AB46F0A4C65BDD54:r)

| | Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress

Delaware, OH 43015

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Re: infrastructure
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Schiff for Congress
body:
|
#
Derek — A year ago, all of us were sitting at home awaiting the results of the presidential election. We were worried, scared, and anxious...to say the least. I was at the American Legion Post in Hollywood taking in the results with friends and supporters on a big screen in the parking lot. Our eyes weren’t always glued to the TV, like many, I was watching Twitter and my texts hoping, praying, for good news. And when we finally heard that Joe Biden won the election and that Trump would finally be leaving the White House, there were spontaneous celebrations in the streets. It was a moment full of promise, but also full of determination to do the hard work. That hard work began immediately and hasn’t stopped. It hasn’t always been pretty — _ok, let’s be honest, making new and consequential laws that bring about change is never pretty_ — but it has been necessary. More than necessary, it is vital to moving the country forward. There is a constant give and take, and you never get everything you want. But last night, we finally passed the bipartisan infrastructure package. And when I was walking off the House Floor at 12:30 am, it was through a sea of smiling faces. Progressives, moderates, and those in between. Shaking hands, fist bumping, relieved that we were able to finally get this over the finish line. **_As President Joe Biden would “elegantly” put it, it’s a big f-ing deal._** It’s going to mean millions of jobs. It’s going to mean billions in investments in roads, bridges, public transit, and safety. It’s going to mean a nationwide electric vehicle charging network. It’s going to mean billions for rail – which “Amtrak Joe” appreciates. It’s going to mean clean drinking water and investments in water resilience. It’s going to mean broadband for rural and poverty-stricken communities. It’s going to mean renovations to our airports and ports. It’s going to mean billions in clean energy. For those not watching every twist and turn of this legislation, you might have forgotten how much will get done with this $1 trillion bill. **_But our work remains unfinished. We made a promise to the American people that we would invest in them. In our people. In our “human infrastructure.” We will pass the reconciliation Build Back Better package this month._** It’s going to be the biggest investment in fighting climate change ever — over $500 billion for clean energy jobs, cutting greenhouse gas emissions, and so much more. It’s going to be the biggest investment in families and childcare in decades. Universal pre-K, cutting childcare costs for working families, and helping end child poverty. It’s going to be the biggest expansion of healthcare since Obamacare. Reducing the cost of premiums, expanding Medicaid, and covering vision for those on Medicare. It’s going to lower taxes for middle-class and working-class families. It’s going to lower prescription drug costs by allowing Medicare to negotiate over price with the big pharmaceutical companies. And we’re going to pay for it by making billionaires and corporations pay their fair share. This is a make-or-break moment for President Joe Biden. For our House Majority and the Senate Majority. _Failure is not an option._ If we don’t demonstrate that the government can work — for the people, for those we’re trying to help — we will reap what we sow. And once we pass it, we need to sell it to the American people. Because the infrastructure and Build Back Better packages will be the greatest investment in our people in generations. _A new, New Deal, if you will._ We can deliver to the American people. We did so last night, and we now need to finish the job. We need to get it done. Let’s get it done. — Adam **P.S. If you’re as ready as I am to fight for these monumental legislative achievements and ensure that voters know that Democrats are trying to help people before the midterms, please consider pitching in a donation today. It can make a real difference. Thanks for being in this fight:** | | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38369015/315135360/-751938712?refcode=AU_ABS_CL_GEN_GEN_AC_20211106_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODYxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNzIxMjliZi0yOTNmLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wzx1bFSkiQMtUDLnP7IsF8dd6FBMF9zl8k5iaoa-Jxk=)
---
| [DONATE MONTHLY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38369016/315135361/1213653884?recurring=true&refcode=AU_ABS_CL_GEN_GEN_AC_20211106_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODYxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNzIxMjliZi0yOTNmLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wzx1bFSkiQMtUDLnP7IsF8dd6FBMF9zl8k5iaoa-Jxk=)
---

name: Jamarah Hayner, Team Bass
subject: Endorsements for Karen! (I'm really excited about these, friend.)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Karen Bass for Mayor 2022 (ID # 1441328)
body:
Friend --

I'm proud to be a part of Karen's campaign for Mayor of Los Angeles, because I know in my heart that she is the leader L.A. needs in this historic moment.

As a U.S.congresswoman, former state representative, and community organizer, Karen has a **proven** track record of serving and empowering families and communities. And I've watched firsthand as she has brought together diverse coalitions of activists to tackle complex issues.

But don't just take it from me (I am her campaign manager, after all, so my view is biased!). Take a look at what U.S. Senator, and former mayor, **Cory Booker** has to say:

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/s9_juF_BgMbxAZ_JqXzUoggzkljbOJisVvo8-9TL1dE=/n66_sbS6kpfS_R34Qnh--Jx9FtwSvzr9PsvUNkxwyEE=?ms=em21_211106_endors_fndd_gq_act___JH_ettx_alimg1&refcode=em21_211106_endors_fndd_gq_act___JH_ettx_alimg1&source=em21_211106_endors_fndd_gq_act___JH_ettx_alimg1&utm_campaign=em21_211106_endors_fndd_gq_act___JH_ettx_alimg1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=karen-bass)
---

Hear it from fellow California representative and progressive champion, **Congresswoman Katie Porter** :

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/s9_juF_BgMbxAZ_JqXzUoggzkljbOJisVvo8-9TL1dE=/n66_sbS6kpfS_R34Qnh--Jx9FtwSvzr9PsvUNkxwyEE=?ms=em21_211106_endors_fndd_gq_act___JH_ettx_alimg2&refcode=em21_211106_endors_fndd_gq_act___JH_ettx_alimg2&source=em21_211106_endors_fndd_gq_act___JH_ettx_alimg2&utm_campaign=em21_211106_endors_fndd_gq_act___JH_ettx_alimg2&utm_medium=email&utm_source=karen-bass)
---

**And hear it from former Mayor of Los Angeles Antonio Villaraigosa himself!**

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/s9_juF_BgMbxAZ_JqXzUoggzkljbOJisVvo8-9TL1dE=/n66_sbS6kpfS_R34Qnh--Jx9FtwSvzr9PsvUNkxwyEE=?ms=em21_211106_endors_fndd_gq_act___JH_ettx_alimg3&refcode=em21_211106_endors_fndd_gq_act___JH_ettx_alimg3&source=em21_211106_endors_fndd_gq_act___JH_ettx_alimg3&utm_campaign=em21_211106_endors_fndd_gq_act___JH_ettx_alimg3&utm_medium=email&utm_source=karen-bass)
---

Listen, Karen doesn't just talk the talk, she puts in the WORK to address the problems that keep us up at night. Leaders and activists from all walks of life and all backgrounds are fired up about Karen's campaign for mayor. And she needs to know you're with her, too.

clean_body: Friend -- I'm proud to be a part of Karen's campaign for Mayor of Los Angeles, because I know in my heart that she is the leader L.A. needs in this historic moment. As a U.S.congresswoman, former state representative, and community organizer, Karen has a proven track record of serving and empowering families and communities. And I've watched firsthand as she has brought together diverse coalitions of activists to tackle complex issues. But don't just take it from me (I am her campaign manager, after all, so my view is biased!). Take a look at what U.S. Senator, and former mayor, Cory Booker has to say: Hear it from fellow California representative and progressive champion, Congresswoman Katie Porter : And hear it from former Mayor of Los Angeles Antonio Villaraigosa himself! Listen, Karen doesn't just talk the talk, she puts in the WORK to address the problems that keep us up at night. Leaders and activists from all walks of life and all backgrounds are fired up about Karen's campaign for mayor. And she needs to know you're with her, too. Thanks for all you do, Jamarah Hayner Campaign Manager Karen Bass for Mayor Karen is building a grassroots campaign by and for the people of L.A.. Thanks to L.A.'s matching funds program, individual donations from residents up to $214 may be matched 6-to-1 by the city, meaning your $5 contribution could become $35. Friend,

Where do you see yourself in a year?

Joe Biden and his Radical Left allies are threatening America's future prosperity. They continuously push massive tax and spending plans that they say don't cost anything. The cold hard reality is that it is costing hard working Americans. Unfortunately, **these are the times we are dealing with and will continue to deal with if we don't take a stand right now.**

[**Chip in now to take a stand. >>**](http://links.fredkellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=a10e51f77ad04717aea703f9689c01ef&_m=4108e24e73e3472e8648925c46345961&_e=Q0oyzAbz_g7hKe5hTSUZ5QEgi9TM0LfxjqlPD9ITJNX1e-z5tidmw3PEZO1zYkhtbb8e6e9pRM5x6o4SLvYDQV64YMUvFZSYdPAen6H8quRG_ixDkEWgw-_b7yMO7r-KmBsjS5zrEUqcf6dXBKfy3QGBGEkGebbDrRJLUwP1ovdM3nwa2Id8h936k3O12QOtGtkDH4d1ETcmeN4htfx7RfW4c4fzOptjS0xWGTyk-PlsN2TE_vkl0H5v04eIb8rwPTGcmIJ4Y_i8eh6ZJdUimHc_hIoZtOPvegATfEX3eba6fTyOIE08r-C3mzQfKaGhFbDrDK7mtio2FqGhvMsC3L0EweES62EXj0sS4oDiRFl2BYbqXGD_LJUF5WWTJ12I-ADVDtqc1bOUl_mn9vP3BxEPmHGPXBtsRddEbI_4C1dL9cozwCK03WZCB94FfEEGTxSQ6dOdcjWXpR6ckym9sS_4WF3uTpavXw2uN34pVIXlUs4Pi4eRYOf-kiEADt7k7UWwRwg1YcnZAFm9HMp6Fw%3D%3D) [**PROTECT YOUR FUTURE**](http://links.fredkellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=a10e51f77ad04717aea703f9689c01ef&_m=4108e24e73e3472e8648925c46345961&_e=Q0oyzAbz_g7hKe5hTSUZ5QEgi9TM0LfxjqlPD9ITJNX1e-z5tidmw3PEZO1zYkhtbb8e6e9pRM5x6o4SLvYDQV64YMUvFZSYdPAen6H8quRG_ixDkEWgw-_b7yMO7r-KmBsjS5zrEUqcf6dXBKfy3QGBGEkGebbDrRJLUwP1ovdM3nwa2Id8h936k3O12QOtGtkDH4d1ETcmeN4htfx7RfW4c4fzOptjS0xWGTyk-PlsN2TE_vkl0H5v04eIb8rwPTGcmIJ4Y_i8eh6ZJdUimHc_hIoZtOPvegATfEX3ebbSKFd4QPYpntdKONQGWHQ17rDO5HXrO_jshb_-l64lERJG5JYn9UJMfXpWKB8RBJWOFiMF2cWFXnremwG-adMNuJNpFo-jxnyF3HnnRpre1iowXbxlwqXb_yGJFCNmgb-JdoxxZiDPh-ilpKzJf3EbSks3z97UAQeyVw3p82MchHUiLOPrAXi9RnlWRjY2K9PxeE-MsFfLaBoR__7muxIi9S5xneJvhJVoFym8Z0X4mA%3D%3D)

As it stands...the price to fill up your gas tank, put food on the table, and clothes on your back is skyrocketing - all because **Nancy Pelosi and Joe Biden are out of touch with hard working Americans.**

They sit in their ivory towers and think they know what is best for the American people, but the reality is that everything they have done has failed. _**We need leaders who know the heartbeat of America and bring success to the American people.**_

[**Donate now to bring back leaders who bring back success to the American people. >>**](http://links.fredkellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=a10e51f77ad04717aea703f9689c01ef&_m=4108e24e73e3472e8648925c46345961&_e=Q0oyzAbz_g7hKe5hTSUZ5QEgi9TM0LfxjqlPD9ITJNX1e-z5tidmw3PEZO1zYkhtbb8e6e9pRM5x6o4SLvYDQV64YMUvFZSYdPAen6H8quRG_ixDkEWgw-_b7yMO7r-KmBsjS5zrEUqcf6dXBKfy3QGBGEkGebbDrRJLUwP1ovdM3nwa2Id8h936k3O12QOtGtkDH4d1ETcmeN4htfx7RfW4c4fzOptjS0xWGTyk-PlsN2TE_vkl0H5v04eIb8rwPTGcmIJ4Y_i8eh6ZJdUimHc_hIoZtOPvegATfEX3ebatD5td_2tJy6g6xNHV-VYsWSs_4Y3DRs1Hppn5-TwalausX28qMsj44LB1M5M-2LSuzyGNjOaUkGJn6BWdEZdADg1kJr2F8EuBvloOnfToOB9Xqdof7UIP9zylEw13L3_0Mi5K0Z4UnVk3khi3xtRW_uOQj9_XL55fh8J2_bFfBr9AKjrHYR7bPLEVVxYmmom1uUGFNHgo-Dx-B98v512vFs4c4vXmm8sx0Ue8taILqQ%3D%3D)

name: Trump News HQ
subject: Don’t let them “cancel” American history
body:
I have a special gift for you—a set of unique notecards featuring pictures of the “Liberty Walk” statues found on the Hill
_Sponsored message_
[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zq0ahoq93llbt4ars8n8leo3vqot9e67njfeqbg0_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c9h68or4cjh2bs) Friend of Liberty, I have a special gift for you—a set of unique notecards featuring pictures of the “Liberty Walk” statues found on the Hillsdale College campus. These beautiful cards include _George Washington_ and _Thomas Jefferson_ ... _Abraham Lincoln_ and _Frederick Douglass_ ... _Winston Churchill_ , _Margaret Thatcher_ , and _Ronald Reagan_. _All of these statues stand proudly on Hillsdale’s Michigan campus_ —one of the only institutions of higher learning that refuses EVERY PENNY of government funding, even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. You can view the cards at this secure link: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/get-your-liberty-walk-notecards](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zeuahd5ai198iogr4e95f0oe0bdnk5ogcio7ev8g_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c9h68or4cjh2bs)** Let the cards serve as a reminder to you of the vigilance and commitment needed to defend liberty—especially right now, a critical time for our country. **Sadly, several recent polls and events around the country show that increasing numbers of young Americans are being drawn to socialism and other ideas destructive of liberty.** And the unrest in communities nationwide, where statues of our Founding Fathers are being vandalized or torn down, is another symptom of this underlying disease. What explains this development? As an educator and president of Hillsdale, I’ve been thinking about this for a long time. Here’s one primary reason... For decades, the “progressive” leftist academics who became dominant in most of America’s colleges and universities after the 1960s have been teaching a **biased** and **distorted** view of American history. _The New York Times’_ recent “1619 Project” is a prime example. According to the “1619 Project,” the key to understanding America is not freedom, but slavery—and the Project’s main goal is to inject this false teaching into the curricula of America’s K–12 schools. Imagine young minds in classrooms all over American learning this. Does it make you as concerned as it does me? And given this trend in American education, is it any wonder that our young people feel less of a patriotic attachment to our nation and are increasingly attracted—out of ignorance—to failed ideas such as socialism, ideas that are destructive of liberty? Another sign of the “progressive” Left’s influence is the continuing attempt to erase our American heritage by destroying monuments, renaming schools and streets, and censoring works of literature in the name of “political correctness.” The Left knows that it cannot remake society according to its ever-evolving idea of “progress” until it has “canceled” patriotism and hallowed out the idea that we should be grateful for our blessings to the great men and women of the past—many of whom are depicted on the cards I’d like to send you. **This is why we are engaging the Left on the battlefield of education ... and why your generous support is needed right away.** After all, those on the Left are extremely well-funded, thanks to liberal billionaires like George Soros and his ilk. **With the support of citizens like you—citizens who understand the importance of education to liberty—we are ramping up its outreach efforts on behalf of liberty, especially to our nation’s youth.** It is even more urgent that we do so in the face of efforts such as _The New York Times_ ’ “1619 Project” that undermine patriotism and lead to an increased pull toward socialism. Hillsdale is the only educational institution in America that is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens of all ages, from coast to coast, about America’s great heritage of liberty. **Your generous support today will...**
* **Expand** the circulation of _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s digest of liberty, to reach millions more Americans (you can also receive a free subscription of I _mprimis_ ...for life).
* **Send** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to schools across America, and to members of our armed forces, who have sworn to defend the Constitution.
* **Increase** the number of citizens (especially younger Americans) enrolling in Hillsdale’s free online courses such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope.”
* **Launch** and support more and more Hillsdale-affiliated classical K-12 charter schools nationwide, returning excellence to American K-12 education and impacting thousands of our youngest citizens.

One other thing you should be aware of... As I mentioned, to maintain our independence, we do all of this liberty-defending work while refusing EVERY PENNY of government funding—even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. NOT. ONE. PENNY. So, your support is even more crucial to ensuring that future generations of Americans will be educated in American civics and prepared to defend freedom. **With a gift of $17.76 or more today to support educational outreach efforts that reach and teach millions, Hillsdale will send you a special notecard set featuring the statues on our “Liberty Walk.” The cards are a thank you for your support.** Supplies are limited, so please make your best tax-deductible gift right away. **You can view the cards and give your best tax-deductible gift of $17.76, $25, $50, $100, or even $250 or more by following the secure link below:** **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/get-your-liberty-walk-notecards](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zortv4j7bfgbpgqf1lfaoj7jbp8gtm0rbtkbhlsg_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c9h68or4cjh2bs)** After receiving your notecards, I hope you’ll send one to a young person you know, encouraging them to learn more about the Constitution and American history. You can even recommend that they take advantage of Hillsdale’s many free educational resources. The Left is going all out, as illustrated by _The New York Times’_ “1619 Project.” It is urgent that we engage forcefully on the battlefield of education ... which is why your support is needed today. **Because as always, our only sure defense is an educated citizenry prepared to defend liberty—no matter the cost.** Warm regards, Bill Gray Associate Vice President, National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College

Hillsdale College,33 East College St, Hillsdale, MI, 49242, USA
---

subject: re: yard signs
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
👀
#
Peter, want us to show you a sign that John Fetterman has the statewide momentum it's gonna take to flip Pennsylvania blue?
Okay... how about *a bunch* of signs?! 👀
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/36971?t=1&akid=3358%2E434096%2E9OMzc5)
_VERY GOOD!_
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/36971?t=2&akid=3358%2E434096%2E9OMzc5)
_That's one excellent looking yard._
_[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/36971?t=3&akid=3358%2E434096%2E9OMzc5)_
_PA's fall leaves + Fetterman sign = perfection._
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/36971?t=4&akid=3358%2E434096%2E9OMzc5)
_Fetterman yard sign spotted in the wild._
[__](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/36971?t=5&akid=3358%2E434096%2E9OMzc5)
_So THAT’s why the chicken crossed the road_
**We're totally thrilled to see all these fantastic Team Fetterman yard signs beautifying lawns all across our Commonwealth.** John, Gisele + our entire team would be *deeply* honored if you'd add your own to your yard, window, or really wherever.
[**_You can get your very own Team Fetterman Yard Sign shipped straight to your door + so much other fabulous Fetterman merch in our official online store! Click here to shop now — 100% of proceeds from our union-made merch goes towards our fight to elect John Fetterman to fight for us in the U.S. Senate._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/36971?t=6&akid=3358%2E434096%2E9OMzc5) 💪
**[Shop now](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/36971?t=7&akid=3358%2E434096%2E9OMzc5)**
It's not just yard signs that we've got in the official online store, Peter. We've got shirts, hats, masks, and stickers — really the works!
Every piece of merch in our store is made by a union print-shop right here in Pittsburgh. That's something we're damn proud of. [** _Will you click here to shop yard signs + other official Team Fetterman merch in time for the holiday season? Every purchase gets us closer to electing John to the U.S. Senate and flipping this seat blue in 2022._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/36971?t=8&akid=3358%2E434096%2E9OMzc5)
**[Shop now](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/36971?t=9&akid=3358%2E434096%2E9OMzc5)**
— Team Fetterman

[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.

name: MarkKelly.com
subject: We are writing to ask if you can take 2 minutes to complete Mark Kelly’s November Issue Survey. We track the results. Your link is enclosed.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
As you know, we like to check in with some of Mark’s top supporters each month to ask about the issues you’re most concerned about.
#

Friends —
As you know, we like to check in with some of Mark’s top supporters each month to ask about the issues you’re most concerned about.
We actually review these results to see how they shift over time.
Today’s the day we ask again, and we’re hoping you’ll take 2 minutes to respond.
[**Use this link to please take Mark Kelly’s November Issue Survey. It shouldn’t take more than 2 minutes to complete.**](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/mek-nov-issue-survey-em?source=em211106-1-15&t=1&akid=1639%2E6688874%2E_iobEx)
Here’s the first question:
[](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/mek-nov-issue-survey-em?source=em211106-1-15&t=2&akid=1639%2E6688874%2E_iobEx)
For the past few months, climate change has been the runaway leader.
We’re curious to see how that has changed, if at all, given all the recent news and discussion about legislation in D.C.
[**Please take 2 minutes to complete Mark Kelly’s November Issue Survey.**](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/mek-nov-issue-survey-em?source=em211106-1-15&t=3&akid=1639%2E6688874%2E_iobEx)
**[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/mek-nov-issue-survey-em?source=em211106-1-15&t=4&akid=1639%2E6688874%2E_iobEx)**
Thanks,
Team Kelly

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=5&akid=1639%2E6688874%2E_iobEx).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.

name: Gwen Moore
subject: Yesterday was a great day
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Gwen Moore for Congress
body:
👏🏽 Sisters and Brothers, Yesterday, the House of Representatives voted and passed the Bipartisan Infrastructure Framework, **a massive step forward for our country**. It provides funding for traditional construction projects like roads and bridges, but it includes funding to make high-speed internet available to everyone and makes monumental steps to address climate change. We are in unprecedented times. With every piece of legislation advanced by President and Biden and the Congress, we are trying to fix four years of destruction from the previous Administration’s reckless agenda during an international pandemic – from yesterday’s crucial vote to the American Relief Act passed back in MONTH without a single Republican vote. **MAKE NO BONES ABOUT IT, THIS IS A BIG DEAL FOR OUR COUNTRY**, and I am proud of my fellow Democrats for getting this done. While we didn’t vote on Build Back Better, I want you to know that I believe every Democrat in Washington is acting in good faith to pass transformative legislation that will benefit our country. As President Biden said yesterday, the Build Back Better framework will lower your bills for healthcare, childcare, prescription drugs, and preschool. And families will get a tax cut. I’m proud of what we accomplished last night, and I will do everything in my power to pass Build Back Better. body:
Let me cut to the chase

| [](http://links.nicolemalliotakis.com/u/click?_t=759a85d1cba743719e64e2569e23c9b8&_m=179b682a28d0446190dd5f17ec27c771&_e=NHXwVOopzPEI6KPsR5AxvO6OuDlB2pc5OKGm8fzg36aUI4tb3lhdvLisaTk45ddBAC4dML5U5ros8XjgucivmoEnbBvBrrc37IoMCzzpPWqMSsKR2yMhXzNTKG4c6Pimmz6qtG5i5Puxi2agenO1DTjGLxHQiinJF5EdAsclX-0ypYQDs0Kf8zH2Nj9rIXID2o1uF5986LyZlHzoWMjBZ1arlN4NrLmkoVeWsJOG8VIXgaU_qW0yWzT06Jest9LPwSdSh-kuxhJSLSldBShnuKRkjN7JURnX1FkbrfhPNfQCoXZSlDPbf1RJlHf7ltxEtAkMXsUI9escV1m3zn0DIg8_DVRsAzkbSpaXyW-d0DN12ksaa9KLZk98_zM732KXnuMkEMPL_OGHrVz6-TROVAXG0yUMQAUyXjrT3LE6QNMoNin4Rh7rf5YPti5fzyI-O0WWpPJcT9DpBufOtC5nFHB6f5lT1nwJrsylmLwuCwRqzHnb1D6UgdjNKQ3hejQ84m8BKf4oYx2GwkP-vwCU2A%3D%3D)
---
Patriots—

Let me cut to the chase here.

Gas prices are at their highest levels in almost a decade. Prices in New York City are on their way to $4.00 a gallon and, yesterday, Joe Biden’s response was “I don’t have a near-term answer. It’s gonna be hard.”

President Biden doesn’t have an answer for soaring gas prices, so here is my response: the buck stops with the President, this is his mess and he needs to fix it.

Unbelievably, then Biden said he might not even try to reduce gas prices for hardworking people who are struggling to pay more.

There are no words that can describe this level of failure and betrayal of the American people.

**[We need to stop Joe Biden right now and I need your support to help me do it. body:
Get your tickets to our Soul Food Sunday fundraiser | | | **Join us for Sunday Dinner**
[View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/89baff4a68a1/get-your-tickets-5109094?e=339f142c50)

| |

| |
# Feed your soul.
Grab your tickets for our dinner fundraiser happening **tomorrow, November 7**! We will be getting started at **6pm at Oooh Wee It Is Restaurant on 33 E. 83rd St**. You can get your tickets [here](https://cole2022.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7401cdbeeb0470d9b36be09ed&id=bbde7586c8&e=339f142c50).

We will have a sit down dinner, hear from members of the community and talk about the future we are fighting for. We're working towards a First District that thrives because we are investing in the people, putting their needs first.
Yours in service,

Jahmal Cole

clean_body: | | | | | Hey there, A lot has been moving with our race recently, and I’ll be sitting down with my team later this week to go over our campaign strategy for the next few months. But first, I want to make sure I get your feedback. I’m up against 6 MAGA opponents who are in a race to the right to try to win Donald Trump’s blessing, but my number one priority is making sure this campaign represents you. I wish I could grab a cup of coffee with every voter to hear about your concerns, but I’ll have to settle for the next best thing. My team put together a short issue survey to hear your concerns: | | | The only way we’ll Keep Nevada Blue is by building a strong, grassroots coalition that fights for the issues working families are facing the most -- so I’m hoping you’ll take a minute to fill out my survey today.
