subject: If the Democrats Were Smart…
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NEW JOURNEY PAC
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58706195:JICQxB24N:m:1:3253819041:ACF131171A800CF9FB70CC051D344B97:r "Headline") Peter: [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58706195:JICQxB24N:m:1:3253819041:ACF131171A800CF9FB70CC051D344B97:r "Winsome Sears")**The next for Lieutenant Governor of Virginia, Winsome Sears, is:**
* A Woman
* Black
* Marine
* Conservative

**_If the Democrats were smart, this would terrify them._** They have spent generations telling black people and women that they can never get ahead unless the old white men in the Democrat Party allowed them to, but I think you know that they refuse to learn from their mistakes. Winsome is one of the thousands of Black Americans who have seen the truth and are ready to fight through their lies. **[2022 will be a massive Red Wave for Republicans like Winsome, but we need to start preparing NOW so Democrats can't stop great Black Conservatives from winning, like they did to our friend Larry Elder in California or Laverne Gore in Ohio.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58706195:JICQxB24N:m:1:3253819041:ACF131171A800CF9FB70CC051D344B97:r "2022 will be a massive Red Wave
for Republicans like Winsome, but we need to start preparing NOW so Democrats can’t stop great Black Conservatives from winning, like they did
to our friend Larry Elder in California or Laverne Gore in Ohio.")** [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58706195:JICQxB24N:m:1:3253819041:ACF131171A800CF9FB70CC051D344B97:r "Rush")You may not recognize my name, James Golden, but you probably know me as Bo Snerdley, the one-time producer and call screener for Rush Limbaugh. **Working with Rush for nearly two decades has confirmed the truth about liberals:_they HATE it when Black people in America dare to think for themselves._** I started the New Journey PAC to support candidates like Winsome - Black Conservatives who understand that the modern Democrat Party doesn't care about Black America and does nothing to help us. The New Journey PAC was all in on Winsome Sears, but our work in Virginia was only the beginning - **[the New Journey PAC is planning to give the same level of support to every Black Republican running for office, but we can't do anything if we don't have your support.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58706195:JICQxB24N:m:1:3253819041:ACF131171A800CF9FB70CC051D344B97:r "the New Journey PAC is planning to give the same level of
support to every Black Republican running for office, but we can’t do anything if we don’t have your support.")** Rep. Bryon Donalds, Rep. Tim Scott, and Joe Collins- these are just some of the Black Republicans we are supporting in 2022. We saw what the Democrats did to Winsome Sears - what do you think they will do to these patriots when they get desperate? [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58706195:JICQxB24N:m:1:3253819041:ACF131171A800CF9FB70CC051D344B97:r "Black Republicans") We have to be ready to FIGHT BACK. **[The New Journey PAC is leading the charge, and we need your donation of $1,000, $500, $250, $100, even just $50 could make a massive difference in one of these races.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58706196:JICQxB24N:m:1:3253819041:ACF131171A800CF9FB70CC051D344B97:r "The New
Journey PAC is leading the charge, and we need your donation of $1,000, $500, $250, $100, even just $50 could make a massive difference in one of
these races.")** **We can change the future of our nation by Making Black America Republican Again in 2022, but we need your help to make it a reality.** **[Please join us today.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58706195:JICQxB24N:m:1:3253819041:ACF131171A800CF9FB70CC051D344B97:r "Please join us today.")** For a New Journey, [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58706195:JICQxB24N:m:1:3253819041:ACF131171A800CF9FB70CC051D344B97:r "James Golden, AKA Bo Snerdley")
James Golden, AKA Bo Snerdley
Founder, New Journey PAC

body:
| | | | 2468 Pages
---
[](https://u23309276.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=cNjdLOXrNVuGJHRASJfKfsziR8mcAUOfgq0P5zhAedpsZP7lrCAkCuTBVwMnIruPRzfpfnhD4nR-2FZWDGtH27UavNWJoiP05XbtHlUOx6bAPjMfDxM1cYO8F6a373YFoi7J-2Bzo-2FJzlvjkhAQyXrcQuxWJdmGP8pkbsfdmhpPma6M-3DxlDl_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymhuTI2jG3IYR5NWbV52qgmdAiGhBklNQsRXTWl4rWtz6V26ifmsOhc2lTNkdXy-2F5FFomLfxGZOGa3bZcww1pfz69ScjbgPpCBXFFkNCfv00yglv8sjp8TGrSdENWanZGu-2F-2FVcsZrdErjxzNhAZf1Zzk7EhZ3W1jaGJMv-2BrhgoOI1OWBKAWqgIhEdCT2OmYzqtecAvHl1V-2BKUytcLPwg0IwAfuNHOeICtNw06Wn-2B0AZ5veJmbLyLITBc1lUX2vNyF9ApKpYLkntK-2FpCRmLwhs4Ik5-2Bh5-2FCkxpRaTXD0Q1j9SyDBMlr8x1mzjlC7l4OrAnHmCjycPnvZSDbRIoXYJfdsgiWg52QWkmak-2FSTuFML9Zyt5-2Fwjrwox8QbdFN3H7DzZNpO-2BYObYgtYflIFPrKM-2FNrFy4DqYki4qFT5tRE-2BlO0k8Jhqc2UiFHZYE5G2UE37r81hCNXnD-2Bm2XxxaHKlarMqdQafiLmh6-2F2jdzJBw6Xb64gi9QFYZ3y3vu5-2FT4Ecl-2FVG3RIkPRBDP-2FqYYFkeUdmydOuxbxPxnb9oM25jjZw9OGWHEOPQbTk72X-2Fg0pkeHCR2shvrXMWvk4rRUoXM0oYZIhIEzCj0oSsgclwlzkJLQz0s7JOPPE283G-2FR-2FcqvQOiF5Xdcg75VTW7wO67JmQE3HNGL3DY-2FpplUWd9PBS-2FRq7TnKDbu-2Bv0WfJ3FUtcmFuB-2BohvSclcAwsst8mdlmJvERg7DioVl8cK29blLd4AzqKZ6cflYzi0091IR7FXteyGbfAL2KeCHorQ-2BMz6-2BhJEkGf1tAwK-2Fq2DAT7uSMlkXb6tc3HYbFvhuwgyEdJ7CVsbIV17ZzJzsoTcGu04Mo3xkKO5sf4NZXPM7eWNK0XpgWcnF6z5i1gMv5Wcb-2Fz78m6EQmY9uAflyOGbnaTsm56MD)
---
Friend, The Radical Left finally unveiled their “Socialism Forever Bill.” At 2468 pages (which none of them will read),**this bill would transform our country forever.** It is truly shocking that Bernie Sanders and The Socialist Squad in the House wrote this bill. What does that tell you about the current state of the “Democrat” party??? The Green New Deal, Record Tax Hikes, Destruction of Family Farms and Ranches through Death Taxes, Tax Breaks for the Wealthy in High Tax States, Amnesty for TENS OF MILLIONS of ILLEGAL ALIENS, and massive new Government programs are all baked into this Socialist takeover of America. Alexis De Tocqueville said that “A man’s admiration for absolute government is proportionate to the contempt he feels for those around him.” This bill more clearly exposes the Democrat’s contempt for their fellow man than almost anything else they have done. We do not believe that those who have contempt for us should control our lives. This is the battle of our lifetime and we must win. To Save America, We must Kill This Bill. clean_body: | | | | 2468 Pages Friend, The Radical Left finally unveiled their “Socialism Forever Bill.” At 2468 pages (which none of them will read),this bill would transform our country forever. It is truly shocking that Bernie Sanders and The Socialist Squad in the House wrote this bill. What does that tell you about the current state of the “Democrat” party??? The Green New Deal, Record Tax Hikes, Destruction of Family Farms and Ranches through Death Taxes, Tax Breaks for the Wealthy in High Tax States, Amnesty for TENS OF MILLIONS of ILLEGAL ALIENS, and massive new Government programs are all baked into this Socialist takeover of America. Alexis De Tocqueville said that “A man’s admiration for absolute government is proportionate to the contempt he feels for those around him.” This bill more clearly exposes the Democrat’s contempt for their fellow man than almost anything else they have done. We do not believe that those who have contempt for us should control our lives. This is the battle of our lifetime and we must win. To Save America, We must Kill This Bill. Wyoming needs a Congresswoman that will stand up and fight back against the Radical Left, including President Biden and Speaker Pelosi. Unfortunately, our current representative has chosen to join these radicals on their Sham “Commission” instead of fighting to protect our country and our state. Wyoming deserves better. If we continue going down this Socialist path, I fear the America we know will be unrecognizable. We owe it to the next generation to give them a better and brighter future than the dark path of the Radical Left. For Wyoming, Harriet Hageman | | | |

Peter,

In 1965, Congress passed the Voting Rights Act, historic legislation that restored the right to vote to thousands of African Americans. That’s right — as recently as 56 years ago, in many places in this country, Black folks were unable to exercise their right to vote, and here I am running to be Nebraska’s first African American Congresswoman.

But frankly, over the past 56 years, we’ve seen the Voting Rights Act stripped of most of its power. Even though my opponent Don Bacon voted against the bill, Democrats in Congress passed the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act. The Act would restore and expand critical provisions of the Voting Rights Act and ensure that African Americans in the 21st century are afforded the protections guaranteed by the original legislation. Now, it’s up to the Senate to act.

clean_body: We must show the Senate that there is massive grassroots support for this crucial legislation. | | | DO YOU BELIEVE THE SENATE SHOULD PASS THE JOHN LEWIS VOTING RIGHTS ADVANCEMENT ACT? | | = | = | = Peter, In 1965, Congress passed the Voting Rights Act, historic legislation that restored the right to vote to thousands of African Americans. That’s right — as recently as 56 years ago, in many places in this country, Black folks were unable to exercise their right to vote, and here I am running to be Nebraska’s first African American Congresswoman. But frankly, over the past 56 years, we’ve seen the Voting Rights Act stripped of most of its power. Even though my opponent Don Bacon voted against the bill, Democrats in Congress passed the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act. The Act would restore and expand critical provisions of the Voting Rights Act and ensure that African Americans in the 21st century are afforded the protections guaranteed by the original legislation. Now, it’s up to the Senate to act. | Thanks for making your voice heard, Alisha * | | = PAID FOR BY SHELTON FOR CONGRESS Alisha Shelton for Congress PO Box 641026 Omaha, NE 68164 United States | | | ---|---|--- = = If you'd like to stop receiving these emails, please

Peter,

By now, you may have heard the news that President Trump has formally endorsed my campaign for the United States Senate! I've known the President for a long time, and I'm proud to call him my friend.

In case you missed my email announcing the President's support, let me quickly recap for you what he had to say in his endorsement release:

| _"Herschel is tough on crime and borders, and he will always stand in support of law enforcement, military, and our vets. He will fight hard for our Second Amendment and voter integrity. Herschel will never let you down."_ - President Donald J. Trump
---

Now, while I'm very grateful for President Trump's support of my campaign, the truth of the matter is that I won't get anywhere on my own. I'm a team player - always have been - and I need you on my team. _**[So, I'm asking you to join my team today by offering your personal endorsement of my campaign.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=cfd4c356463a4f5eb1db09ab030c73a3&_e=LArvPO5i4HVcU-qWrHCMiF9ySno9ewjTxFW9oNBBL-1bN990sOhvM-qTB4Q-8mKBuGfhh3wEvenaXv12WTSIIY_DPio03RtHuiObOpQQ_l2qW4jcrBSB45T9i0z-PrDwabJTRWfED6LnA6IZox9k6NmpXu4_sTpfRGWK5PjrKTfIDXqRYJ_wNZvv-ennMq9Gul3Rl7aD5AltXyx-1Z0GVZdRUBIFjlyd6TLhB4ARlana5RxtBiclvjS2jT2JiVDyW99NSNMu-AlYCupw6z1aPDnaS3wAdTtejLtHBz9GUYmFjar3eXeG8Re5R7Ecoc4ymJbI1-N7LYXMXdb9vcLjHRcc_pDgqQnYi8HkgTNXX-e9TBnQhBfbkFPv_hvd9eGwIaY09dle0d3IYSSO_4_LeRTTpAaPr9_ibrUjklQHLIwkNI03johtJMQw5vNutjMoUnG0pWKPGsGqhUx6XyR4d78vfsBQHnN_BKqOi9ipUxQEAb1IB65F72o66n3DrEpkqhva_7n36mfj_kJShseb6wKQfuw6shrHYzZqbri5uIOINNvLgCz51-OrZQilaA6ihFFmVuFPMFACeTkwZPrBAQ%3D%3D)**_

subject: Montana’s U.S. Representative voted against infrastructure for Montana

Big news, friend: **The U.S. House just passed a massive, bipartisan infrastructure bill that will make critical investments to infrastructure in Montana and across the country, and now it is off to President Biden’s desk for his signature!** I know firsthand that passing bipartisan legislation is no small task. I am grateful for Montana’s own Senator Tester for his leadership in bringing this package together, and grateful to everyone who helped deliver these historic investments. The $1 trillion infrastructure package will keep Montanans safe, healthy, and connected, and create good-paying jobs along the way by:
* Repairing roads and bridges across the country, along with updating and expanding rail travel and public transit;

* Improving our water and energy infrastructure and mitigating the growing effects of climate change;

* And expanding broadband internet access to more homes across rural areas like Montana!

**But sadly, Montana’s current sole U.S. House Representative, Republican Matt Rosendale, voted _against_ all of these benefits for Montanans.** This is exactly why we need to ensure Montana’s new representative in Congress is a Democrat willing to make progress for the people they were elected to serve. And with your help today, I will be that leader. **[Help us continue to move Montana and our country forward: make a grassroots contribution of $10 or whatever you can to help send me to Congress to pass more legislation that improves the lives of Montanans.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38371958/315153526/483879871?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211106infrastructure_lb_90do_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTI3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YzgyYzk3My00MjNmLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3tzBHpeA40cS0irDak1_Zg-02oztvuAEPsW28Hc6yi0=)** | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

clean_body: | = Big news, friend: The U.S. House just passed a massive, bipartisan infrastructure bill that will make critical investments to infrastructure in Montana and across the country, and now it is off to President Biden’s desk for his signature! I know firsthand that passing bipartisan legislation is no small task. I am grateful for Montana’s own Senator Tester for his leadership in bringing this package together, and grateful to everyone who helped deliver these historic investments. The $1 trillion infrastructure package will keep Montanans safe, healthy, and connected, and create good-paying jobs along the way by: Repairing roads and bridges across the country, along with updating and expanding rail travel and public transit; Improving our water and energy infrastructure and mitigating the growing effects of climate change; And expanding broadband internet access to more homes across rural areas like Montana! But sadly, Montana’s current sole U.S. House Representative, Republican Matt Rosendale, voted against all of these benefits for Montanans. This is exactly why we need to ensure Montana’s new representative in Congress is a Democrat willing to make progress for the people they were elected to serve. And with your help today, I will be that leader. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Now, we need the House and Senate to come together to pass the Build Back Better Act — a sweeping legislative package that will invest in quality childcare, universal pre-K, paid family leave, long-term care services, and clean energy tax credits. name: Charles Booker
subject: Kentucky New Deal. A new deal for all of us.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

I have big news to share with you today,
Peter.

Today, I’m proud to launch the Kentucky New Deal.

I’m running for U.S. Senate because I love Kentucky. I love the people of
our Commonwealth. And I believe that after decades of bad leadership,
poverty, and struggle, enough is enough.

I’m gonna share more about why we’re launching the Kentucky New Deal and
the history behind it — but before I do, can I ask you a favor?

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/12679?refcode=em20211106-1201&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=1201%2E346206%2EoNZujJ ]My team and I want to be able to travel all across our Commonwealth to
talk about the Kentucky New Deal with Kentuckians — and meet them where
they’re at, from the hood to the holler. I’d be honored,
Peter, if you can chip in $5 or
anything you can afford so we can fund our travels and make these meetings
a reality. Can you chip in?

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/12679?refcode=em20211106-1201&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=1201%2E346206%2EoNZujJ ]Contribute $5

Years ago, in Kentucky, we were promised a New Deal. We were promised a
future without poverty, a future where every Kentuckian would have
pathways to prosperity and plenty.

We worked the mines to power our cities. We forged the steel to build our
bridges. We harvested the crops that fed our children. We fell the trees
that built our homes.

The deal was that for our service and our sacrifice, we would be fairly
treated. We would be able to live full and gainful lives, we could feed
our families, and we’d have a fair path to prosperity.

But over the years, the promises of the New Deal have been gutted by
politicians like Rand Paul. And what we have left now is a bad deal — a
deal that exploits and harms Kentuckians who are already struggling,
unable to get ahead.

A deal where corrupt politicians and corporations get richer, but the rest
of us were left behind and forgotten. While Kentuckians suffer, they
profited off their stocks, blocked pandemic relief, chased conspiracies,
weaponized hate, and division. All for their own gain.

Kentucky deserves a new deal, on our terms — a bold new vision led by us
and for us about the things that matter most to us. We can end the cycle,
end the hate and division, end poverty as we know it with a new deal by
us, for us.

The Kentucky New Deal will be the biggest investment in the history of our
Commonwealth. But this isn’t about a handout. It’s about justice and
claiming what is ours — claiming what we deserve.

The Kentucky New Deal will center the people of Kentucky to build lasting
infrastructure, break down barriers to democracy, end generational
poverty, build new statewide coalitions, and so much more.

This Deal will finally address the deep, lasting challenges that have
crippled our Commonwealth, and meet people where they’re at.

The Kentucky New Deal is a way for us to show the nation that enough is
enough, and everyday people have had it with the lies, corruption, and
suffering.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/12679?refcode=em20211106-1201&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=1201%2E346206%2EoNZujJ ]Peter, I’m fired up and
ready to share this vision with Kentuckians everywhere, from the hood to
the holler. But I need your support to do this. If — and only if — you are
able, please chip in $5 to our campaign.

More soon,

Charles Booker

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20211106-1201-footer&t=1023&refcode2=1201_346206_oNZujJ&akid=1201%2E346206%2EoNZujJ

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1201%2E346206%2EoNZujJ

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

But taking on the Silicon Valley Liberals is a MONUMENTAL task. President Trump needs to know who really has his back, and who no longer supports him... Fellow American,

By now, you may have heard the news that President Trump has formally endorsed my campaign for the United States Senate! I've known the President for a long time, and I'm proud to call him my friend.

In case you missed my email announcing the President's support, let me quickly recap for you what he had to say in his endorsement release:

| _"Herschel is tough on crime and borders, and he will always stand in support of law enforcement, military, and our vets. He will fight hard for our Second Amendment and voter integrity. Herschel will never let you down."_ - President Donald J. Trump
---

Now, while I'm very grateful for President Trump's support of my campaign, the truth of the matter is that I won't get anywhere on my own. I'm a team player - always have been - and I need you on my team. _**[So, I'm asking you to join my team today by offering your personal endorsement of my campaign.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=42dca40aa038443daf97a3466f92a79b&_e=lRslM-Ab6SuZnTnJFfurBk8Rg8ZSAPjSLhqHv7mak1W5KozAkafaETMNY8ixcfe8N76Ls4rg23gmJm4iJy_z7E-nOvD6F0iSEuetSuMJnERqa_8mOUM6WUcnvX_ow2SOHGTA_RBejTOucL2IYT-FYXq5wzqOEoRJES2lsLQmhGYIRK7Bm_nv8VIj4HlV4lCSWFtefFpWFW87iA8Ic1epHXXD9VVOZCZjjy04aZxi7d22RQaImnGPdM4RcdBic7coNI13Yfo0DCAsF0R4f5iFkMbBPgFZdQW3OH7c6-2Tcpp4ga-V6YyMhJoofuQxBhoTK3VE0mfZZUTKDzXlvbRBovCLEyWNAwwZvQdPGjAN5dk6Wei_5a2UebLK6LNj7YVavfMVYlP6t5GLB_siZeJsgo2p949j1u1mljIDn1fJUZTBq8VUXWIyaZjIYL7cKiNzu9Hquo9Ge-f50j9Xeg4SzWVX9G_OJoDcknUC72K5hp3cuOUPa_Y26k-5ba7qkfMqlb7LSSxmZhpAQW2sfE6Suu69aE2Ve-0oVhZakMvlkgv0izeJyf825VFTJkPTWfiE4R3EuM_rc_v4T7cXh2Du9w%3D%3D)**_

name: Derek Schmidt
subject: Let’s cut the tax on groceries
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEREK SCHMIDT FOR KANSAS, INC
body:
After less than a year under Joe Biden’s failed administration, the cost of living in Kansas is skyrocketing. Everywhere I go, I hear from Kansans w Friend, After less than a year under Joe Biden’s failed administration, the cost of living in Kansas is skyrocketing. Everywhere I go, I hear from Kansans who are having trouble making ends meet, but there’s something that we can do right now in Kansas to help working families deal with the record levels of inflation caused by the Biden administration's reckless spending. **Kansas has one of the highest sales taxes on groceries in America.** Everybody buys groceries, but they tend to be a bigger portion of a family's budget when the budget is smaller. Tax relief on groceries will be in-the-pocket savings for families across our state. That’s why yesterday I called on the Legislature to eliminate or significantly reduce the grocery tax, and Republican leadership agreed that we need to get the job done for struggling Kansas families. [**I want to know what you think... Do you stand with me? Should we ELIMINATE or at least REDUCE the grocery tax here in Kansas? Respond quickly!**](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=67883e7b89e24048959663278f6d89e9&_e=0JK8fpqV1ctqd_O7Kd9NEVhAprCj6D_H3BSEkm0ZTsecXWOgsQfT2MNhOy23jljGHk0v9JeCZW_Rm_8tRv3Bs5cgzXn6FDGHd1LFb_KS06mX0_z6lDgMgpEXFOHTN3U5cDIfo7JlWlye6akDFuA-eJ6InHJ2gxANqrkPqfE55NkuSDn-DNHrL9hYAX0mwns0uG0km_luCEmR7-qXgFzryH9-6rje73KvSoDEgju0QmIoCQSNL1miH1P-OxCMBwHaYmam8qErPjww0mR8fVbd4q6p90EIxqR0uUV1wZS9vAF2YfuX8zEhIKYg9YmZWIoK4OcyXS3F-hSeKBZEXKp3b_hcPIc5EwbO6wayH4B8mBAekX1EmTKNDjDdQ-WFCp5wev-W4TzuXqsyPbBuFa9gvuoHKMv0CIpf-hDXTxNYBGZ2jNYR2Nc77kJS0MDVWzzvYpzzVFbrGDIZxi2nK_vubuLxw-wXAv4T1qMDoq0QtBQ%3D) **SIGN YOUR NAME****: It’s Time for Tax Relief!** [**SIGN MY NAME**](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=67883e7b89e24048959663278f6d89e9&_e=0JK8fpqV1ctqd_O7Kd9NEVhAprCj6D_H3BSEkm0ZTsecXWOgsQfT2MNhOy23jljGHk0v9JeCZW_Rm_8tRv3Bs5cgzXn6FDGHd1LFb_KS06mX0_z6lDgMgpEXFOHTN3U5cDIfo7JlWlye6akDFuA-eJ6InHJ2gxANqrkPqfE55NkuSDn-DNHrL9hYAX0mwns0uG0km_luCEmR7-qXgFzryH9-6rje73KvSoDEgju0QmIoCQSNL1miH1P-OxCMBwHaFudGpkBYXiIFhQlPriXgZpSi_QZGeFuZBImm5a697jRqL9A9GXToz2SDHiyzKsztKsMnA6vs5nZCRUoHKd1gQeiLwih4KIH1ZorFzGrz18YCVc6wgM4z_Z6Wwt_5-Usje9NbEYhlGl5tp_b6uz5nDiyUBScxDktO0rg-b1102RLDTbtYUjwVNf1D60H17qqZrFQaRTVQg4IeTpTXIGKBzM1YHMetFeDVjh4BZKxBi0Y%3D) If Kansas is to thrive and grow, our public policies must attract, retain, and support working families. Our state must be an affordable place to live, work, and raise a family. As we work together to help our state grow and recover from the damaging effects of COVID-19 and the ill-considered government responses to it, we HAVE to support working families. **As governor, I’ll fight every day to provide families like yours with the relief you deserve.** This issue has had bipartisan support since long before Laura Kelly was governor, and it’s true that she campaigned on this in 2018.**But it's also true that three years into her administration she has completely failed to deliver on that promise.****She even VETOED a bill to reduce the sales tax on groceries when she had the chance.** I’m ready to get the job done, for YOU. clean_body: After less than a year under Joe Biden’s failed administration, the cost of living in Kansas is skyrocketing. Everywhere I go, I hear from Kansans w Friend, After less than a year under Joe Biden’s failed administration, the cost of living in Kansas is skyrocketing. Everywhere I go, I hear from Kansans who are having trouble making ends meet, but there’s something that we can do right now in Kansas to help working families deal with the record levels of inflation caused by the Biden administration's reckless spending. Kansas has one of the highest sales taxes on groceries in America. Everybody buys groceries, but they tend to be a bigger portion of a family's budget when the budget is smaller. Tax relief on groceries will be in-the-pocket savings for families across our state. That’s why yesterday I called on the Legislature to eliminate or significantly reduce the grocery tax, and Republican leadership agreed that we need to get the job done for struggling Kansas families. SIGN YOUR NAME: It’s Time for Tax Relief! If Kansas is to thrive and grow, our public policies must attract, retain, and support working families. Our state must be an affordable place to live, work, and raise a family. As we work together to help our state grow and recover from the damaging effects of COVID-19 and the ill-considered government responses to it, we HAVE to support working families. As governor, I’ll fight every day to provide families like yours with the relief you deserve. This issue has had bipartisan support since long before Laura Kelly was governor, and it’s true that she campaigned on this in 2018.But it's also true that three years into her administration she has completely failed to deliver on that promise.She even VETOED a bill to reduce the sales tax on groceries when she had the chance. I’m ready to get the job done, for YOU. Derek Schmidt | | PAID FOR BY DEREK SCHMIDT FOR KANSAS, INC., KELLY ARNOLD, TREASURER. | | | ---|---|---

Vote to Stop the Madness | Fight for North Jersey

https://cashaforcongress.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=50a6a6c04812360fd0aebd140&id=9c03d94ed0&e=ade10d3dbe

** Sign the Petition
------------------------------------------------------------

** Send a Message to Mikie Sherrill
------------------------------------------------------------

Mikie Sherrill has come out of hiding to vote for billions of dollars in new spending. Mikie ALSO voted to push forward the immense $1.75 TRILLION-dollar green energy bill coming right behind it.

We can’t let Mikie Sherrill, Joe Biden, and Nancy Pelosi change the very structure of our nation with their Socialist agenda, while mortgaging our future by adding TRILLIONS to the national debt.

Shame on them.

I’m running for Congress to fight for North Jersey.

Join me - sign the petition today, and let’s tell them to STOP THE INSANITY.

https://cashaforcongress.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=50a6a6c04812360fd0aebd140&id=eecf5c004d&e=ade10d3dbe

Larry Casha
------------------------------------------------------------

About Larry and his campaign: Larry is the sitting Republican State Committeeman from Morris County, has served as Council President in Kinnelon Borough and as a Trustee to the County College of Morris. He has lived his entire life in New Jersey’s 11th District. He is a small business owner deeply involved in community and charitable organizations. Larry and his wife Debra dated in high school and now are law partners. They have spent their careers fighting for the forgotten residents of New Jersey who have been abandoned by Washington and Trenton bureaucrats. It is time New Jersey gets more back on every dollar in taxes we send to Washington. It is time to save our nation from Pelosi’s socialist agenda, that is supported by Mikie Sherrill, which is attempting to change the fabric of the country. This shortchanges New Jersey, driving away the very friends and neighbors with whom we grew up.

We're working hard to make sure we protect our Democratic Majority -- and to put an end to Republicans' obstruction for good. President Biden can't do it all. We need all hands on deck if we're going to fight back against Republicans and expand our historic Majority. Our success relies on grassroots supporters like you. 99% of our contributions come from grassroots donations, with an average gift of $19. If you'd like to unsubscribe from DCCC emails, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=45899501&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjEyMDY5OTIxMwS2&l=14138616&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com). If you'd like to make an online donation, click [here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dcccactblue?amount=25&recurring=true). Thanks for your support of Democrats!

Contributions or gifts to the DCCC are not tax deductible.

NAME: dpwillis67@gmail.com UNIQUE ID: #5907903 SUPPORTER STATUS: Speaker Pelosi is an INCREDIBLE leader. She made history as the FIRST female Speaker of the House. She led the charge to defend our House Majority and pass the American Rescue Plan. And just last night, she helped pass a HISTORIC investment to upgrade America 's infrastructure. But the GOP has relentlessly ATTACKED Speaker Pelosi -- so we need to make sure our grassroots Democrats are firmly behind her. That's why we're calling for 25,OOO responses to our survey before midnight. ******** Thank you, DCCC Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | | www.dccc.org | Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

name: Jacky Rosen
subject: We just passed a historic infrastructure and jobs bill. Here’s what’s next:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
This is a major win for Nevada and the American people. It will create good-paying jobs and rebuild our crumbling infrastructure, allowing us to better compete in the 21st century economy.
#
Team,
Last night, the House passed bipartisan legislation making the most significant investment in American infrastructure since we built the interstate highway system. I was proud to be a member of the bipartisan Senate infrastructure working group that negotiated and drafted this major package.
This is a major win for Nevada and the American people. It will create good-paying jobs and rebuild our crumbling infrastructure, allowing us to better compete in the 21st century economy.
I’m especially proud of the sections of the bill I helped write, and I want to tell you a bit more about what we accomplished together:
* **Investing in broadband access:** I helped draft sections that will bring high-speed internet access to rural, Tribal and other underserved communities and make internet access more affordable.
* **Improving our airports:** I fought to secure funding for airport expansion, upgrade and repair projects.
* **Strengthening cybersecurity:** I worked to include measures that will protect our electric grid and power systems from cyberattacks.
* **Boosting tourism:** I helped make sure investments in infrastructure will be directed to help revive travel and tourism in the wake of the COVID-19 pandemic.

When I ran for Senate, I promised to work across the aisle to deliver real solutions and get results. These measures and other critical investments in the bill will make a big difference for Nevadans. But we’re also not done yet.
Next, Congress needs to pass the Build Back Better agenda to keep making progress for the American people. I’m fighting for a final budget plan that includes strong action on climate change, funds for wildfire and drought relief, comprehensive immigration reform, affordable child care, paid family leave, universal pre-K, and more.
**[Will you join me in the fight? Add your name right now to tell Congress to keep up our progress and pass Build Back Better legislation that will benefit working families.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38372857/315159002/501909012?ms=jr_em_nd_211106_1&refcode=jr_em_nd_211106_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Henderson&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMWVjMmZiNy00ZDNmLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=j3iiHzkwWneG37B_XNbT6e914jOVwVU6oAfN26MhvxA=&emci=111b09f3-343f-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=b1ec2fb7-4d3f-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=3800590)**
Thank you,
Jacky

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: Don’t believe the pundits
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=1359%2E3611125%2E0L6bGd ][IMG]

Folks,

I have a general principle when it comes to political predictions: don’t
believe the pundits.

I hear political talking heads in Washington say that Ohio is likely to
vote Republican in the 2022 Senate race. But I know they’re wrong. They
don’t know our state -- but we do. I’ve won not one, but three Senate
races here.

Tim’s front-runner GOP opponent, Josh Mandel, tried and failed twice to
unseat me. This team has what it takes to beat him a third time around,
but the polls are close. Josh is the only Republican currently beating Tim
in the polls.

Now look, Tim and I have been campaigning on the ground all across Ohio
these past few weeks. And we’ve seen the enthusiasm to elect Tim and give
Ohio the most pro-worker delegation in the country.

But to overcome Josh’s attacks and the GOP’s mountains of cash, we’ll need
to match the grassroots operation we had in 2018. That’s why I’m
personally reaching out to you today:

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5829?t=1007&akid=1359%2E3611125%2E0L6bGd ]Can I count on you to chip in to Tim’s campaign right now to give Ohio
the strongest pro-worker Senators in the nation? This is 2022’s most
important race.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5829?t=1008&akid=1359%2E3611125%2E0L6bGd ]Donate $25
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5830?t=1009&akid=1359%2E3611125%2E0L6bGd ]Donate $50
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5831?t=1010&akid=1359%2E3611125%2E0L6bGd ]Donate $100
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5832?t=1011&akid=1359%2E3611125%2E0L6bGd ]Donate $200
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5833?t=1012&akid=1359%2E3611125%2E0L6bGd ]Donate $250
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5829?t=1013&akid=1359%2E3611125%2E0L6bGd ]Other Amount

I won my competitive race thanks to grassroots supporters like you
stepping up in critical times like these. As Tim says, never bet against
Ohio.

With gratitude,

Sherrod

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/47?t=1002&akid=1359%2E3611125%2E0L6bGd ][IMG]
We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in
touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails,

name: Kina Collins
subject: Our Families Were Never the Priority
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KINA COLLINS FOR CONGRESS** ](https://u1584542
body:
Federal authorities launched a criminal investigation into Loretto Hospital | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yOQozAy4249GfohatM8XLCP7Gyf6bzrkjN8sXh_JjXvDm21fvmGLhqUe-quR3_x0bPZYqqRmKw-ebpnqlyWdsbb4WUxyyDpjjPMxiSxHH8s2yIDpZGz7EMnR-dao0sCyccBgAkVTBJV4gLhge6YBtnWPpTeBwcv8OkE2T6h0IaaMeuiJIDph6DVY215AJGv36FePwKYDSQ7a-Tcj84PleQNR1_zyRIv25xBvWHLbmA0k3gsgV2723FH8scd4fJHo9OC_W9mZg3ywdb7wrbLJw5HN1IVlJ12l2hJyjKh7_3Fkvr1lfBI0Nujx1bS6rOpznA0NTEXQaE_Ge1_xE08mS6sawq660g7ITUPjrctks4lg/3gs/alqLR3o1QeuMQWMiEAfgYQ/h0/WuIcOuWP8anaBmeDfjEyq0DPuR3tjADXHoONB5CrO2M)
Team, **[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xx70stB4rOWn3H33v0Otzf70y7wXqkPX4862n8Y2G9rLHaA706jNFHGn8a6KrH2bLCU77EtqPhPbkeTfrpgZmBLntV8zD3y2e1BuHgQaoP_L8qpalvHB_U_ihslptAOXxWzjYdcCHzW402Kk7zTfaTcYFtGJkZt2B1m8kZO7vGgyBiRQih2ONE2XkEbsMCbRQIDqUU65y5wpPkTup2KM2tT2K3OVPtR2GgCn10yzbxZ_zHW2Sn20kgd-Vihau2Ctj1BkkGxZ_h2OCbaQO8qaNHA-f3-r6RMgy8f5ZMIm9ulyKBIfvR19HaITUvh9fQSA4/3gs/alqLR3o1QeuMQWMiEAfgYQ/h1/u72S8s23X6-DhU7SUoyEwRKeB2aseaJsEg7bavpW9-w)** This week in Chicago, federal authorities [launched](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXdJeOK0SLrMIuMRQFTCScENBqIJqh7qHzekBaKNRZW38794Y-R0iR7x9GI3LCUQhQPnaDq1bzFEK9tSypjhP1bjNjgU5eiTWPoRGxvBvNEe5ShBgLnur0sRs0wZ62H3f7aCmX7OeX8J-AQkEaxZnpSKHCDJuqlE-3JjJCGkTmCKjjfJprB9qGApyWnMNZklNrWmQspAEfqDgRUa1DDeUSaVZhK8-HYGMxAVL-SZL3DdA7Qyf7lnT3IJgYoZGGlvxJ_wybhxIRfzYBZtCGtBZd_MvqWypE6j6TVa5Mse6atY_0IPlVKPeION66PXdShd2D_w1jb7Qt1Z-3fHHcJvL7NJGXNzswR-HkuehlVS9RYbM/3gs/alqLR3o1QeuMQWMiEAfgYQ/h2/Xv4BY411rA-IGQbJmnB1jnjSfFmfGGAhvYjF-xr7ISE) a criminal investigation into how Loretto Hospital administered COVID vaccines that were meant for communities of color, to ineligible Trump Tower employees. Team, if you live on the West Side, you know how hard it is to get the healthcare you need. This investigation is just the latest proof point of a larger pattern that those of us from Austin know well: politicians and executives in this city prioritize the wealthy and well-connected over the communities they’re supposed to serve. **Those politicians and executives need to be held accountable—especially when lives are on the line. I am ready to be the voice of accountability representing IL-7 in Congress.** **[Can you chip in to help me raise the small dollar donations we need for our people powered campaign?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xx70stB4rOWn3H33v0OtzfF6UKPwTg0kVVhiTLfV6t9fa_sGb_z7ONcEWyFZnd1yCjQ4Skv513RU4ankzz7fK5AjgXEF_wWDFeOqoDAgrCU-NA24MkNxsytcFYLgpUcVn6_J6jhDbicK-ruS7utC7ZrHbrxuomNzRzBPPOdEgpjcFuVmbWObR0jCnshFbNStFyNXxHXd3pktB7sHIgrMM4FDqWcTjwW4XPLiPH4i3A85wH8nGVj3tYy0rZ1DWSKcr0c3rv7l73_IJV5lyLSY79p7-0KZ6D0kvy7ZjrPR3_6Uvy284dZW-vrcGD_QxYffw/3gs/alqLR3o1QeuMQWMiEAfgYQ/h3/zO2G8o2p6tTh9pVJvdrY0JQs57_Mfea7pcMibTeelbU)** [Donate now](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xx70stB4rOWn3H33v0OtzfF6UKPwTg0kVVhiTLfV6t9Z0XGdRq6Q7dTQHAHhscgoYn06ffgYBTY6XCWdcbIFe3rpyRZuh1GnEkZS4aCeV6u86EacvQRulOlnrrLXx74JbP8tzA-wZZtP37c7fdiZsJGd_jUt4Res14XoCZdtCU3DI4qIMoBHcMl-gOZH4vxlGlP_AYkpXaOqYUmX5J8Spoh-5_7WwzjORx7Vaz0MRdaf4PGs1KF6Z22jHMykF9UcPDzVzkNgzDNPBzSmN9n6jnmHZ3w9aizFU_Cen_-qi3772E4EgbvTY0nvb1GLVh2TI/3gs/alqLR3o1QeuMQWMiEAfgYQ/h4/PGkX1W5tNvdgjm437dBlwvERWAh2A4Joe3wvO0j1Vlw) When our community’s vaccination site was shut down because of this corruption, we needed our Congressman to stand up for the people of Austin and call for accountability for hospital executives. Instead, Congressman Davis stood with the CEO of Loretto over his own constituents — after [receiving](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDJhi8-dboE857UZ2wrzkr2F4r3Psn-S0KS4wy4GRbBgSekVW6vrMXqsXlDBJadTzAyPiP96lTXWMPOGmOTudNqMo5cKafCHvAzI-6d-LTUTLWAOXfA7d3yiJHjCyZCqM0vQ25abQvcQ3ljQ1Qlln98qVeTMvLxT_K5SCOZ9qsVjlpJW2tTMsmayo-vmZcwKda_Kl9xNMIts9TCzL-GkJ8Jjx0EI-4zcvPWINAk1DdfJf1U4zQm_WC_ngJOqh6upFulKL4ZleIhxVChbQn5m_lvXGcfx8_C4Hpmvu9VjRmjpaZGgcBecKyJBI7vJfO2ZmO7bMxQzLYxQmR4YwTBqyXRE/3gs/alqLR3o1QeuMQWMiEAfgYQ/h5/ZAgniBXsIPLSKzjHwTZM9EdDClxymLgj8DFEudaF1DM) thousands from employees and lobbyists for Loretto Hospital over the course of his career.
**[I don’t have Trump tower executives as donors. Our campaign is rejecting all corporate money. I will be accountable to the people on the West Side of Chicago, not the executives. Can you help our campaign to bring change to IL-7?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xx70stB4rOWn3H33v0OtzfF6UKPwTg0kVVhiTLfV6t9TtR6UbKymNGm2xbue5aTWO3eMJvy_PXYL6NlJVpGqBJx-Hb25pUYEOejvNsukwzK5133wNtupDJPLi_aMI7rRKeewdO1sm7EwvRoVGoYJhiirUxBfhKm57WEowCmZEEPHtOYEP5tDR3n2dGEyXoZHN0OHlcrLPJUE3dfS5VCPnEGyHEQ6uPge2zE85x_o7IxKLebGhEbhqIu9JTL7RG4u3KsLfARlelcZkpoKe8YrqZqwBvfORomkrUIRId8g8VVwC4x07ZFR8S8cwqkQ8KgCY/3gs/alqLR3o1QeuMQWMiEAfgYQ/h6/l0Getgf00KmT1fThyN-UNkaFS2pDwuXBeK1mPE2411M)** After surviving a pandemic and a recession that brutalized our neighborhood, Austin deserves better than a Congressman who stands by while hospital executives prioritize their own interests over our community. In solidarity, Kina Collins

[Donate »](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yOQozAy4249GfohatM8XLCP7Gyf6bzrkjN8sXh_JjXvCmYnnW-6I0oaLoxnMYHNBuul2AkFs9r2TY_sEUKG_dk6wkX9IiaYboQIbbIgLUIsG38NggM7rcxIDFYsiUvupp4k05dpjIBjnRf2GoED2Wjc2ef-QNeHKg75IHxUWmoCw6UxO7toHKmGpkc-HEuCtFXZSbSuu65quDBfhlqRSxzPm1VYdE4_Sept1tElLewjsKnbuoEHMvomtMvgoi49wr5BidBLuAdnybJY0NL484_0WdSUMqfs33lwzni5zwGxvIlFlkrmaBDWyzcKtp2IlLWpLEE2JHmA_0t44dpzYxK1OkwbFZe4tbtLXyMfJ1cEw/3gs/alqLR3o1QeuMQWMiEAfgYQ/h7/eYZu6EfXG9y7ALxpzMEccxrAoORsiGdPSz7PWDJaPXs) | To give by check:

901 Lake Street, Unit 4093

clean_body: Federal authorities launched a criminal investigation into Loretto Hospital | | | Team, This week in Chicago, federal authorities a criminal investigation into how Loretto Hospital administered COVID vaccines that were meant for communities of color, to ineligible Trump Tower employees. Team, if you live on the West Side, you know how hard it is to get the healthcare you need. This investigation is just the latest proof point of a larger pattern that those of us from Austin know well: politicians and executives in this city prioritize the wealthy and well-connected over the communities they’re supposed to serve. Those politicians and executives need to be held accountable—especially when lives are on the line. I am ready to be the voice of accountability representing IL-7 in Congress. When our community’s vaccination site was shut down because of this corruption, we needed our Congressman to stand up for the people of Austin and call for accountability for hospital executives. Instead, Congressman Davis stood with the CEO of Loretto over his own constituents — after thousands from employees and lobbyists for Loretto Hospital over the course of his career. After surviving a pandemic and a recession that brutalized our neighborhood, Austin deserves better than a Congressman who stands by while hospital executives prioritize their own interests over our community. In solidarity, Kina Collins | To give by check: Kina Collins for Congress 901 Lake Street, Unit 4093 Oak Park, IL 60301

name: John Fetterman
subject: Sharing our campaign memo
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
This memo is long, but important.
Peter, it's John Fetterman.
Exactly three years ago today, Gov. Tom Wolf and I won our election to serve PA as Governor and Lieutenant Governor.
In honor of this anniversary, I want to share an internal campaign memo that my campaign manager sent around earlier. **This memo is long, but *really* important.**
Look, I don’t always share internal memos like this (in fact, my campaign manager might be a *little* annoyed when he finds out I sent it to you). But the stakes for PA + our democracy are just *too* high not to keep you looped into our strategy.
[**_Will you please read our campaign memo, then consider making a contribution of any amount to help ensure we win in 2022?_**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/37164?refcode=em20211106-3368&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3368%2E434096%2EPturFD) Every county, every vote. There’s just no other way to win PA.
— John
TO: Interested Parties
FROM: Bobby Maggio, Campaign Manager
MEMO: What 2021 Means for PA in 2022 Last Tuesday night’s election was a small taste of just how hard the 2022 midterms could be for Democrats. With Terry McAuliffe losing by two points in Virginia, a state that President Biden won by 10%, Democrats are in for a very difficult election in Pennsylvania. After all, Biden only won PA by 2%. Fortunately, in what will be the most important Senate race in the country next year, we have the ideal candidate for a year when traditional Democrats, and traditional candidates, are likely to struggle. Lieutenant Governor John Fetterman appeals across the political spectrum, inspires genuine grassroots enthusiasm, connects with working class voters, and has proven that he can win votes in the reddest counties in Pennsylvania. In Pennsylvania, Democrats cannot afford to run the same old playbook. **To have our best chance at flipping this crucial open seat, Democrats can nominate John Fetterman, the only candidate in the race who has already proven he can run and win statewide in PA.** John doesn’t have to convince people he’s not like other politicians – they can see it for themselves. With his straight-talking, no-BS style, John defies conventional labels and appeals across party lines. He is the rare candidate with a bold populist record and the proven ability to appeal to independents and voters in Pennsylvania’s reddest and most rural counties. If we learned anything earlier this week, it’s that Democrats can’t continue to completely cede rural counties to Republicans. For years in Pennsylvania it has been said that winning a general election as a Democrat is all about winning Philadelphia and Pittsburgh. If we just run up the margins in urban areas, the thinking goes, then Democrats don’t have to worry about the largely red, rural counties that make up the rest of the state. This Election Day showed that margins matter, even in counties that Democrats are never going to win. Ceding county after county to Republicans is a losing strategy. John has always believed in every county, every vote. And he is not willing to write off any region, any community, any part of Pennsylvania. In 2018, when John ran on the ticket with Governor Tom Wolf, he traveled the state and talked to voters in every corner — regardless of how red or blue. **And with John as his running mate, Gov. Wolf won by more than almost a million more votes than he did in 2014. They did it by chipping away at Republican margins in rural counties.** John and Gov. Wolf won Berks County, Beaver County, Cumberland County, Erie County, and Luzerne County, all counties where Democrats have struggled at times in recent years. This notion that rural voters are immovable proved flat-out false. If that was the case, John wouldn’t be serving as Lieutenant Governor today. John is running a true 67 county campaign across the Commonwealth. Since we launched this campaign, John has traveled across Pennsylvania, holding events in some of the Commonwealth’s reddest counties. In August, for example, our campaign hosted a meet and greet in Mercer County, which Trump won by over 25% in 2020, a county that some Democrats wouldn’t even bother going to. We held an event at a local bar and had roughly 100 people come out to meet John and see him speak — in Sharon, PA, a town with a population of just 13,000 people. John doesn’t just wait until it’s election season to show up in rural Pennsylvania. As Lieutenant Governor, John traveled to all 67 counties to conduct a listening tour around legalizing marijuana. Whether it’s supporting down ballot local candidates or meeting constituents in every county, John has consistently shown up to rural counties and built strong relationships with communities on the ground. **Additionally, all the recent polling demonstrates that John’s appeal is broad. According to a poll by Data for Progress, John is the only Democratic candidate who beats a Republican opponent in a general election match up.** John is also the only Democratic candidate who leads both potential Republican candidates amongst independents. Democrats cannot afford to lose in Pennsylvania. We have to nominate a candidate who can excite the base and appeal to the unique independent voters of Pennsylvania. In order to win, Democrats must compete everywhere and meet voters where they are at. In John Fetterman, Democrats have a once-in-a-generation opportunity to turn this Senate seat blue and to have an unabashed champion of the working class represent Pennsylvania in the U.S. Senate.
---
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/37164?refcode=em20211106-3368&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=3368%2E434096%2EPturFD)**
__

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20211106-3368-footer&t=21&refcode2=3368_434096_PturFD&akid=3368%2E434096%2EPturFD)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=22&akid=3368%2E434096%2EPturFD)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=23&akid=3368%2E434096%2EPturFD)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

In August, for example, our campaign hosted a meet and greet in Mercer County, which Trump won by over 25% in 2020, a county that some Democrats wouldn’t even bother going to. We held an event at a local bar and had roughly 100 people come out to meet John and see him speak — in Sharon, PA, a town with a population of just 13,000 people. John doesn’t just wait until it’s election season to show up in rural Pennsylvania. As Lieutenant Governor, John traveled to all 67 counties to conduct a listening tour around legalizing marijuana. Whether it’s supporting down ballot local candidates or meeting constituents in every county, John has consistently shown up to rural counties and built strong relationships with communities on the ground. Additionally, all the recent polling demonstrates that John’s appeal is broad. According to a poll by Data for Progress, John is the only Democratic candidate who beats a Republican opponent in a general election match up. John is also the only Democratic candidate who leads both potential Republican candidates amongst independents. Democrats cannot afford to lose in Pennsylvania. We have to nominate a candidate who can excite the base and appeal to the unique independent voters of Pennsylvania. In order to win, Democrats must compete everywhere and meet voters where they are at. In John Fetterman, Democrats have a once-in-a-generation opportunity to turn this Senate seat blue and to have an unabashed champion of the working class represent Pennsylvania in the U.S. Senate. | | Email us: info@johnfetterman.com

| | Folks,

On Friday, your Congress kept its promise, and passed the biggest investment in American infrastructure and jobs in our country’s history. Democrats delivered, despite our incredibly narrow majorities in the House and Senate. And we were only able to do it because you elected us by the narrowest possible margins in 2020!

As you know, I won my election by 1.2% last November — the smallest margin of any Congressional Democrat. My opponent from that race is running again. And I’m not just up against him. The GOP’s dark money groups have already spent over $1 million in our race — yes, more than a year out — because they know it will help decide who controls the House for the remainder of President Biden’s term. That’s why, with election day just a year away, I need your help!

Thanks to your support in protecting our House majority, we’ve lowered the cost of health care for millions of people and cut poverty in America by almost half. The Build Back Better bill we'll pass later this month will make caring for our children less expensive, lower the cost of prescription drugs, protect the planet from climate change, and give every middle class family a tax cut (including the SALT deduction!).

Congressional Republicans have tried to stop all of this. The few brave Republicans who supported the bipartisan infrastructure bill are being hounded out of their party. Their leaders, from Kevin McCarthy to Marjorie Taylor Greene, stand for nothing but power.

[The GOP’s roadmap to power goes right through our district. So to stay on track, we need to keep building and demonstrating the grassroots strength to win again. That’s why we’ve set an ambitious goal of raising $20,000 by Monday at midnight. Everything we raise will help us go head to head with Tom Kean Jr. for a second time and to fight the GOPs constant attack ads. subject: Statement on Biden's Vaccine Mandate
body:
| |

| Press Release
---
| |
---
| November 6, 2021
---
Statement on Biden's Unconstitutional Vaccine Mandate
On November 4, the Biden administration issued a vaccine mandate that will negatively affect businesses and employees of companies with more than 100 employees. This Un-American and unconstitutional mandate has been issued through OSHA without any input from Congress or the state legislatures. This mandate puts unelected bureaucrats in charge of individual healthcare decisions robbing every citizen of their freedom of choice and takes the business owner's right to hire the employees she desires away. It further places government between every citizen and their doctor, replacing medical advice from a healthcare professional with the will of a government bureaucrat. This Un-American mandate disincentivizes businesses from hiring more employees, encourages some businesses to downsize, and forces some employees out of their careers. While the current mandate applies to businesses with 100 employees or more the order indicates that further mandates will follow to include all businesses. This mandate hurts employees, businesses, and our state. At a time when inflation is skyrocketing and businesses are struggling to find workers, we cannot afford to have additional burdens placed on our businesses or risk more hardworking employees being forced out of their jobs. Our state's long-term economic recovery relies on free-enterprise and fiscally responsible policies that encourages business growth. An Un-American mandate that hurts taxpayers, and ultimately harms our state is not what Mississippi needs. The Mississippi Freedom Caucus has been working to find solutions to protect employees and business owners who have been harmed by this unconstitutional mandate. We have been researching legislative solutions to actually prevent the mandate from being enforced in Mississippi. Members of the Freedom Caucus have been in constant communication with legislators from other states, legislative leaders in Mississippi and Governor Reeves' office. We stand ready to fight against the over-reach of the federal government and are working to find solutions that protect business owners, employees and every Mississippi citizen. We applaud Governor Reeves and Attorney General Fitch for filing a lawsuit against the Biden administration, but we do not believe the people of Mississippi should rely solely on the courts to protect their jobs or their right to make their own healthcare decisions. We are encouraged by the recent statements made by other members of the legislature and hope they will back up their statements with legislative action in the very near future. Our state, our nation, and many of your jobs may depend on the Mississippi legislature taking swift decisive action against these mandates. We ask you, the citizens of Mississippi, to stay engaged, call your local legislators, the governor and all political leaders in our state and encourage them to stand and fight for the rights of our citizens and the rights of businesses to make decisions without the interference of the federal government. The Mississippi Freedom Caucus can be found on Facebook @MSFREEDOMCAUCUS and online at www.FreedomCaucus.ms For Mississippi,
---

| Learn more about the Mississippi Freedom Caucus

The Mississippi Freedom Caucus is founded by elected officials who believe in freedom and liberty for the people of Mississippi. We are the voice of citizens who want bold action to protect life, strengthen families, defend our constitutional rights, limit government, and revitalize personal and economic freedoms in the state of Mississippi.

name: Lisa Blunt Rochester
subject: Republicans continue to stand in the way of voting rights
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lisa Blunt Rochester for Congress
body:
Friend,

This week, the Senate again voted against protecting voting rights in America. Can you chip in $5 right now so we can fight back against the GOP’s attacks on our voting rights?

Make no mistake, my Democratic colleagues and I know that this issue is so important. We've passed crucial pieces of legislation to combat Republican voter suppression laws, but the GOP is doing everything in its power to stop us from making sure Americans don’t have to jump through hoops to have their voice heard.

It is no secret that the GOP’s “voter integrity” push is an attempt to keep voters that won’t support their failed policies from voting them out.
And with the conservative-leaning court voting to strip the Voting Rights Act of its power, millions of Americans have little protection of our most basic right in a democracy.

I will never stop fighting for what is right. I hope you’ll join me in protecting the most fundamental right in our democracy: the right to vote.

DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lbr_october?refcode=EM_fr_211025votingrights_vote_lbr_actives_5_ng_nana_bio&refcode2=biobox]

Thank you,
Lisa Blunt Rochester

Congresswoman Lisa Blunt Rochester is a Democrat representing the First State, Delaware. She served as the National Co-Chair of the Biden-Harris campaign and Co-Chair of the DCCC ‘Red to Blue’ program. Lisa is running for reelection to continue fighting for our health care, leading the charge toward environmental justice, and advocating for working families like hers.

DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lbr_october?refcode=EM_fr_211025votingrights_vote_lbr_actives_5_ng_nana_bio&refcode2=biobox]

Paid for by Lisa Blunt Rochester for Congress

Lisa Blunt Rochester for Congress
PO BOX 9767
Wilmington, DE 19810
United States

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: The Squad last night
body:
It's on the Justice Democrats in Congress — and the grassroots movement behind them — to hold the line and protect investments for working people.
#
Peter,
Last night corporate Democrats joined with Republicans to put climate action, universal pre-K, paid leave, and Medicare expansion at risk. **Cori Bush, Jamaal Bowman, and the Squad were the only Democrats to vote WITH THE PEOPLE.**
When it comes down to it, corporate Democrats do not want to pass popular progressive policies. It’s on the Justice Democrats in Congress — and the grassroots movement behind them — to hold the line and protect investments for working people.
**[We need to back up Cori and Jamaal RIGHT NOW, because we know corporate Democrats will target them for primaries. Can you rush a split donation to Cori, Jamaal, and Justice Democrats right now?](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/83236?refcode=em20211106-20364&t=19&akid=20364%2E1203867%2EYVLyMU)**
**[Contribute](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/83236?refcode=em20211106-20364&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=20364%2E1203867%2EYVLyMU)**
The ridiculous thing, Peter, is that the corporate Democrats obstructing their own party’s agenda are **STILL** supported by the establishment!
It’s Justice Democrats like Cori and Jamaal who are fighting to preserve progressive policies in the Build Back Better Act: action to fight climate change, Medicare expansion, universal pre-K, paid family and medical leave, lower prescription drug costs — including a $35 monthly cap on insulin, and much more.
**Whatever happens in the next few hours, days, or weeks — we know who the real ones in Congress are, fighting for working people day in and day out. And it’s not Sinema, Manchin, or the rest of the corporate Democrats who negotiated our interests away. It’s Cori, Jamaal, and the Squad.**
Cori and Jamaal are taking a stand in their very first year in Congress, and we know that makes them targets for primary challenges by corporate Democrats. **Now, we have to step up to show we support Cori and Jamaal’s votes, and their fight for the people.**
**[Can you split a $3 contribution to Cori, Jamaal, and Justice Democrats today? We need to ensure we keep Cori and Jamaal in Congress AND expand the number of JDs in Congress.](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/83236?refcode=em20211106-20364&t=21&akid=20364%2E1203867%2EYVLyMU)**
**[Contribute](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/83236?refcode=em20211106-20364&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=20364%2E1203867%2EYVLyMU)**
Thanks for stepping up after this big vote.
In solidarity,
Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank [here.](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=23&akid=20364%2E1203867%2EYVLyMU) We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong. Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the [Centers for Disease Control](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=24&akid=20364%2E1203867%2EYVLyMU) and your state public health department.
---

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20211106-20364-footer&t=25&refcode2=20364_1203867_YVLyMU&akid=20364%2E1203867%2EYVLyMU)**
---

Dear Friend,
This morning Maryland Matters declared our campaign the winner in the wake of the Virginia gubernatorial election!
Parents, taxpayers, and small business owners want an effective governor who will improve the lives of all Marylanders - not a governor who thinks raising taxes is the solution to our problems, or one who puts special interest groups first.

---
---
I’ll be that governor. We’ll cut taxes, grow our economy, empower parents by expanding educational choice, and we’ll make history in 2022.

| | | | [ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDM-EBQfsbGG-s9DaLmbUEihpOkig6mNguK8yZijudTPis4F4Mj8IH3nnr6OeImF8tMAs0CyzkY1kT5Ibz-xHNlRjU2B2mHOaE7LEbUlT6W9zuBkUA3ogYnMgSWoKKGQULoS4pK0spaSs-swjy8fnmsGR1cTFe2BnMVrQ1p922ghYMxaAwny93vIU1nJS4SB2aMpumJ4_aqN40uGR1XNkCuGZBLqviOahBMcIsNqdrF67/3gs/1pzQQDImQQ-t-bHVA63evA/h0/Lms38isV5gzFSnOgQBJcqw_feMTXToHqSkecO918Ams)

Hello,
After he was stricken with COVID-19 last year, Chuck Grassley’s 27-year streak of 8,927 consecutive votes came to an end. But when you look at what many of those 8,927 votes were... it kinda makes you wish he would have been absent more often.
For over 40 years in the Senate, Chuck Grassley has voted _against_ expanding access to health care, _against_ combatting the world’s climate crisis, _against_ getting money out of politics, and _against_ even the most common sense firearm responsibility issues supported by our police and members of his own party.
Grassley has taken millions from corporate PACs and special interests, including Wall Street, Big Pharma and insurance companies, and the NRA. It should be no surprise that he remains deaf to Iowa but a good listener of billionaires and their lobbyists.
**I’m running for Senate against Chuck Grassley because after a lifetime in elected office, it’s time Iowans had someone actually representing them. You won’t find me taking money from corporate PACs.**
Control of the Senate is on the line here in Iowa, so you know Mitch McConnell and his Super PACs are going to come after me with millions of dollars of false TV ads. **If we’re going to take on Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and expand our Democratic majority in the Senate, I need grassroots donors like you to chip in now and become a Founding Donor to my campaign.** Give me the tools so I can fight back.
[**Please, can you chip in $5, $25, or whatever you can afford now to become a Founding Donor and help me defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and defend our Democratic majority?**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/4PfL751D8g4IfLXFw3QfXV5Wo_6TP_ujTmJFoO05AE1kXvT_Q9tki0_GCcDtiDHFCiKFP7igMykCvahsh6EtHNXQMnepozHj78VkAKslaL5lXla68-aH1XFn9WyBBTRozhwiCbW0frIGDtc9X_wqibr2Rll4Go8M_PZpUFy3Dw1DP5g4hYgQgcZ9JvwyuE3IcZt2jp_cdELwEMqzVPm933xubJwMvym2B1V-xxQpHoZvaWbeLSqkB-IKH1T98xkH6Y_aOy_0OB5myOVbQCLnnfgAWiOFuzO7T20tbtCbDFLx_42w7CyhIEwF6D6T87Yyg0g4bQ4pXLGiuUZZGkpgQGnoNypBG_FhuKvS4C4djgiHarUfoGrhv0AzH4EM44QnAoWnpDJmKIG4oJWAVdRxPA/3gs/1pzQQDImQQ-t-bHVA63evA/h1/yvHW1-ariquzGFT5yp6O5j4zwb5BLxB7A-_sG0_iiKg)
We’re running our campaign the right way, but I’m counting on the support of people like you if we’re going to come out victorious.
Thank you for your support,
Mike Franken, VADM, U.S. Navy (ret.)

clean_body: | | | | Hello, After he was stricken with COVID-19 last year, Chuck Grassley’s 27-year streak of 8,927 consecutive votes came to an end. But when you look at what many of those 8,927 votes were... it kinda makes you wish he would have been absent more often. For over 40 years in the Senate, Chuck Grassley has voted against expanding access to health care, against combatting the world’s climate crisis, against getting money out of politics, and against even the most common sense firearm responsibility issues supported by our police and members of his own party. Grassley has taken millions from corporate PACs and special interests, including Wall Street, Big Pharma and insurance companies, and the NRA. It should be no surprise that he remains deaf to Iowa but a good listener of billionaires and their lobbyists. I’m running for Senate against Chuck Grassley because after a lifetime in elected office, it’s time Iowans had someone actually representing them. You won’t find me taking money from corporate PACs. Control of the Senate is on the line here in Iowa, so you know Mitch McConnell and his Super PACs are going to come after me with millions of dollars of false TV ads. If we’re going to take on Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and expand our Democratic majority in the Senate, I need grassroots donors like you to chip in now and become a Founding Donor to my campaign. Give me the tools so I can fight back. We’re running our campaign the right way, but I’m counting on the support of people like you if we’re going to come out victorious. Thank you for your support, Mike Franken, VADM, U.S. Navy (ret.) | PAID FOR BY MICHAEL FRANKEN FOR IOWA, INC. name: Adam Schiff
subject: We can defeat Sen. Chuck Grassley (R) in Iowa
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
Our best hope for a better Iowa, and for a Democratic Senate, is Abby Finkenauer...
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38373521/315162210/-1484552876?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk391-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YWE3NDhhYS01NjNmLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PqTN11NsMI8Qa8tfxLd9Q0149FqPsztf_NEG84nGJvQ=)
Hey Peter, it’s Adam Schiff. My friend Abby asked me to reach out because this moment is critical: Donald Trump recently rallied with and endorsed Abby’s opponent, Sen. Chuck Grassley (R-IA). I want to be respectful of your time, so I’ll cut right to the chase – we need Abby Finkenauer in the U.S. Senate.
Over the past few years, we’ve learned that our democracy is fragile. In the aftermath of Donald Trump and his Big Lie, it’s more important now than ever to protect it. We need champions for our democracy in the Senate – **and with Abby Finkenauer, Iowans would gain a true public servant in the U.S. Senate. I saw firsthand just how hard she fought for Iowa's working families and our democracy during her time in Congress. And in the U.S. Senate, she’ll continue that fight.**
**[Abby’s Senate campaign is gaining momentum, and she needs to make a big statement before her next big fundraising deadline. I'm personally asking: Will you split a donation between our campaigns right now? We must elect Abby to the Senate and hold on to our Democratic majorities in Congress.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38373522/315162211/-1484552876?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk391-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YWE3NDhhYS01NjNmLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PqTN11NsMI8Qa8tfxLd9Q0149FqPsztf_NEG84nGJvQ=)**
| | [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38373523/315162212/-1484552876?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk391-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YWE3NDhhYS01NjNmLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PqTN11NsMI8Qa8tfxLd9Q0149FqPsztf_NEG84nGJvQ=)
---
When I served with Abby in the House, I knew from the very start she was there for the right reasons: To do the hard work. The critical work. The kind of work that makes a difference.
It may not earn headlines – but it improves the lives of the people we represent. It has become rarer and rarer to see these days, but for Abby, public service is personal. She was raised in a working-class family. The fight is in her blood. And she would do anything and everything to better the lives of her community.
As for the current Iowa Senator, Chuck Grassley, it’s a different story. He's held this seat in the Senate for more than 40 years. And showing up for Iowa's working families seems to be a thing of his past. He's actively working against affordable health care and empowering unions – the sort of things that would improve the lives of so many in Iowa and across the country. Worse still, he's helped propagate Donald Trump's lies and encouraged dangerous voter suppression laws, and he has done Mitch McConnell’s bidding for much of his career.
**Our best hope for a better Iowa, and for a Democratic Senate, is Abby Finkenauer.** But it won’t be easy. Mitch McConnell doesn’t want to lose Grassley. His super PACs have nearly limitless resources to keep this seat red. And their work to take down Abby has already begun. **That's why I need you to make a critical donation right now.**
**[Peter, will you split a contribution of $5 or more right now to our campaigns? We must ensure Abby can defeat Sen. Grassley and keep our razor-thin majority in the Senate.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38373524/315162213/-1484552876?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk391-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YWE3NDhhYS01NjNmLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PqTN11NsMI8Qa8tfxLd9Q0149FqPsztf_NEG84nGJvQ=)**
I’m grateful for your support. Your continued fight for the truth. And for our democracy. Let's win in Iowa. Let’s elect Abby.

– Adam Schiff
| | [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38373525/315162214/-1484552876?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk391-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YWE3NDhhYS01NjNmLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PqTN11NsMI8Qa8tfxLd9Q0149FqPsztf_NEG84nGJvQ=)

name: Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
subject: Kim voted to pass the bipartisan Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
"House passes $1 trillion bipartisan infrastructure bill that includes transport, broadband and utility funding, sends it to Biden" - CNBC **_"House passes $1 trillion bipartisan infrastructure bill that includes transport, broadband and utility funding, sends it to Biden" - CNBC_**
Exciting news, Peter!

Last night, Kim voted to pass the bipartisan Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act!

**This landmark legislation will improve Washington State's infrastructure, build a greener future, and create good-paying jobs** by modernizing highways, roads, and bridges, ensuring clean drinking water, updating public transit systems, and more.

Kim was proud to help lead the effort to include provisions that are critical to Washington State that will:

✅ Make forests healthier, more resilient, and more resistant to catastrophic wildfires.
✅ Protect American rivers and streams, endangered fish, and community water systems.
✅ Enhance the safety, grid resilience benefits, and power generating capacity of America’s dams.

clean_body: "House passes $1 trillion bipartisan infrastructure bill that includes transport, broadband and utility funding, sends it to Biden" - CNBC "House passes $1 trillion bipartisan infrastructure bill that includes transport, broadband and utility funding, sends it to Biden" - CNBC Exciting news, Peter! Last night, Kim voted to pass the bipartisan Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act! This landmark legislation will improve Washington State's infrastructure, build a greener future, and create good-paying jobs by modernizing highways, roads, and bridges, ensuring clean drinking water, updating public transit systems, and more. Kim was proud to help lead the effort to include provisions that are critical to Washington State that will: ✅ Make forests healthier, more resilient, and more resistant to catastrophic wildfires. ✅ Protect American rivers and streams, endangered fish, and community water systems. ✅ Enhance the safety, grid resilience benefits, and power generating capacity of America’s dams. | Thanks, Team Schrier National Republicans have named Rep. clean_body: | | | | This is a huge win for freedom. Dear Peter, I have very exciting news to share today. Yesterday, my Attorneys General colleagues and I launched several major lawsuits against the unlawful OSHA vaccine mandate. Minutes ago, the first court responded! I just heard that the Fifth Circuit U.S. Court of Appeals has temporarily BLOCKED Biden's illegal OSHA mandate. This is a huge win for freedom. We are still analyzing how this will impact the entire country and have much more work to do, but this is obviously VERY BIG! Thank you. | | | | | Sincerely, Patrick Morrisey West Virginia Attorney General P.S. I have told you about how important AGs are in defending America, and hope this helps make that point. We are the point of the spear protecting your freedoms and will not relent in our fights against the far-left! | Follow us on Social Media ****|****|****|****|** Paid for by TEAM MORRISEY, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit of Morrisey for Attorney General, Morrisey for West Virginia, Inc., Blue and Gold Fund, and West Virginia Republican Party, Inc. c/o Red Curve Solutions 138 Conant Street, 2nd Floor Beverly, MA 01915. name: Daria & Mike
subject: What Democrats are saying ….

body:
| Peter

Tuesday was a great day to be a Republican, don’t you agree?

Not only did team red pick up the Virginia governor’s mansion, but Republicans also swept all three of the statewide races in the Old Dominion. What’s more, a REPUBLICAN WOMAN became the first woman of color ever to be elected to statewide office in Virginia’s 400-year history.

Needless to say, the results of Tuesday’s election have sent tremors across the Democrat world. Some DEMS are in denial (what’s new) and some realize how much of a threat Republicans pose at the ballot box next year...

_“**what we’re talking about is not resonating with voters.** ”

“**Nobody elected him (Biden) to be FDR, they elected him to be normal...** ”

“**This is 2009 all over again**.”

“**The only benefit {Democrats} have over 2009 is knowing just how bad it can get**.” _

The trio of Republican victories in Virginia sent such shockwaves through the political world that one political forecaster downgraded not one, but four Senate races from “lean Democrat” to “Tossup”!

[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=ee54dc243a194f198ba41ffe0878d617&_e=sXDd0CUZWdu8BJ3c-CD1VJG15YYPnz_-7awcctQsWq89FsUGgaCUd9Hl1PSYQDLQxBe7KZ3Z2vo6D9vb2uBUF0_fICVsBJVAfjQ_Ow5mtDQ9eIMkl98b1KXAZAsZ9Mgdq5LGhQWr0ghgkj-ZXvWYTqnQbvdggqOuyAEp6jvM7DsxpUUlcaqDcJLfmS1NHTV3kH_ulyMbVogaAWE2UhX-CgYu1NAR1we-sD3yCOa_tBFgcA9Qa5T11n8lIUdvwQEdOI8aBG_JVdiYdlF81AeTCLKoYe0QDKiNAK1UHJx2jT8I166lJuZHM_ckgI3Oc332mE0upn28fnxok80kg1FKvwvxvAuJzYuFgP86tkxVM3E5tRNbzGwnwO-G8BuY13sh-6PsXX8Sb2RjQCZaWAijg5W3AVdlfP0UjvnZ3xcWBXLdNZDc0YxB3wwYLtKRBUGHIxxpsOifaNJD89s_DXT7h-jYqSJbV6Q67PxQLlIoGzO_2WfZDPJzOSsjFc_5D0Cl)

name: SIGNED MAGA HAT
subject: We only have one

Fellow American,

By now, you may have heard the news that President Trump has formally endorsed my campaign for the United States Senate! I've known the President for a long time, and I'm proud to call him my friend.

In case you missed my email announcing the President's support, let me quickly recap for you what he had to say in his endorsement release:

| _"Herschel is tough on crime and borders, and he will always stand in support of law enforcement, military, and our vets. He will fight hard for our Second Amendment and voter integrity. Herschel will never let you down."_ - President Donald J. Trump
---

Now, while I'm very grateful for President Trump's support of my campaign, the truth of the matter is that I won't get anywhere on my own. I'm a team player - always have been - and I need you on my team. _**[So, I'm asking you to join my team today by offering your personal endorsement of my campaign.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=b224c970cff141f2812ee5cf6d16f6ee&_e=NzOvn07gtz9B0LL_Xz6BIHhKvmJ2g7fSMFDWJ2hb4RFXcz-I_v4n2jQ8HbSaR93WiWHt_FssjO__L2qZnQ1fvk6eMTXH0m-crXBSfTjpqcm6MelTcXvY8wFjkeuz0uxA-FV0Dz-OyL8L-jp2OMHq6QMKzJ3KWJGNQCiRBElhkv7wmEC4NATakdlramJ7PSOqF8pFHFxw3xQ-GlvCTHowygZwY3_-1FN46E5zjcNrRg36pbtwDfwH4u2ih5zD7gqMWX6ucB5UWdMBTxFJ9SVZLDIca8Bdc99q9Pxl-x4w3Kzr0x_txlLUB8xx4n4IumEtXRC5T7zdR7e3mT4P7AoA-KZz_tJrnJPTxe9RvabMsG50DVSy76WdvH2Yz89i0U8RoCSd_Icf04TjYBxYW7x8zUxSO0E_1CmBnSjHSP6gsWyocZtVbNUagd59YO22cw1gOihiwqrv_wVzOi3at0vDbmQh0-Kgwux0Qvu3F4gHGWQqiJKqhzo-BI1P6rjpi2n6qvgBlXsiL6iAqGWlnIn-46lBFTKkvoCvd0rLDh7nCyx6vqQczvVAshAwo3tFq_xz-Zj3rhsBksabgp1TakQe4g%3D%3D)**_

The number one threat to our prosperity as a nation is the unified Democrat control of Washington.
