clean_body: I have President Trump’s endorsement, but I want to know: do I have yours? I have President Trump's endorsement, but I want to know: do I have yours? | Fellow American, By now, you may have heard the news that President Trump has formally endorsed my campaign for the United States Senate! I've known the President for a long time, and I'm proud to call him my friend. In case you missed my email announcing the President's support, let me quickly recap for you what he had to say in his endorsement release: | "Herschel is tough on crime and borders, and he will always stand in support of law enforcement, military, and our vets. He will fight hard for our Second Amendment and voter integrity. Herschel will never let you down." - President Donald J. Trump Now, while I'm very grateful for President Trump's support of my campaign, the truth of the matter is that I won't get anywhere on my own. I'm a team player - always have been - and I need you on my team. President Trump is right: I will never let you down. I believe in strong conservative values. I believe in smaller government, personal responsibility, and making sure EVERY AMERICAN - regardless of income level, race, or religion, has the opportunity to pursue their dreams. Democrats know that I'm the biggest threat to their Senate majority and are already raising massive sums of money in an attempt to blunt my campaign before we really get rolling. The number one threat to our prosperity as a nation is the unified Democrat control of Washington. I've chosen not to sit on the sidelines and watch President Biden, Chuck Schumer, and Raphael Warnock wreck our great country. The stakes are too high. will benefit my campaign immediately and serve me and my team well as we work to flip Georgia's Senate seat RED and restore some sanity to Washington, DC. Thank you very much, Herschel Walker Republican for United States Senate | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC.

body:
| Fellow Conservative

Tuesday was a great day to be a Republican, don’t you agree?

Not only did team red pick up the Virginia governor’s mansion, but Republicans also swept all three of the statewide races in the Old Dominion. What’s more, a REPUBLICAN WOMAN became the first woman of color ever to be elected to statewide office in Virginia’s 400-year history.

Needless to say, the results of Tuesday’s election have sent tremors across the Democrat world. Some DEMS are in denial (what’s new) and some realize how much of a threat Republicans pose at the ballot box next year...

_“**what we’re talking about is not resonating with voters.** ”

“**Nobody elected him (Biden) to be FDR, they elected him to be normal...** ”

“**This is 2009 all over again**.”

“**The only benefit {Democrats} have over 2009 is knowing just how bad it can get**.” _

The trio of Republican victories in Virginia sent such shockwaves through the political world that one political forecaster downgraded not one, but four Senate races from “lean Democrat” to “Tossup”!

clean_body: | Fellow Conservative Tuesday was a great day to be a Republican, don’t you agree? Not only did team red pick up the Virginia governor’s mansion, but Republicans also swept all three of the statewide races in the Old Dominion. What’s more, a REPUBLICAN WOMAN became the first woman of color ever to be elected to statewide office in Virginia’s 400-year history. Needless to say, the results of Tuesday’s election have sent tremors across the Democrat world. Some DEMS are in denial (what’s new) and some realize how much of a threat Republicans pose at the ballot box next year... “what we’re talking about is not resonating with voters. ” “Nobody elected him (Biden) to be FDR, they elected him to be normal... ” “This is 2009 all over again.” “The only benefit {Democrats} have over 2009 is knowing just how bad it can get.” The trio of Republican victories in Virginia sent such shockwaves through the political world that one political forecaster downgraded not one, but four Senate races from “lean Democrat” to “Tossup”! We are counting on your help to make sure that 2022 is in fact exactly like 2010 – one of the best years for Republicans in recent history. In honor of the three major Republican victories on Tuesday, would you do us a huge favor and chip in $3 or more toward our efforts to flip the Senate Republican? We have the wind at our backs and we simply cannot afford to lose any momentum. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- | | | | Thanks - Mike and Daria NRSC Digial Department If you want to help Republicans TAKE BACK THE SENATE, text WIN to 55404 to receive mobile alerts! These figures are unprecedented , Peter — and furthermore, it's proof that the appetite for new leadership in Arizona is there. Unsurprisingly, the very same poll found that Arizona Democratic primary voters are more likely to support a candidate who votes in favor of key provisions in the Build Back Better plan, a key part of President Biden's agenda. President Biden's agenda is broadly popular in Arizona, and it is extremely popular with Democrats. If Sen. Sinema continues to block it, voters will not reward her in 2024 — and now, we have the numbers to prove it. But we simply can't afford to wait until 2024, especially since Sinema's obstruction is hurting Democratic electoral chances right now. That's why we're working with grassroots groups on the ground in Arizona who are leading the fight to make it happen. — Primary Sinema PAC | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options: PAID FOR BY CHANGE FOR ARIZONA 2024 PAC** | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Change for Arizona 2024, please .

name: Daria & Mike
subject: For the first time in 400 years…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
| Peter

Tuesday was a great day to be a Republican, don’t you agree?

Not only did team red pick up the Virginia governor’s mansion, but Republicans also swept all three of the statewide races in the Old Dominion. What’s more, a REPUBLICAN WOMAN became the first woman of color ever to be elected to statewide office in Virginia’s 400-year history.

Needless to say, the results of Tuesday’s election have sent tremors across the Democrat world. Some DEMS are in denial (what’s new) and some realize how much of a threat Republicans pose at the ballot box next year...

_“**what we’re talking about is not resonating with voters.** ”

“**Nobody elected him (Biden) to be FDR, they elected him to be normal...** ”

“**This is 2009 all over again**.”

“**The only benefit {Democrats} have over 2009 is knowing just how bad it can get**.” _

The trio of Republican victories in Virginia sent such shockwaves through the political world that one political forecaster downgraded not one, but four Senate races from “lean Democrat” to “Tossup”!

[](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=5ed10579177b4d5eab01d66245df5915&_e=t5vScptPWLj3pDYGYUS_ZJuPW9ss5OPTS_L0o0Y5306jp6wnIqJD_Mebwnk4kM0hxGlxUqOo6V2CyLTNtCEkh9jtudZ95lPCCDzWbm6zUUJ-gCtIqKQ7xcEcQdTjh1l_VnxZKbeAiG0x76GIvGQuHAIF6EwjSst3ASKJWHgebVzcvV1kd7PMYi05gO9A2fiS7Dn-GTqvYecDfufYnoubswDcLSajMgVt7JCXsAIUqvPgHAVCq0Qv5LX1-bZ4itQI3oU0IVoiQdEGT7n-IWxQkKw9qq6XvjuYx3E9GOoDXSQlRYrQGa-rfgI3skRfHxqhMGJOcnhrdDcY2BKmP-OCkSWTSYTHBGDa1MwADRXmSFwRsXQRRSoT1t5yqHrNRABcOcWXK4yCRM4YsD7nAFI1-iQty2y2kM558AwUWzoiGsketI7SFWccRAtrxQLYohU5n2aEyAB9Cj1TQ2af8ytwBAW152tSQ5xQR4RV_3ae9Fo%3D)

name: John McGuire
subject: Welcome Aboard!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of John McGuire
body:
John Mcguire for Delegate Thank you for joining the team

<>

Hey there Friend,

I wanted to personally reach out and say thank you for being a part of our
campaign. Your support means the world to my family and I.

Being born and raised in Henrico County, I understand first hand the type of
leadership this area needs. It starts with gaining the support and trust of
folks in our community, and then following that up by doing what's right in
Richmond.This is our first step to creating that relationship.

As a former Navy SEAL, I fully embrace being a thoughtful leader, and working
together with others to get things done. It all starts with good policy, not
politics, and I approach every situation with this in mind. In my professional
career I have focused on getting better services for our veterans, tackling the
opioid crisis, and making sure our tax dollars are spent efficiently.It is my
number one priority to make sure Virginia is the best state in the country to
live, work, and raise a family.

I come to you today humbly, thanking you with the utmost gratitude for
joining my team. This journey is about you. It starts with you, and ends with
serving YOU. It's a new day in Virginia.

With you on the team, I believe we can create a brighter future for our
Commonwealth by listening to each other and working together.

Again, thank you for joining my team and I look forward to pushing the best
interest of all Virginians forward!

God Bless,

John McGuire

Paid for by Friends of John McGuire

Don't want to receive our emails anymore? Unsubscribe
<http://links.mcguireforvirginia.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=1646ee1789c746fa925af25ab7afd241&_s=ce60c4d108d04e2faf14d59f9dc5ffa1&_t=kb2WwxEXQEcnkxkc_xmtX2O70Ku0r26lM2FdbnMq_kDxdanVXcCuatIIMjQMgrbs_V190gPGZ3rlUP1i4HbZmgt8t5AaTE_6fqVO2POpNp3V-zdyrs7cG2cXpr70zaSE72PXHtzFIpKr4ehGF314rnN60pQrFYz8lmYF8zmEuw8%3D>

name: Laurel Imer
subject: Reminder: 2021 Election Recap
disclaimer_text: Paid for By Laurel Imer for Congress
body:
Now that the 2021 Election season is over, its time to focus on 2022.
---
| | | | | | |
---
[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_mlKPsWQmalyX4fbTGmilLUujzK7KjyccPG3Xf326-5VlG5oM1K3s01UBG9I1f7h7_poJ8-TlLLSzbxrYTSh4_aacpdAa7k96wrcuOMgJkQYpsjqEvL6endXdX5yduvaAjPDXt8gGIE_1iarxUbsajNmJZvWpyYmLnQleNBYZb9DpEI7ygtn6t7XwwsPIcQE&c=QNcpOY3UFSeRr5yIuZ-Fd0pUlOkxaT7bBkdn91iCs4kn_DzpaVmeKw==&ch=1BUMjpR4Am4bFAKp5JEEs-yD1fDGkrbYQh07ZumE1mqGVN9iF6fsjA==)
---
| |
---
| Fellow American, Yesterday was election day in America and the results were astounding! Glenn Youngkin beat insurmountable odds and opposition from the radical left and rinos that wanted to see him fail, becoming the Governor-Elect of the commonwealth of Virginia.
In New Jersey, we almost took back the governor's mansion, NEW JERSEY! A deep blue state that no one expected to swing our direction.
Here in Colorado, we elected conservatives to our school boards, city councils, mayoral offices, and more. We stopped radical propositions that would forever damage the fabric of our state and we showed the radical left that we are here fighting to take our state back.
Now, it is time to keep our eyes on the prize which is 2022. Kamala Harris said it best, "What happens in Virginia will in large part determine what happens In 2022, 2024, and on." Virginia flipped red and Colorado is next.
The time to step up and support our campaign for 2022 is now. Just today the NRCC announced they will be targeting Ed Perlmutter with ads because they too know and believe we can beat him this year and that we can take back CD7.
Now that the congressional district lines are final, we can be confident in our strategy to take back this seat. However, that strategy depends on the continued financial support from people like you.
I'm not asking for much, but if every person on this email list gave just $25 recurring each month or even just once we can make sure that Ed Perlmutter doesn't see a 9th term.
I am asking every one of you to please, donate $25 today, not tomorrow, or the next time I email. TODAY!
Click one of the donation options below to get started on your contribution.
---

I know that everyone is wanting your support right now, but none of those people are fighting to take back the house like I am. I am asking you this month to answer my call and donate to my campaign today.
I want to remind you that every penny that is donated goes directly to the mission of taking back Colorado, CD7, and the US House in 2022.
This money does not go to me, this money goes to the mission of saving this state so that we can have election integrity, secure borders, lower gas prices, no more inflation, our parental rights restored, and accountability in our government again.
If the rino GOP Establishment in Colorado and Washington, DC had their way, they would replace me with another whitewashed rino republican that doesn't support the America First message that resonates so loudly with the people of Colorado and everyday Americans.
It is time to show the establishment, just like Glenn Youngkin and President Trump did, that we the people are sick of retail politicians, we are ready for change, and that is what I bring to this race.
I know I can count on you to step up today Friend.
Sincerely,

clean_body: Now that the 2021 Election season is over, its time to focus on 2022. | | | | | | | == | | | Fellow American, Yesterday was election day in America and the results were astounding! Glenn Youngkin beat insurmountable odds and opposition from the radical left and rinos that wanted to see him fail, becoming the Governor-Elect of the commonwealth of Virginia. In New Jersey, we almost took back the governor's mansion, NEW JERSEY! A deep blue state that no one expected to swing our direction. Here in Colorado, we elected conservatives to our school boards, city councils, mayoral offices, and more. We stopped radical propositions that would forever damage the fabric of our state and we showed the radical left that we are here fighting to take our state back. Now, it is time to keep our eyes on the prize which is 2022. Kamala Harris said it best, "What happens in Virginia will in large part determine what happens In 2022, 2024, and on." Virginia flipped red and Colorado is next. The time to step up and support our campaign for 2022 is now. Just today the NRCC announced they will be targeting Ed Perlmutter with ads because they too know and believe we can beat him this year and that we can take back CD7. Now that the congressional district lines are final, we can be confident in our strategy to take back this seat. However, that strategy depends on the continued financial support from people like you. I'm not asking for much, but if every person on this email list gave just $25 recurring each month or even just once we can make sure that Ed Perlmutter doesn't see a 9th term. I am asking every one of you to please, donate $25 today, not tomorrow, or the next time I email. TODAY! Click one of the donation options below to get started on your contribution. | | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == I know that everyone is wanting your support right now, but none of those people are fighting to take back the house like I am. I am asking you this month to answer my call and donate to my campaign today. I want to remind you that every penny that is donated goes directly to the mission of taking back Colorado, CD7, and the US House in 2022. This money does not go to me, this money goes to the mission of saving this state so that we can have election integrity, secure borders, lower gas prices, no more inflation, our parental rights restored, and accountability in our government again. If the rino GOP Establishment in Colorado and Washington, DC had their way, they would replace me with another whitewashed rino republican that doesn't support the America First message that resonates so loudly with the people of Colorado and everyday Americans. It is time to show the establishment, just like Glenn Youngkin and President Trump did, that we the people are sick of retail politicians, we are ready for change, and that is what I bring to this race. I know I can count on you to step up today Friend. name: Daria & Mike
subject: What Democrats are saying….
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
| Fellow Conservative

Tuesday was a great day to be a Republican, don’t you agree?

Not only did team red pick up the Virginia governor’s mansion, but Republicans also swept all three of the statewide races in the Old Dominion. What’s more, a REPUBLICAN WOMAN became the first woman of color ever to be elected to statewide office in Virginia’s 400-year history.

Needless to say, the results of Tuesday’s election have sent tremors across the Democrat world. Some DEMS are in denial (what’s new) and some realize how much of a threat Republicans pose at the ballot box next year...

_“**what we’re talking about is not resonating with voters.** ”

“**Nobody elected him (Biden) to be FDR, they elected him to be normal...** ”

“**This is 2009 all over again**.”

“**The only benefit {Democrats} have over 2009 is knowing just how bad it can get**.” _

The trio of Republican victories in Virginia sent such shockwaves through the political world that one political forecaster downgraded not one, but four Senate races from “lean Democrat” to “Tossup”!

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=97c22f8e9ebe407e92371d90047719ae&_e=piS06jlWM32zQBLuu6x3wpDrmh1SEo1VTPn_qb32BmLtPLiNl6o3vQJSFt_YobRXJwvY_SGyniBd0QcO1pQgDEZDGDUIFNoiZIkK_aZ3XLcTSl1WhYPd7SSasd_Qq_h8f7O0qh2IZP-MC8fXMBiJq3KDbRfGIiKC3UyKCQaTqOAVzbrDwkzbv3LBBDiYhrDCAHPaSNWam5ogFgkFmFZjedbdLcqIFvsh5hLkxsIdqLfa2AQyamzcScvYegHN2AbGDj9tosqwPAh618egusffV3_-KdE3i5q_hvRDBHdw9_2z5WBv7foaV1FhfSv0ql1u1Yw7mI2fsVcKR8PJlKeRAn2pLMuwuupIgDrIxFLdSp-MFKJwc6qUUZTnOdQKGCgD78hsz3t9msrHzrawjn5UWyvtOzJjxfm54L8qSt2Q7HCWoxRjvMWDRyH5VZPdKahtn7sU4bev-nNmRY2jfoZOyd1JZOUIfpJo8N9LeZcy2Tg%3D)
We are counting on your help to make sure that 2022 is in fact exactly like 2010 – one of the best years for Republicans in recent history.

In honor of the three major Republican victories on Tuesday, would you do us a huge favor and chip in $3 or more toward our efforts to flip the Senate Republican?

We have the wind at our backs and we simply cannot afford to lose any momentum.

clean_body: | Fellow Conservative Tuesday was a great day to be a Republican, don’t you agree? Not only did team red pick up the Virginia governor’s mansion, but Republicans also swept all three of the statewide races in the Old Dominion. What’s more, a REPUBLICAN WOMAN became the first woman of color ever to be elected to statewide office in Virginia’s 400-year history. Needless to say, the results of Tuesday’s election have sent tremors across the Democrat world. Some DEMS are in denial (what’s new) and some realize how much of a threat Republicans pose at the ballot box next year... “what we’re talking about is not resonating with voters. ” “Nobody elected him (Biden) to be FDR, they elected him to be normal... ” “This is 2009 all over again.” “The only benefit {Democrats} have over 2009 is knowing just how bad it can get.” The trio of Republican victories in Virginia sent such shockwaves through the political world that one political forecaster downgraded not one, but four Senate races from “lean Democrat” to “Tossup”! We are counting on your help to make sure that 2022 is in fact exactly like 2010 – one of the best years for Republicans in recent history. In honor of the three major Republican victories on Tuesday, would you do us a huge favor and chip in $3 or more toward our efforts to flip the Senate Republican? We have the wind at our backs and we simply cannot afford to lose any momentum. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- | | | | Thanks - Mike and Daria NRSC Digial Department If you want to help Republicans TAKE BACK THE SENATE, text WIN to 55404 to receive mobile alerts! Message and data rates may apply. Text "STOP" to opt-out. | | Paid for by the NRSC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Peter,

I never thought I would run for the United States Senate.

But as I saw what was happening in our country, I knew this race was too important to sit on the sideline. So, Team Herschel was born - and I am blessed to have folks like you as part of our team.

Over the next few months, I will let you know why I am running for the United States Senate and why I am asking for your support.

I will give you 34 reasons - my favorite number - why I am personally asking Georgians to vote for me and for your support.

Here's reason number one:

clean_body: When I decided to run for the United States Senate, I knew I wanted to run a different type of campaign. I hope you're with me. | Peter, I never thought I would run for the United States Senate. But as I saw what was happening in our country, I knew this race was too important to sit on the sideline. So, Team Herschel was born - and I am blessed to have folks like you as part of our team. Over the next few months, I will let you know why I am running for the United States Senate and why I am asking for your support. I will give you 34 reasons - my favorite number - why I am personally asking Georgians to vote for me and for your support. Here's reason number one: It's time to come together and fight for what makes America great - our people. One year from now, we have an opportunity to change the balance of the Senate, but we will need to mobilize folks just like you to help us win. Thanks, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

| | | I've had it.

At least **10** people involved in the Capitol riots were just elected to state and local office.

At least **FIVE** more are running for Congress.

And Republicans only need to flip **FIVE** seats to retake our House Majority.

**[Hear me loud and clear: I refuse to let anyone who supported the desecration of our democracy ever hold power in the halls of Congress again. I'm calling for a MASSIVE response -- 1,500 gifts before midnight -- to PROTECT our House Majority, DEFEAT House Republicans, and stop them from EVER holding power in Congress again. Can I count on your immediate $3 to protect my House Democrats? >>](https://links.e.dccc.)**
